\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Compatibility-preserving refactor execution gate\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Semantic module consolidation and compatibility-preserving refactor workflow.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & This is not a mathematical CNNA object. It maps repository structure to refactor governance: only semantically identical representation layers may be consolidated;\newline proof-producing layers remain split unless their proof/\allowbreak{}provenance information is preserved by a better canonical module.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & V1.21 identifies this phase as part of the hard pre-code readiness chain before 1.1.1.2.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Explicit child split under 1.1.1.1.5;\newline avoids treating a broad semantic-consolidation umbrella as sufficient proof for new content code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Execute and close this gate constructively;\newline only create obstruction/\allowbreak{}red blockers if the positive closure attempt identifies missing source/\allowbreak{}proof data.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean module added now. Potential future modules, if authorized: CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Handoff/\allowbreak{}Outputs/\allowbreak{}SectorExportAliases.lean;\newline CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Handoff/\allowbreak{}Inputs/\allowbreak{}FeedbackInput.lean;\newline CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}BoundarySource/\allowbreak{}CandidateLedgers.lean. Old modules remain as facades initially.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Natural placement is before blue-object semantic correction and any new Lean content;\newline do not patch later consumer phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & RD08 records the consolidation decision rule. Same-semantics wrappers may be unified;\newline proof-stage modules must remain separated until a stronger canonical proof module preserves their role.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & No generator change. If consolidation touches generated Smoke files later, it must use the existing canonical generated-source/\allowbreak{}main-path seams and must not create a second generator path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Preserve or improve auditability;\newline neutralize names and consolidate only with facades/\allowbreak{}regression evidence.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Mandatory before any Lean merge: retain old modules as facades in pass 1;\newline record declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status, and local full-build evidence.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not yet executed. Initial audit candidates: BoundarySource four substrate ledger clones;\newline Handoff three A\_to\_\{C,D,E\} output aliases;\newline Handoff four \{B,C,D,E\}\_to\_A feedback-input clones;\newline no-merge candidates: SM generated proof chains, Cayley-Dickson S6 chain;\newline watch item: Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}Notation monolith.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline remains Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot. No new import may be assumed;\newline refactor-only changes must compile locally before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & EXEC-2 remains unchanged. Consolidation may not move rational executable data behind noncomputable or analytic mirrors.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Audit flows from code producers/\allowbreak{}import surfaces to consumers. If a consumer needs a consolidated API, the facade must be created at the producer/\allowbreak{}natural source layer, not patched in the consumer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & This gate is justified because concrete clone families exist, but it must remain compact: one ledger, no broad rewrite, no full code normalization before the active content path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & For each candidate cluster prove/\allowbreak{}check: same semantic operation, same or explicitly mapped public declarations, no consumer lost, import direction preserved or improved, natural generating layer chosen, old imports kept through facades, full local build green, and statement/\allowbreak{}provenance granularity not lost.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & If later Lean facades are created, expect explicit abbrev/\allowbreak{}def wrappers, namespace-preserving aliases, extensionality reuse where existing, and rfl proofs. Avoid tactic-heavy rewrites;\newline no @[simp] promotion in operational path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected for audit. Any later facade/\allowbreak{}refactor should reuse existing imports;\newline new imports require Lean 4.28.0 verification.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex changes in the audit. If Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}Notation or operational modules are touched later, preserve all concrete executable witnesses and rational-boundary policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not a computation phase. Concrete evidence is the finite repository module/\allowbreak{}declaration graph plus direct code spot-checks of named files. Later executable refactors must preserve existing executable witnesses.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Audit-only. A later refactor may not skeletonize operational paths;\newline it must preserve concrete generated source, DtN/\allowbreak{}Schur, determinant, and discriminant witnesses.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & For audit: generated module inventory and candidate report. For later code refactor: unchanged downstream Lean build plus regenerated module/\allowbreak{}declaration inventory showing no lost public declarations unless explicitly facaded.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No mathlib complication in audit. Later code movement may expose import-minimization issues;\newline resolve by preserving existing import surfaces first.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No noncomputable introduced. Later operational refactor cannot introduce noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure into executable paths.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If new imports are needed, prefer local facade modules or existing imported modules rather than widening mathlib dependency surface.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Current bridge gap is governance-level: exact consolidation candidates are not yet fully ledgered. No mathematical bridge is missing. Do not patch consumers;\newline place any new facade at the natural source layer of the duplicate/\allowbreak{}schema family.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & BoundarySource candidate ledgers belong under Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}BoundarySource;\newline Handoff input/\allowbreak{}output wrapper consolidation belongs under Handoff/\allowbreak{}Inputs or Outputs;\newline notation normalization belongs at notation facade boundaries;\newline proof-stage chains stay in their proof-stage folders unless a canonical proof module is naturally introduced.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Before writing any new substantive Lean code, complete the LEG36 audit. If refactor is authorized, produce a bounded migration packet: old-module facades, changed imports, declaration delta, consumer-breakage audit, generated inventory diff, and user/\allowbreak{}local Lean build result.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG26)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & V1.21 planning update only: Execute only approved neutral refactor with facades and local build evidence.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & No Lean source changed in V1.21. Closure requires exact inventory/\allowbreak{}refactor/\allowbreak{}build evidence recorded in the corresponding proof dossier and scratchpad.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Close the phase by explicit references to derived-only Lean objects/\allowbreak{}proof dossiers, source inventory exports, and local build evidence where Lean refactor is executed. If proof fails, spawn upstream red blocker at natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Do not advance to 1.1.1.2 until the complete 1.1.1.1.5.1-1.1.1.1.5.5 chain closes.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a full zip with updated YAML, exports, report and generated docs;\newline do not claim Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Execute only approved neutral refactor with facades and local build evidence.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Do not advance to 1.1.1.2 until the complete 1.1.1.1.5.1-1.1.1.1.5.5 chain closes.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a full zip with updated YAML, exports, report and generated docs;\newline do not claim Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Regenerate and reconcile module/\allowbreak{}declaration/\allowbreak{}object/\allowbreak{}proof inventory after refactor.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export/\allowbreak{}*.json\item generated\_exports/\allowbreak{}*.tsv\item repo\_snapshot/\allowbreak{}CNNA/\allowbreak{}**/\allowbreak{}*.lean\item masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no Lean source move in the audit phase\item no merge by filename similarity alone\item no deletion of old import surfaces without facade migration\item no merging proof-stage chains that encode derivation/\allowbreak{}provenance order\item no new semantic truth layer from the audit ledger\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: all global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply, especially GNG03, GNG21, GNG23-GNG26.\item no semantic merge without natural-layer placement\item no deletion of compatibility imports in the first refactor pass\item no proof-stage chain merge by naming similarity\item no code slimming that reduces statement/\allowbreak{}provenance auditability\end{itemize}\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Context class is orthogonal to status.\end{minipage}\par\vspace{0.25em}

Phase type & refactor\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Pre-substantive-code release certificate\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Semantic module consolidation and compatibility-preserving refactor workflow.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & This is not a mathematical CNNA object. It maps repository structure to refactor governance: only semantically identical representation layers may be consolidated;\newline proof-producing layers remain split unless their proof/\allowbreak{}provenance information is preserved by a better canonical module.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & V1.21 identifies this phase as part of the hard pre-code readiness chain before 1.1.1.2.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Explicit child split under 1.1.1.1.5;\newline avoids treating a broad semantic-consolidation umbrella as sufficient proof for new content code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Execute and close this gate constructively;\newline only create obstruction/\allowbreak{}red blockers if the positive closure attempt identifies missing source/\allowbreak{}proof data.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean module added now. Potential future modules, if authorized: CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Handoff/\allowbreak{}Outputs/\allowbreak{}SectorExportAliases.lean;\newline CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Handoff/\allowbreak{}Inputs/\allowbreak{}FeedbackInput.lean;\newline CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}BoundarySource/\allowbreak{}CandidateLedgers.lean. Old modules remain as facades initially.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Natural placement is before blue-object semantic correction and any new Lean content;\newline do not patch later consumer phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & RD08 records the consolidation decision rule. Same-semantics wrappers may be unified;\newline proof-stage modules must remain separated until a stronger canonical proof module preserves their role.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & No generator change. If consolidation touches generated Smoke files later, it must use the existing canonical generated-source/\allowbreak{}main-path seams and must not create a second generator path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Preserve or improve auditability;\newline neutralize names and consolidate only with facades/\allowbreak{}regression evidence.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Mandatory before any Lean merge: retain old modules as facades in pass 1;\newline record declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status, and local full-build evidence.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not yet executed. Initial audit candidates: BoundarySource four substrate ledger clones;\newline Handoff three A\_to\_\{C,D,E\} output aliases;\newline Handoff four \{B,C,D,E\}\_to\_A feedback-input clones;\newline no-merge candidates: SM generated proof chains, Cayley-Dickson S6 chain;\newline watch item: Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}Notation monolith.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline remains Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot. No new import may be assumed;\newline refactor-only changes must compile locally before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & EXEC-2 remains unchanged. Consolidation may not move rational executable data behind noncomputable or analytic mirrors.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Audit flows from code producers/\allowbreak{}import surfaces to consumers. If a consumer needs a consolidated API, the facade must be created at the producer/\allowbreak{}natural source layer, not patched in the consumer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & This gate is justified because concrete clone families exist, but it must remain compact: one ledger, no broad rewrite, no full code normalization before the active content path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & For each candidate cluster prove/\allowbreak{}check: same semantic operation, same or explicitly mapped public declarations, no consumer lost, import direction preserved or improved, natural generating layer chosen, old imports kept through facades, full local build green, and statement/\allowbreak{}provenance granularity not lost.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & If later Lean facades are created, expect explicit abbrev/\allowbreak{}def wrappers, namespace-preserving aliases, extensionality reuse where existing, and rfl proofs. Avoid tactic-heavy rewrites;\newline no @[simp] promotion in operational path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected for audit. Any later facade/\allowbreak{}refactor should reuse existing imports;\newline new imports require Lean 4.28.0 verification.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex changes in the audit. If Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}Notation or operational modules are touched later, preserve all concrete executable witnesses and rational-boundary policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not a computation phase. Concrete evidence is the finite repository module/\allowbreak{}declaration graph plus direct code spot-checks of named files. Later executable refactors must preserve existing executable witnesses.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Audit-only. A later refactor may not skeletonize operational paths;\newline it must preserve concrete generated source, DtN/\allowbreak{}Schur, determinant, and discriminant witnesses.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & For audit: generated module inventory and candidate report. For later code refactor: unchanged downstream Lean build plus regenerated module/\allowbreak{}declaration inventory showing no lost public declarations unless explicitly facaded.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No mathlib complication in audit. Later code movement may expose import-minimization issues;\newline resolve by preserving existing import surfaces first.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No noncomputable introduced. Later operational refactor cannot introduce noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure into executable paths.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If new imports are needed, prefer local facade modules or existing imported modules rather than widening mathlib dependency surface.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Current bridge gap is governance-level: exact consolidation candidates are not yet fully ledgered. No mathematical bridge is missing. Do not patch consumers;\newline place any new facade at the natural source layer of the duplicate/\allowbreak{}schema family.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & BoundarySource candidate ledgers belong under Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}BoundarySource;\newline Handoff input/\allowbreak{}output wrapper consolidation belongs under Handoff/\allowbreak{}Inputs or Outputs;\newline notation normalization belongs at notation facade boundaries;\newline proof-stage chains stay in their proof-stage folders unless a canonical proof module is naturally introduced.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Before writing any new substantive Lean code, complete the LEG36 audit. If refactor is authorized, produce a bounded migration packet: old-module facades, changed imports, declaration delta, consumer-breakage audit, generated inventory diff, and user/\allowbreak{}local Lean build result.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG26)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & V1.21 planning update only: Release 1.1.1.2 only after LEG37-LEG40 and proof-dossier updates close.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & No Lean source changed in V1.21. Closure requires exact inventory/\allowbreak{}refactor/\allowbreak{}build evidence recorded in the corresponding proof dossier and scratchpad.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Close the phase by explicit references to derived-only Lean objects/\allowbreak{}proof dossiers, source inventory exports, and local build evidence where Lean refactor is executed. If proof fails, spawn upstream red blocker at natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Do not advance to 1.1.1.2 until the complete 1.1.1.1.5.1-1.1.1.1.5.5 chain closes.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a full zip with updated YAML, exports, report and generated docs;\newline do not claim Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Release 1.1.1.2 only after LEG37-LEG40 and proof-dossier updates close.\\

\subsection*{Phase 1.1.1.2 -- Blue-object semantic correction ledger}
\label{impl:phase-1-1-1-2}
\par\smallskip\noindent\begin{minipage}{0.99\linewidth}\footnotesize\raggedright\textbf{Table legend.} \colorbox{green!18}{\strut G} = green/closed and derived-only; \colorbox{white}{\strut W} = white/non-direct-Lean tooling/refactor/infrastructure/documentation/comparison; \colorbox{orange!28}{\strut O} = orange/implementable after stated predecessor closure; \colorbox{yellow!25}{\strut Y} = yellow/active and implementable now; \colorbox{red!20}{\strut R} = red/locked Lean-derivation phase; release requires derived-only object/proof evidence. Context class is orthogonal to status.\end{minipage}\par\vspace{0.25em}
\begin{longtable}{L{0.16\linewidth} L{0.81\linewidth}}
\hline
\textbf{Field} & \textbf{Record}\\
\hline
Phase status & \cellcolor{orange!28}O\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Context class & LeanGovernancePhase\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation tier & F3\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation depth requirement & Compact record: what exists, why it exists, owning phase, source location, and whether it may affect Lean objects. Avoid proofbook bloat.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change version & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change timestamp & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation status & prepared-after-pre-code-readiness-chain\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation status & active-prepared\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & refactor\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & Refactor phase: record module/\allowbreak{}declaration migration metrics, import delta, consumer breakage audit, wrapper coexistence, and local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Blue-object semantic correction ledger after semantic module consolidation gate\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Phase-bound preparation from the single YAML master. Only write records belonging to this phase;\newline register later-phase theory as missing-source or future-target entries.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & LEG7 maps every B object to its correction phase and public-neutral API. The B object remains proof-carrying but semantically quarantined until corrected.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Now depends on 1.1.1.1.5.5 and closed LEG37-LEG41 readiness chain before activation. Now additionally depends on closure of 1.1.1.1.5 semantic module consolidation audit before activation. Feasible as infrastructure-only after v43/\allowbreak{}v44: LEG5 declaration/\allowbreak{}object consumption classification, LEG12 proof-dossier anchors, LEG10 module manifest, and LEG11 reuse policy are closed. Blocking dependency for code changes: if a blue object lacks a dossier/\allowbreak{}code-site/\allowbreak{}source object, backjump to object-proof documentation or consumption classification rather than patching LEG7.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Do not split before the first LEG7 ledger generation. Split only if the generated B-object list shows distinct correction families requiring separate natural phases, e.g. Cayley-Dickson, Schur/\allowbreak{}DtN, and operational arithmetic.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Positive path: generate/\allowbreak{}validate the LEG7 ledger for all B objects from existing object register, proof dossiers, and object\_consumption\_classification export;\newline record semantic/\allowbreak{}API defect, allowed temporary consumers, forbidden direct/\allowbreak{}public consumers, correction phase, and exit-to-white condition for each row.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & Infrastructure/\allowbreak{}planning gate expected. Use existing YAML/\allowbreak{}generator tables unless a code phase proves a Lean audit mirror is necessary.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & The ledger belongs in the planning master/\allowbreak{}generated tables first. It must not patch consumers or move Lean declarations before the correction semantics are recorded.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Consume LEG11 and LEG5;\newline do not create a parallel object-status or classifier generator.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & Extend scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py if generated views are needed;\newline otherwise keep the blue correction ledger in YAML as a governance source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Classify by object family and correction phase. Do not generate one prose subsection per Lean declaration unless a correction really depends on it.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Infrastructure proof rehearsal: each blue object must satisfy B-status -> blue-semantic-correction class -> has proof dossier -> has current derivation site -> has forbidden public consumers -> has natural correction phase -> has exit-to-white condition. Failure localizes to dossier/\allowbreak{}classification source, not to public API/\allowbreak{}pruning consumers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & No Lean proof tactics expected unless a small audit module is introduced. For such modules, prefer explicit records and exact/\allowbreak{}rfl proofs only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected;\newline if a later Lean audit file is introduced, verify imports against mathlib 4.28.0 first.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object is introduced. This gate only classifies consumption/\allowbreak{}API status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & Not required for this infrastructure-only ledger phase;\newline the witness is generated TSV/\allowbreak{}TeX consistency over existing object/\allowbreak{}proof/\allowbreak{}classification records. If Lean code is proposed, a separate finite executable witness must be named before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No mathlib complication expected for ledger-only implementation;\newline no new Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib import should be introduced. Any proposed Lean audit file must verify imports against Lean 4.28.0 before code starts.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No operational or mirror mathematical code is introduced in the planned ledger-only route;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure would indicate that the phase has drifted into a later mathematical correction phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge should be invented here. Current known open item SCF26 is a ledger-completeness requirement for 1.1.1.2, not a request for new mathematics.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to the earliest natural layer: consumption classifier, blue-object correction ledger, public API contract, pruning ledger, Legacy.StatusGates, CoreSymbols, or import firewall.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, verify module manifest/\allowbreak{}reuse audit before adding Lean code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Not completed and no longer the active cursor in V1.12. It becomes implementable in the derivation chain after Phase 1.1.1.1.5 closes.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Feasibility remains valid from v44, but V1.12 inserted a pre-substantive semantic module consolidation gate because code inspection found clone/\allowbreak{}schema module families that should be audited before new content code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After closure, update linked objects, generated exports/\allowbreak{}PDF, and advance exactly one active cursor.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Resume only after LEG36 is closed or after a bounded refactor execution phase has completed with local build evidence. The blue-object ledger must then consume the stabilized module/\allowbreak{}API surface.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item object register blue rows\item declaration classification from 1.1.1.1.4\item proof-dossier infrastructure from 1.1.1.1.3\item TomS guardrails where arithmetic/\allowbreak{}number theory touches appear\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item blue\_correction\_ledger\item temporary allowed consumer set\item forbidden direct consumer set\item exit-to-white condition per B object\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\item no white status for a blue object without a closed correction phase\item no direct handoff/\allowbreak{}export of blue objects as final API\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\item generated\_exports/\allowbreak{}object\_consumption\_classification.generated.tsv\item tables/\allowbreak{}object\_proof\_documentation.tex\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item parallel blue-status table disconnected from object register\item white status without correction proof\item public export of B object through wrapper reachability\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Context class is orthogonal to status.\end{minipage}\par\vspace{0.25em}

\hline
\textbf{Field} & \textbf{Record}\\
\hline
Phase status & \cellcolor{white}W\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Context class & LeanGovernancePhase\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation tier & F3\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation depth requirement & Compact record: what exists, why it exists, owning phase, source location, and whether it may affect Lean objects. Avoid proofbook bloat.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change version & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change timestamp & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation status & planned-not-active\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation status & planned-not-active\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & refactor\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & Refactor phase: record module/\allowbreak{}declaration migration metrics, import delta, consumer breakage audit, wrapper coexistence, and local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Public API contract and consumer whitelist\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Phase-bound preparation from the single YAML master. Only write records belonging to this phase;\newline register later-phase theory as missing-source or future-target entries.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & LEG6/\allowbreak{}LEG9 define which modules and declarations may be seen by Phase 3+ and later handoffs.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on module manifest, reuse audit, proof-dossier infrastructure, declaration classification, and blue correction. Public API exposure is invalid if any public object lacks a proof-dossier link or is still blue/\allowbreak{}semantically unfinished.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Atomic contract phase;\newline movement happens only in 1.1.2-1.1.5.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Declare the visible post-cleanup API and consumer whitelist. Exclude Legacy.StatusGates, phase aliases, audit-only material, duplicate generator seams, uncorrected blue objects, and any public object without proof-documentation status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Verify every downstream phase consumes either a white/\allowbreak{}yellow planned object or a corrected neutral wrapper, never status/\allowbreak{}audit/\allowbreak{}phase aliases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & No Lean proof tactics expected unless a small audit module is introduced. For such modules, prefer explicit records and exact/\allowbreak{}rfl proofs only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected;\newline if a later Lean audit file is introduced, verify imports against mathlib 4.28.0 first.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object is introduced. This gate only classifies consumption/\allowbreak{}API status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge should be invented here. If a blue object needs mathematics, route it to its natural correction phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to the earliest natural layer: consumption classifier, blue-object correction ledger, public API contract, pruning ledger, Legacy.StatusGates, CoreSymbols, or import firewall.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, verify module manifest/\allowbreak{}reuse audit before adding Lean code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & No completed implementation record yet. This phase is planned by v23 and must remain inactive until its predecessor gate closes.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Not applicable yet;\newline this is a planning/\allowbreak{}preparation gate until it becomes the unique active phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After closure, update linked objects, generated exports/\allowbreak{}PDF, and advance exactly one active cursor.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Do not implement by broad deletion. First produce the specified ledger/\allowbreak{}contract and update generated views.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item 1.1.1.1 consumption map\item 1.1.1.2 blue correction ledger\item access\_policy table\item LEG10 module manifest\item LEG11 reuse/\allowbreak{}duplication ledger\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item public\_api\_contract\item consumer\_whitelist\item forbidden\_import\_set\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\item do not let BuildAll/\allowbreak{}Umbrella imports count as public API\item do not expose Legacy.* to Phase 3+\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item implementation\_prompt\_contract for 1.1.2-1.1.5\item generated-view authority record\item local-build evidence reminder\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\item do not claim Lean build success for planning-only artifacts\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}
\phantomsection
\subsection*{Phase 1.1.1.5.1 -- Tool-mode split and lean-focus contract}
\label{impl:phase-1-1-1-5-1}
\par\smallskip\noindent\begin{minipage}{0.99\linewidth}\footnotesize\raggedright\textbf{Table legend.} \colorbox{green!18}{\strut G} = green/closed and derived-only; \colorbox{white}{\strut W} = white/non-direct-Lean tooling/refactor/infrastructure/documentation/comparison; \colorbox{orange!28}{\strut O} = orange/implementable after stated predecessor closure; \colorbox{yellow!25}{\strut Y} = yellow/active and implementable now; \colorbox{red!20}{\strut R} = red/locked Lean-derivation phase; release requires derived-only object/proof evidence. Context class is orthogonal to status.\end{minipage}\par\vspace{0.25em}
\begin{longtable}{L{0.16\linewidth} L{0.81\linewidth}}
\hline
\textbf{Field} & \textbf{Record}\\
\hline
Phase status & \cellcolor{white}W\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Context class & LeanGovernancePhase\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation tier & F2\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation depth requirement & Standard dossier: short definition, source objects, proof target, implementation location, and next documentation action. No large narrative unless it blocks implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change version & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change timestamp & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation status & planned-not-active\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation status & planned-not-active\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & infrastructure\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & Infrastructure phase: update YAML/\allowbreak{}generator/\allowbreak{}generated exports, validate single-source constraints, and render PDF without claiming Lean build success.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Tool-mode split and lean-focus contract\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Phase-bound preparation from the single YAML master. Only write records belonging to this phase;\newline register later-phase theory as missing-source or future-target entries.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & No theory classification yet;\newline this phase only fixes the mode boundary.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on 1.1.1.5 and earlier governance gates. It must not block the current active 1.1.1.2 blue-correction ledger;\newline it is a future scaling/\allowbreak{}tooling refinement.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Atomic planned subphase under 1.1.1.5. Split only if implementation would otherwise mix Lean-code changes with tool/\allowbreak{}PDF/\allowbreak{}YAML changes.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Implement by extending Python/\allowbreak{}YAML/\allowbreak{}generated exports first. Do not add Lean code. If a Lean-side audit mirror becomes necessary, create a separate later Lean phase with an explicit finite witness and import policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & Tooling subphase. Proposed generated artifacts: workflow-policy row;\newline scaling-plan TSV/\allowbreak{}TeX;\newline no Lean code\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Belongs under 1.1.1.5 generated-view authority/\allowbreak{}implementation-lock tooling. It must not patch mathematical consumers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse existing single YAML master and scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py. Avoid parallel masters or a second manually maintained planning source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & Extend the existing Python generator in the smallest possible way;\newline exports are generated TSV/\allowbreak{}JSON/\allowbreak{}TeX, not manually edited tables.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep PDF slices compact;\newline full data remains in generated TSV/\allowbreak{}JSON exports.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not a Lean refactor. If Python generator is changed, run generator validation and render-check the affected PDF sections.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No Lean declaration migration. Record generator/\allowbreak{}export changes only when the phase becomes active.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Future Lean phases may consume only compact implementation packets and the relevant ledger slices, not broad manual PDF scans.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & This phase exists to reduce governance overhead during Lean work by pushing routine collection/\allowbreak{}rendering into Python.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Validate generator output, single YAML source, exactly one active phase, unchanged Lean-data timestamp, and section-specific rendering. This is a tooling proof rehearsal, not a Lean theorem.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & No Lean tactics expected. If a later Lean mirror is explicitly introduced, use explicit records/\allowbreak{}constructors and avoid @[simp], noncomputable operational paths, classical helpers, and broad fragile rewrites.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected for the planned Python/\allowbreak{}YAML tooling route.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object is introduced. This gate only classifies consumption/\allowbreak{}API status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not an operational Lean phase. The concrete tooling witness is generated exports and PDF rendering over the current single YAML master.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-applicable-tooling-only;\newline no operational mathematical computation is introduced\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & Python generator run plus generated TSV/\allowbreak{}TeX/\allowbreak{}PDF artifacts;\newline no Lean executable witness required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No mathlib complication expected because this is a Python/\allowbreak{}YAML/\allowbreak{}PDF tooling phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No Lean operational path is modified;\newline any noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical concern indicates accidental drift into Lean code and requires a separate phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge is introduced here. Local background theory and large end-theory comparison roles are tracked as metadata/\allowbreak{}ledgers, not as CNNA generators.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to the earliest natural layer: consumption classifier, blue-object correction ledger, public API contract, pruning ledger, Legacy.StatusGates, CoreSymbols, or import firewall.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, verify module manifest/\allowbreak{}reuse audit before adding Lean code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & No completed implementation record yet. This future tooling/\allowbreak{}governance phase was introduced by Tool V1.04 and must remain inactive until its predecessor gates and active cursor allow it.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Not applicable yet;\newline phase is a planned Tool V1.04 implementation-scaling subphase. Lean-data timestamp remains unchanged.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After closure, update linked objects, generated exports/\allowbreak{}PDF, and advance exactly one active cursor.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Define audit-full, phase-check, and lean-focus modes so routine Lean work consumes compact implementation packets instead of full PDF/\allowbreak{}table scans. Full PDF regeneration is not part of ordinary Lean coding;\newline use compact packets unless a governance or audit phase explicitly requests audit-full.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Tool V1.04 implementation-scaling plan\item SCF37\item workflow policy\item repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export\item object register\item implementation scratchpad\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Tool-mode split and lean-focus contract\item No theory classification yet;\newline this phase only fixes the mode boundary.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\item do not claim Lean build success for planning-only artifacts\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\item repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export/\allowbreak{}modules.json\item repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export/\allowbreak{}symbol\_references/\allowbreak{}*.json\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item parallel planning master\item manual duplicate theory ledger\item full graph dumped into PDF\item end theory used as CNNA producer\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Module compactness rule & Keep PDF slices compact;\newline full data remains in generated TSV/\allowbreak{}JSON exports.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not a Lean refactor. If Python generator is changed, run generator validation and render-check the affected PDF sections.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No Lean declaration migration. Record generator/\allowbreak{}export changes only when the phase becomes active.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Future Lean phases may consume only compact implementation packets and the relevant ledger slices, not broad manual PDF scans.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & This phase exists to reduce governance overhead during Lean work by pushing routine collection/\allowbreak{}rendering into Python.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Validate generator output, single YAML source, exactly one active phase, unchanged Lean-data timestamp, and section-specific rendering. This is a tooling proof rehearsal, not a Lean theorem.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & No Lean tactics expected. If a later Lean mirror is explicitly introduced, use explicit records/\allowbreak{}constructors and avoid @[simp], noncomputable operational paths, classical helpers, and broad fragile rewrites.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected for the planned Python/\allowbreak{}YAML tooling route.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object is introduced. This gate only classifies consumption/\allowbreak{}API status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not an operational Lean phase. The concrete tooling witness is generated exports and PDF rendering over the current single YAML master.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-applicable-tooling-only;\newline no operational mathematical computation is introduced\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & Python generator run plus generated TSV/\allowbreak{}TeX/\allowbreak{}PDF artifacts;\newline no Lean executable witness required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No mathlib complication expected because this is a Python/\allowbreak{}YAML/\allowbreak{}PDF tooling phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No Lean operational path is modified;\newline any noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical concern indicates accidental drift into Lean code and requires a separate phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge is introduced here. Local background theory and large end-theory comparison roles are tracked as metadata/\allowbreak{}ledgers, not as CNNA generators.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to the earliest natural layer: consumption classifier, blue-object correction ledger, public API contract, pruning ledger, Legacy.StatusGates, CoreSymbols, or import firewall.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, verify module manifest/\allowbreak{}reuse audit before adding Lean code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & No completed implementation record yet. This future tooling/\allowbreak{}governance phase was introduced by Tool V1.04 and must remain inactive until its predecessor gates and active cursor allow it.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Not applicable yet;\newline phase is a planned Tool V1.04 implementation-scaling subphase. Lean-data timestamp remains unchanged.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After closure, update linked objects, generated exports/\allowbreak{}PDF, and advance exactly one active cursor.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Avoid rescanning/\allowbreak{}rendering everything by caching file hashes, module declarations, import edges, and symbol-reference candidates between Lean-data updates. Only changed Lean files and dependent generated summaries are refreshed;\newline full inventory rebuild remains available as audit-full.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Tool V1.04 implementation-scaling plan\item SCF37\item workflow policy\item repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export\item object register\item implementation scratchpad\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Incremental Lean inventory and file-hash cache\item May infer rough local background categories from imports, but must mark them heuristic until semantically confirmed.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\item do not claim Lean build success for planning-only artifacts\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\item repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export/\allowbreak{}modules.json\item repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export/\allowbreak{}symbol\_references/\allowbreak{}*.json\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item parallel planning master\item manual duplicate theory ledger\item full graph dumped into PDF\item end theory used as CNNA producer\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Tool V1.04 implementation-scaling plan\item SCF37\item workflow policy\item repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export\item object register\item implementation scratchpad\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item End-theory comparison ledger\item End theories are target structures, consistency checks, terminology alignment, or obstruction/\allowbreak{}comparison mirrors;\newline forbidden as CNNA producers.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\item do not claim Lean build success for planning-only artifacts\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\item repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export/\allowbreak{}modules.json\item repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export/\allowbreak{}symbol\_references/\allowbreak{}*.json\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item parallel planning master\item manual duplicate theory ledger\item full graph dumped into PDF\item end theory used as CNNA producer\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Context class is orthogonal to status.\end{minipage}\par\vspace{0.25em}

\hline
\textbf{Field} & \textbf{Record}\\
\hline
Phase status & \cellcolor{white}W\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Context class & LeanGovernancePhase\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation tier & F2\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation depth requirement & Standard dossier: short definition, source objects, proof target, implementation location, and next documentation action. No large narrative unless it blocks implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change version & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change timestamp & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation status & planned-not-active\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation status & planned-not-active\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & infrastructure\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & Infrastructure phase: update YAML/\allowbreak{}generator/\allowbreak{}generated exports, validate single-source constraints, and render PDF without claiming Lean build success.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Active object graph slices\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Phase-bound preparation from the single YAML master. Only write records belonging to this phase;\newline register later-phase theory as missing-source or future-target entries.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Graph edges distinguish internal provenance, local formalization context, and external comparison-only references.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on 1.1.1.5 and earlier governance gates. It must not block the current active 1.1.1.2 blue-correction ledger;\newline it is a future scaling/\allowbreak{}tooling refinement.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Atomic planned subphase under 1.1.1.5. Split only if implementation would otherwise mix Lean-code changes with tool/\allowbreak{}PDF/\allowbreak{}YAML changes.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Implement by extending Python/\allowbreak{}YAML/\allowbreak{}generated exports first. Do not add Lean code. If a Lean-side audit mirror becomes necessary, create a separate later Lean phase with an explicit finite witness and import policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & Tooling subphase. Proposed generated artifacts: active-object-neighborhood DOT/\allowbreak{}SVG/\allowbreak{}PDF;\newline graph-slice TSV/\allowbreak{}JSON\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Belongs under 1.1.1.5 generated-view authority/\allowbreak{}implementation-lock tooling. It must not patch mathematical consumers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse existing single YAML master and scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py. Avoid parallel masters or a second manually maintained planning source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & Extend the existing Python generator in the smallest possible way;\newline exports are generated TSV/\allowbreak{}JSON/\allowbreak{}TeX, not manually edited tables.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep PDF slices compact;\newline full data remains in generated TSV/\allowbreak{}JSON exports.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not a Lean refactor. If Python generator is changed, run generator validation and render-check the affected PDF sections.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No Lean declaration migration. Record generator/\allowbreak{}export changes only when the phase becomes active.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Future Lean phases may consume only compact implementation packets and the relevant ledger slices, not broad manual PDF scans.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & This phase exists to reduce governance overhead during Lean work by pushing routine collection/\allowbreak{}rendering into Python.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Validate generator output, single YAML source, exactly one active phase, unchanged Lean-data timestamp, and section-specific rendering. This is a tooling proof rehearsal, not a Lean theorem.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & No Lean tactics expected. If a later Lean mirror is explicitly introduced, use explicit records/\allowbreak{}constructors and avoid @[simp], noncomputable operational paths, classical helpers, and broad fragile rewrites.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected for the planned Python/\allowbreak{}YAML tooling route.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object is introduced. This gate only classifies consumption/\allowbreak{}API status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not an operational Lean phase. The concrete tooling witness is generated exports and PDF rendering over the current single YAML master.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-applicable-tooling-only;\newline no operational mathematical computation is introduced\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & Python generator run plus generated TSV/\allowbreak{}TeX/\allowbreak{}PDF artifacts;\newline no Lean executable witness required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No mathlib complication expected because this is a Python/\allowbreak{}YAML/\allowbreak{}PDF tooling phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No Lean operational path is modified;\newline any noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical concern indicates accidental drift into Lean code and requires a separate phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge is introduced here. Local background theory and large end-theory comparison roles are tracked as metadata/\allowbreak{}ledgers, not as CNNA generators.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to the earliest natural layer: consumption classifier, blue-object correction ledger, public API contract, pruning ledger, Legacy.StatusGates, CoreSymbols, or import firewall.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, verify module manifest/\allowbreak{}reuse audit before adding Lean code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & No completed implementation record yet. This future tooling/\allowbreak{}governance phase was introduced by Tool V1.04 and must remain inactive until its predecessor gates and active cursor allow it.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Not applicable yet;\newline phase is a planned Tool V1.04 implementation-scaling subphase. Lean-data timestamp remains unchanged.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After closure, update linked objects, generated exports/\allowbreak{}PDF, and advance exactly one active cursor.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Render small producer-consumer/\allowbreak{}provenance neighborhoods around the active phase and active CNNA objects rather than dumping the full object/\allowbreak{}declaration graph into the PDF. Depth 1-2 graph slices only in PDF;\newline full graph exported as DOT/\allowbreak{}JSON for optional audit.\\
