Dependency-depth audit & Do not begin until the consumption map and public API contract are closed. A single-constructor inductive can still be a proof bridge;\newline classification, not constructor count alone, decides.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Create Legacy/\allowbreak{}StatusGates.lean;\newline move or reexport status declarations;\newline update legacy imports only;\newline do not expose this module to Phase 3+.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Move/\allowbreak{}reexport only classified legacy gates;\newline preserve compatibility;\newline do not delete;\newline keep Phase 3+ firewall intact.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Required before implementation: wrapper-first incremental migration;\newline bounded declaration batches;\newline preserve compatibility aliases;\newline no legacy status deletion;\newline require local full-build evidence after delivered package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & To fill before code: declarations\_migrated\_count;\newline single-constructor status gates moved;\newline aliases retained;\newline imports changed;\newline consumer modules updated;\newline BuildAll impact;\newline local build evidence source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & No new mathlib imports expected. If any appear, stop and justify against Lean 4.28.0 baseline or open a separate gate.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Phase 3+ must not import Legacy.StatusGates;\newline quarantine module is legacy-only with no public-final consumer path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & rfl/\allowbreak{}exact for definitional aliases;\newline no broad simplification.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected;\newline prefer existing CNNA imports. Verify any new import against mathlib 4.28.0 before use.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object is introduced unless the phase explicitly touches O00;\newline preserve existing computability boundaries.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge expected;\newline missing names/\allowbreak{}imports must be localized to the natural source/\allowbreak{}split layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to the earliest natural split bucket: inventory, Legacy.StatusGates, CoreSymbols, Legacy.PhaseAliases, or import firewall.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & No completed implementation record yet. This phase has a prepared scratch-pad entry but must not be marked green until implementation/\allowbreak{}build evidence exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Preparation-only evidence from the YAML master and static audit;\newline no Lean build evidence has been recorded for this phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation/\allowbreak{}build evidence: update modified/\allowbreak{}added modules, regenerated module inventory, linked objects, phase status, and exactly one next active cursor.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Use this record to constrain the next implementation pass. Do not broaden the phase during implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item 1.1.1.1 consumption map\item 1.1.1.3 public API contract\item LEG1 Legacy single-constructor status/\allowbreak{}policy gates\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Legacy.StatusGates quarantine bucket\item legacy-policy single-constructor inductive bucket where applicable\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\item do not delete legacy status enums during quarantine\item do not let Phase 3+ import Legacy.StatusGates\item do not treat old TeX/\allowbreak{}PDF files as maintained roadmap sources\item do not classify by name pattern alone\item do not quarantine proof-bridge or blue-correction declarations\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & No proof tactics expected beyond exact/\allowbreak{}rfl for any final import wrappers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected;\newline prefer existing CNNA imports. Verify any new import against mathlib 4.28.0 before use.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object is introduced unless the phase explicitly touches O00;\newline preserve existing computability boundaries.\\

Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge expected;\newline missing names/\allowbreak{}imports must be localized to the natural source/\allowbreak{}split layer.\\

Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to the earliest natural split bucket: inventory, Legacy.StatusGates, CoreSymbols, Legacy.PhaseAliases, or import firewall.\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation/\allowbreak{}build evidence: update modified/\allowbreak{}added modules, regenerated module inventory, linked objects, phase status, and exactly one next active cursor.\\

Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\item do not delete legacy status enums during quarantine\item do not let Phase 3+ import Legacy.StatusGates\item do not treat old TeX/\allowbreak{}PDF files as maintained roadmap sources\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Source-to-CNNA mapping & O00 dossier gets exact capability matrix and limitations.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & V1.19 status policy: locked red until a release proof references the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and turns this phase yellow or orange. Scalar architecture decisions must precede code implementation. Exact quadratic or CD scalar routes may not feed earlier generator definitions.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & split out because ExecComplex limits affect Phase 1.2, 4, 5, 7, 8 and CD bridges differently.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & First prove/\allowbreak{}release the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and record the pre-implementation check;\newline only then may this phase become yellow or orange. Keep current QxQ path first;\newline add exact quadratic pilot only if needed by finite tests and no duplicate module exists;\newline keep analytic Complex mirror-only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & pending Phase 1.1.1.1.1\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & scalar-foundation /\allowbreak{} bridge governance, not generator semantics\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & must check existing ExecComplex, ExecComplexBridge, Schur.CharpolyC, ArithmeticCDBridge, and mathlib QuadraticAlgebra before proposing new module\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & scalar layer must consume canonical generator outputs only;\newline cannot define generator semantics\\

Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & 4.28.0 baseline unless version gate explicitly opens upgrade\\

Consumer-contract direction & scalar layer consumes generator/\allowbreak{}arithmetic source data;\newline generator definitions do not consume scalar comparison/\allowbreak{}mirror data\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & General C/\allowbreak{}R and algebraic closure remain mirror/\allowbreak{}formal. Exact quadratic candidate must avoid noncomputable definitions on operational path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Bridge gap status & O09 candidate remains open.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If exact quadratic data are needed, backjump to scalar-foundation layer rather than patching arithmetic/\allowbreak{}lattice consumers.\\

\phantomsection

Record change version & \\

Implementation status & planned-not-active\\

Preparation status & planned-prepared\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & refactor\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Neutralize regular substrate profile\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Phase-bound preparation from the single YAML master. Collect only source material needed by this phase;\newline register later-phase material as future/\allowbreak{}missing-source rather than placing it here.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Phase 1.2.3 establishes or neutralizes: substrate: regular branching. Object links are generated from the object register.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on 1.2.2;\newline regular branching substrate modules. This record exists so the phase can be prepared without reopening Phase 1.1.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Prepared as its own subphase because it has a distinct source/\allowbreak{}proof kind or generation layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Implement only after dependencies close. Target: CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Foundation/\allowbreak{}Substrate/\allowbreak{}Regular.lean.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Separate regular branching data from variable branching data;\newline no geometric angle/\allowbreak{}lattice assumption enters here.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Prefer exact, rfl, constructor, field projection, small calc blocks, and explicit theorem forwarding. Avoid high-arity index eliminators and broad simp/\allowbreak{}simpa surfaces.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected;\newline prefer existing CNNA imports. Verify any new import against mathlib 4.28.0 before use.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object is introduced unless the phase explicitly touches O00;\newline preserve existing computability boundaries.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge expected;\newline missing names/\allowbreak{}imports must be localized to the natural source/\allowbreak{}split layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to the earliest natural split bucket: inventory, Legacy.StatusGates, CoreSymbols, Legacy.PhaseAliases, or import firewall.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & No completed implementation record yet. This phase has a prepared scratch-pad entry but must not be marked green until implementation/\allowbreak{}build evidence exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Preparation-only evidence from the YAML master and static audit;\newline no Lean build evidence has been recorded for this phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation/\allowbreak{}build evidence: update modified/\allowbreak{}added modules, regenerated module inventory, linked objects, phase status, and exactly one next active cursor.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Use this record to constrain the next implementation pass. Do not broaden the phase during implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Foundation/\allowbreak{}ConcreteSubstrate.lean;\newline Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}BoundarySource/\allowbreak{}BranchAddressSubstrate.lean;\newline BoundaryStateSubstrate.lean\item v22 corrected Phase-1 dependency hierarchy\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item substrate: regular branching\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\item do not delete legacy status enums during quarantine\item do not let Phase 3+ import Legacy.StatusGates\item do not treat old TeX/\allowbreak{}PDF files as maintained roadmap sources\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Expose carrier, Fintype/\allowbreak{}DecidableEq/\allowbreak{}cardinality/\allowbreak{}equivalence data explicitly;\newline avoid high-arity index eliminators.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Prefer exact, rfl, constructor, field projection, small calc blocks, and explicit theorem forwarding. Avoid high-arity index eliminators and broad simp/\allowbreak{}simpa surfaces.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected;\newline prefer existing CNNA imports. Verify any new import against mathlib 4.28.0 before use.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object is introduced unless the phase explicitly touches O00;\newline preserve existing computability boundaries.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Partition is a source layer for Schur/\allowbreak{}DtN, not a consumer-side convention.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Prefer exact, rfl, constructor, field projection, small calc blocks, and explicit theorem forwarding. Avoid high-arity index eliminators and broad simp/\allowbreak{}simpa surfaces.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected;\newline prefer existing CNNA imports. Verify any new import against mathlib 4.28.0 before use.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object is introduced unless the phase explicitly touches O00;\newline preserve existing computability boundaries.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge expected;\newline missing names/\allowbreak{}imports must be localized to the natural source/\allowbreak{}split layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to the earliest natural split bucket: inventory, Legacy.StatusGates, CoreSymbols, Legacy.PhaseAliases, or import firewall.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & No completed implementation record yet. This phase has a prepared scratch-pad entry but must not be marked green until implementation/\allowbreak{}build evidence exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Preparation-only evidence from the YAML master and static audit;\newline no Lean build evidence has been recorded for this phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation/\allowbreak{}build evidence: update modified/\allowbreak{}added modules, regenerated module inventory, linked objects, phase status, and exactly one next active cursor.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Use this record to constrain the next implementation pass. Do not broaden the phase during implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}Smoke/\allowbreak{}GeneratedBoundaryInteriorPartition.lean;\newline CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Finite/\allowbreak{}CutSpec.lean;\newline CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Finite/\allowbreak{}BoundaryPorts.lean\item v22 corrected Phase-1 dependency hierarchy\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Boundary /\allowbreak{} interface /\allowbreak{} interior partition\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\item do not delete legacy status enums during quarantine\item do not let Phase 3+ import Legacy.StatusGates\item do not treat old TeX/\allowbreak{}PDF files as maintained roadmap sources\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Object links are generated from the object register. Horn/\allowbreak{}GA profiles are routed through GA0-GA6 comparison objects only, with no generator or handoff rights.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on 1.1.5;\newline current Cayley-Dickson structural modules;\newline preliminary object IDs CD0-CD7. This record exists so the phase can be prepared without reopening Phase 1.1.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Prepared as its own subphase because it has a distinct source/\allowbreak{}proof kind or generation layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Implement only after dependencies close. Target: CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Structural/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}*.lean.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & CD remains an A-internal structural consumer/\allowbreak{}bridge;\newline no unproved identification of R/\allowbreak{}C/\allowbreak{}H/\allowbreak{}O with arithmetic sectors. V1.25 adds Horn/\allowbreak{}GA material only as downstream target-gate/\allowbreak{}scratchpad context;\newline it cannot be used as a source object or release proof.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Prefer exact, rfl, constructor, field projection, small calc blocks, and explicit theorem forwarding. Avoid high-arity index eliminators and broad simp/\allowbreak{}simpa surfaces.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected;\newline prefer existing CNNA imports. Verify any new import against mathlib 4.28.0 before use.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object is introduced unless the phase explicitly touches O00;\newline preserve existing computability boundaries.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge expected;\newline missing names/\allowbreak{}imports must be localized to the natural source/\allowbreak{}split layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to the earliest natural split bucket: inventory, Legacy.StatusGates, CoreSymbols, Legacy.PhaseAliases, or import firewall.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & No completed implementation record yet. This phase has a prepared scratch-pad entry but must not be marked green until implementation/\allowbreak{}build evidence exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Preparation-only evidence from the YAML master and static audit;\newline no Lean build evidence has been recorded for this phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation/\allowbreak{}build evidence: update modified/\allowbreak{}added modules, regenerated module inventory, linked objects, phase status, and exactly one next active cursor.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Use this record to constrain the next implementation pass. Do not broaden the phase during implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Structural/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}*.lean;\newline Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}*.lean;\newline Handoff/\allowbreak{}CayleyDicksonAdapter.lean\item v22 corrected Phase-1 dependency hierarchy\item Horn 0709.2238v1 quaternion/\allowbreak{}geometric-algebra reference-gate intake (V1.25;\newline comparison-only)\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item CD source;\newline star;\newline normSq;\newline product;\newline alternative/\allowbreak{}norm laws;\newline HurwitzStop\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\item do not delete legacy status enums during quarantine\item do not let Phase 3+ import Legacy.StatusGates\item do not treat old TeX/\allowbreak{}PDF files as maintained roadmap sources\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Preparation workflow & Phase-bound preparation from the single YAML master. Collect only source material needed by this phase;\newline register later-phase material as future/\allowbreak{}missing-source rather than placing it here.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Phase 1.4.3 establishes or neutralizes: Cayley-Dickson star/\allowbreak{}conjugation. Object links are generated from the object register.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on 1.4.1-1.4.2. This record exists so the phase can be prepared without reopening Phase 1.1.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Prepared as its own subphase because it has a distinct source/\allowbreak{}proof kind or generation layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Implement only after dependencies close. Target: CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Structural/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}Star.lean.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Star/\allowbreak{}conjugation proof is forwarded structurally;\newline no arithmetic identification is introduced.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Prefer exact, rfl, constructor, field projection, small calc blocks, and explicit theorem forwarding. Avoid high-arity index eliminators and broad simp/\allowbreak{}simpa surfaces.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected;\newline prefer existing CNNA imports. Verify any new import against mathlib 4.28.0 before use.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object is introduced unless the phase explicitly touches O00;\newline preserve existing computability boundaries.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge expected;\newline missing names/\allowbreak{}imports must be localized to the natural source/\allowbreak{}split layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to the earliest natural split bucket: inventory, Legacy.StatusGates, CoreSymbols, Legacy.PhaseAliases, or import firewall.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & No completed implementation record yet. This phase has a prepared scratch-pad entry but must not be marked green until implementation/\allowbreak{}build evidence exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Preparation-only evidence from the YAML master and static audit;\newline no Lean build evidence has been recorded for this phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation/\allowbreak{}build evidence: update modified/\allowbreak{}added modules, regenerated module inventory, linked objects, phase status, and exactly one next active cursor.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Use this record to constrain the next implementation pass. Do not broaden the phase during implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Structural/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}S6CanonicalStar.lean\item v22 corrected Phase-1 dependency hierarchy\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Cayley-Dickson star/\allowbreak{}conjugation\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\item do not delete legacy status enums during quarantine\item do not let Phase 3+ import Legacy.StatusGates\item do not treat old TeX/\allowbreak{}PDF files as maintained roadmap sources\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Forward the certificate only if the exact product/\allowbreak{}star/\allowbreak{}norm provenance is visible.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Prefer exact, rfl, constructor, field projection, small calc blocks, and explicit theorem forwarding. Avoid high-arity index eliminators and broad simp/\allowbreak{}simpa surfaces.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & No new mathlib imports expected;\newline prefer existing CNNA imports. Verify any new import against mathlib 4.28.0 before use.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object is introduced unless the phase explicitly touches O00;\newline preserve existing computability boundaries.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge expected;\newline missing names/\allowbreak{}imports must be localized to the natural source/\allowbreak{}split layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to the earliest natural split bucket: inventory, Legacy.StatusGates, CoreSymbols, Legacy.PhaseAliases, or import firewall.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\

Post-implementation plan check & After implementation/\allowbreak{}build evidence: update modified/\allowbreak{}added modules, regenerated module inventory, linked objects, phase status, and exactly one next active cursor.\\

Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\item do not delete legacy status enums during quarantine\item do not let Phase 3+ import Legacy.StatusGates\item do not treat old TeX/\allowbreak{}PDF files as maintained roadmap sources\end{itemize}\\

\end{longtable}

Preparation workflow & External-source intake as comparison/\allowbreak{}reference gate with derived-only boundary.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Maps external quaternion/\allowbreak{}GA facts to target-gate rows GA0-GA3. The mapping is explicitly comparison-only and cannot choose CNNA algebra, orientation or scalar layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on CD neutral reintegration 1.4.1-1.4.8 and later CD-derived structure;\newline does not depend on or unlock active pre-code phase 1.1.1.1.5.1.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Split into narrow comparison gates so CD, Pillar-B boundary algebra, Dirac/\allowbreak{}STA and side-comparison targets do not collapse into one ambiguous external-theory phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Do not implement proof code yet. Keep target invariants in scratchpad;\newline when predecessor data is closed, add a small neutral comparison API and prove/\allowbreak{}falsify explicitly.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean modules in V1.25. Future optional modules must be neutral ReferenceGates/\allowbreak{}ComparisonGate modules, not phase-named public APIs.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Natural placement is comparison/\allowbreak{}reference-gate layer, not a foundational CNNA derivation layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuses existing CD, Pillar-B and side-comparison umbrella phases;\newline new rows are target-gate refinements, not duplicate derivation phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & The only generator remains the CNNA Lean/\allowbreak{}provenance chain. External theory may only define target profiles for later comparison.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep future comparison APIs small and isolated;\newline no broad GA framework should be introduced before a concrete CNNA-derived comparison need exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & No Lean refactor in V1.25. Future module changes require import graph check, consumer discipline audit and full local Lean build evidence.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No Lean migration. Future comparison module metrics: declarations added, imports added, consumer count, and target/\allowbreak{}equality proofs closed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline remains pinned Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot;\newline live documentation is only a source-discovery hint until verified locally against the pin.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Do not replace ExecComplex or CNNA scalar provenance with external complex quaternions or analytic Complex.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Comparison consumers may read CNNA-derived outputs;\newline CNNA derivation phases may not consume the comparison profile as a generator.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Added overhead is justified because sign, unit and semantic ambiguities are high-risk;\newline gates are narrow to avoid broad external-theory creep.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & When CD0-CD7 are closed, instantiate a small comparison profile and check target identities against CD-derived operations. Failure becomes a documented non-match or natural-origin backjump, not a patch.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Future Lean work should use explicit structures, field/\allowbreak{}projection equalities, constructor-based proofs, local case splits and finite matrix entry proofs;\newline avoid broad simp/\allowbreak{}simpa collapse and opaque native\_decide goals.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Reference candidates only: Mathlib.Algebra.Quaternion, Mathlib.Analysis.Quaternion, Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.CliffordAlgebra.Basic. Verify against the pinned Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot before any implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced. If finite numeric checks are later needed, keep them mirror/\allowbreak{}diagnostic unless an exact CNNA-derived computable path is proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Concrete traversal currently consists of source equation/\allowbreak{}profile extraction and target-object registration;\newline no CNNA runtime traversal yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Reference skeleton only. It must not be presented as computable CNNA evidence until future exact instances are constructed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & For V1.25: generated TSV/\allowbreak{}TEX/\allowbreak{}PDF artifacts. Future Lean witness: explicit comparison structure instantiated from CNNA-derived objects.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Current web docs indicate available Quaternion and CliffordAlgebra APIs, but the project pin is Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0;\newline implementation must recheck exact names and theorem availability.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No noncomputable Lean code introduced. Future use of analytic/\allowbreak{}normed quaternion APIs must be isolated from operational paths unless explicitly allowed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib Clifford/\allowbreak{}Quaternion APIs pull noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, keep them in mirror/\allowbreak{}comparison modules or define a minimal finite target profile instead.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Bridge intentionally open. The external reference describes target shapes;\newline CNNA must derive any matching structure internally before comparison.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If the comparison needs missing structure, patch only the earliest natural CNNA layer where that structure is generated, not the comparison/\allowbreak{}consumer phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Future implementation prompt must state comparison-only status, predecessor objects, no new generator axioms, no external-theory imports unless pinned and isolated, and exact target equalities/\allowbreak{}failures.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & All global no-go guardrails apply, especially derived-only, positive-path-first, patch-at-natural-origin and reference-theory-as-target-only rules.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planned reference/\allowbreak{}target-gate integration only. V1.25 records source reading, object links, proof-dossier placeholders and scratchpad material;\newline no Lean code is implemented.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & YAML generator validation and generated table/\allowbreak{}PDF outputs after V1.25 update. No Lean build evidence because no Lean source changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Positive path: wait for the natural CNNA predecessor objects, then encode the smallest comparison profile and prove target equality/\allowbreak{}failure from CNNA data only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only after YAML update.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After any future comparison implementation, record whether the target matched, failed, or required a natural-origin backjump;\newline do not smooth failure into a weakened claim.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Package YAML, generated tables, generated PDF and report. Do not package external PDFs as generated project truth unless they are user-uploaded source material.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & External theory is recorded only as comparison material. It may suggest target invariants, sign audits and future checks, but cannot release phases or provide CNNA generators.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Horn 0709.2238v1 uploaded PDF\item mathlib Quaternion documentation\item mathlib CliffordAlgebra.Basic documentation\item Wieser/\allowbreak{}Song Lean GA formalization article\item Hestenes unified-language reference\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Hamilton unit identities\item Pauli/\allowbreak{}Cartan representation sign choices\item geometric algebra grade basis\item pseudoscalar duality\item pure quaternion as bivector\item biquaternion eight-basis profile\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Added modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}archive/\allowbreak{}reports/\allowbreak{}V1\_25\_HORN\_QUATERNION\_GEOMETRIC\_ALGEBRA\_REFERENCE\_GATE\_REPORT.md\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no external GA/\allowbreak{}quaternion theorem used as CNNA source\item no phase release from uploaded/\allowbreak{}reference paper\item no Pauli/\allowbreak{}Clifford/\allowbreak{}Dirac object imported into Pillar A or B as generator\item no free complex scalar layer introduced from biquaternions\item no Lean import added before natural predecessor closure and version-pinned check\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: all global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply.\item GNG37: quaternion/\allowbreak{}GA references are comparison-only and have no generator or handoff rights.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed added modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}archive/\allowbreak{}reports/\allowbreak{}V1\_25\_HORN\_QUATERNION\_GEOMETRIC\_ALGEBRA\_REFERENCE\_GATE\_REPORT.md\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Structural/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}*.lean\item Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}*.lean\item PillarB placeholder modules\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_full\_document.py\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item none identified\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Comparison consumers may read CNNA-derived outputs;\newline CNNA derivation phases may not consume the comparison profile as a generator.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Added overhead is justified because sign, unit and semantic ambiguities are high-risk;\newline gates are narrow to avoid broad external-theory creep.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Future proof should start from a CNNA-derived pseudoscalar/\allowbreak{}volume candidate, then check square, commutation and dual-pairing identities. For biquaternions, compare only after CD9 noncircularity is settled.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Future Lean work should use explicit structures, field/\allowbreak{}projection equalities, constructor-based proofs, local case splits and finite matrix entry proofs;\newline avoid broad simp/\allowbreak{}simpa collapse and opaque native\_decide goals.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Reference candidates only: Mathlib.Algebra.Quaternion, Mathlib.Analysis.Quaternion, Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.CliffordAlgebra.Basic. Verify against the pinned Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot before any implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced. If finite numeric checks are later needed, keep them mirror/\allowbreak{}diagnostic unless an exact CNNA-derived computable path is proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Concrete traversal currently consists of source equation/\allowbreak{}profile extraction and target-object registration;\newline no CNNA runtime traversal yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Reference skeleton only. It must not be presented as computable CNNA evidence until future exact instances are constructed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & For V1.25: generated TSV/\allowbreak{}TEX/\allowbreak{}PDF artifacts. Future Lean witness: explicit comparison structure instantiated from CNNA-derived objects.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Current web docs indicate available Quaternion and CliffordAlgebra APIs, but the project pin is Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0;\newline implementation must recheck exact names and theorem availability.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No noncomputable Lean code introduced. Future use of analytic/\allowbreak{}normed quaternion APIs must be isolated from operational paths unless explicitly allowed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib Clifford/\allowbreak{}Quaternion APIs pull noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, keep them in mirror/\allowbreak{}comparison modules or define a minimal finite target profile instead.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Bridge intentionally open. The external reference describes target shapes;\newline CNNA must derive any matching structure internally before comparison.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If the comparison needs missing structure, patch only the earliest natural CNNA layer where that structure is generated, not the comparison/\allowbreak{}consumer phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Future implementation prompt must state comparison-only status, predecessor objects, no new generator axioms, no external-theory imports unless pinned and isolated, and exact target equalities/\allowbreak{}failures.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & All global no-go guardrails apply, especially derived-only, positive-path-first, patch-at-natural-origin and reference-theory-as-target-only rules.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planned reference/\allowbreak{}target-gate integration only. V1.25 records source reading, object links, proof-dossier placeholders and scratchpad material;\newline no Lean code is implemented.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & YAML generator validation and generated table/\allowbreak{}PDF outputs after V1.25 update. No Lean build evidence because no Lean source changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Positive path: wait for the natural CNNA predecessor objects, then encode the smallest comparison profile and prove target equality/\allowbreak{}failure from CNNA data only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only after YAML update.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After any future comparison implementation, record whether the target matched, failed, or required a natural-origin backjump;\newline do not smooth failure into a weakened claim.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Package YAML, generated tables, generated PDF and report. Do not package external PDFs as generated project truth unless they are user-uploaded source material.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & External theory is recorded only as comparison material. It may suggest target invariants, sign audits and future checks, but cannot release phases or provide CNNA generators.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Horn duality and complex-quaternion sections\item mathlib CliffordAlgebra.Basic documentation\item Hestenes/\allowbreak{}Sobczyk GA references\item Wieser/\allowbreak{}Song Lean GA formalization\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item I = sigma\_x sigma\_y sigma\_z target\item I\textasciicircum{}2=-1 target\item vector-bivector duality target\item scalar/\allowbreak{}vector/\allowbreak{}bivector/\allowbreak{}pseudoscalar eight-basis bookkeeping\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Added modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}archive/\allowbreak{}reports/\allowbreak{}V1\_25\_HORN\_QUATERNION\_GEOMETRIC\_ALGEBRA\_REFERENCE\_GATE\_REPORT.md\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no external GA/\allowbreak{}quaternion theorem used as CNNA source\item no phase release from uploaded/\allowbreak{}reference paper\item no Pauli/\allowbreak{}Clifford/\allowbreak{}Dirac object imported into Pillar A or B as generator\item no free complex scalar layer introduced from biquaternions\item no Lean import added before natural predecessor closure and version-pinned check\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: all global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply.\item GNG37: quaternion/\allowbreak{}GA references are comparison-only and have no generator or handoff rights.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed added modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}archive/\allowbreak{}reports/\allowbreak{}V1\_25\_HORN\_QUATERNION\_GEOMETRIC\_ALGEBRA\_REFERENCE\_GATE\_REPORT.md\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Structural/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}*.lean\item Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}*.lean\item PillarB placeholder modules\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_full\_document.py\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item none identified\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Phase type & derivation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & Refactor/\allowbreak{}derivation-preparation phase: record module/\allowbreak{}declaration migration metrics, import delta, consumer audit, and concrete route witness before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Thread-recursion arithmetic-shadow audit before operational arithmetic wrappers\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Planned phase. Use source-preparation workflow before implementation: attach reliable sources, extract established objects, audit dependencies, split if necessary, and fill proof rehearsal before changing Lean code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Not prepared yet;\newline when activated, map only code-backed route facts and mark analogies comparison-only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & V1.19 status policy: locked red until a release proof references the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and turns this phase yellow or orange. Pending. Must include route-dependency audit and module placement check before activation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & First prove/\allowbreak{}release the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and record the pre-implementation check;\newline only then may this phase become yellow or orange. Trace scalar recurrence provenance before interpreting arithmetic outputs. Keep D=-3/\allowbreak{}-4/\allowbreak{}CM claims on operational discriminant/\allowbreak{}number-theory route, not on analogy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & Candidate: CNNA/\allowbreak{}PillarA/\allowbreak{}Operational/\allowbreak{}ThreadRecursionAudit.lean after checking if existing Schur modules can host the audit compactly.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Route direction must be explicit before implementation: thread/\allowbreak{}full profiles feed Schur/\allowbreak{}arithmetic audits;\newline analogy/\allowbreak{}diagnostics never feed generator code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & No implementation rehearsal authorized while red. Required rehearsal starts with prerequisite-object proof references and a release check. Follow recurrenceLedger.recursiveSource fields to boundaryMatrixAt or generated source;\newline prove route classification before arithmetic promotion. Concrete witness required for a finite level/\allowbreak{}history.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\

Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\

Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & When activated, first check dependency depth and split into subphases if the target consumes too many objects or proof layers.\\

ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & Operational outputs must remain executable and project back to allowed invariants.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & required later: QxQ baseline row, Q(i) row, Q(sqrt(-3)) row, and at least one generic D row if O09 is implemented\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & must be shown by concrete row witnesses\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & finite row with rational ExecComplex output plus optional exact quadratic coordinate and rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant projection\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Record Complex/\allowbreak{}Real noncomputable boundary, QuadraticAlgebra instance diamond warning, NumberField formal/\allowbreak{}non-executable dependency, and any required version-gate.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & General C/\allowbreak{}R and algebraic closure remain mirror/\allowbreak{}formal. Exact quadratic candidate must avoid noncomputable definitions on operational path. Exact quadratic use must avoid analytic sqrt/\allowbreak{}Complex and cite D-source ledger.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Use project-owned explicit Q-coordinate structure or narrowly wrapped QuadraticAlgebra;\newline isolate formal mathlib NumberField in mirror/\allowbreak{}proof layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & O09/\allowbreak{}BR13 open.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If exact quadratic data are needed, backjump to scalar-foundation layer rather than patching arithmetic/\allowbreak{}lattice consumers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Before Lean code, module manifest must state exact module placement, imported mathlib modules, and why no existing module owns the semantics.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Not implemented.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Generated-table validation pending/\allowbreak{}run after patch;\newline no Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Run generic rows first;\newline sentinel rows second;\newline compare QxQ-only closure with O09 exact quadratic closure.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build executed or claimed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Check whether the scalar architecture lock prevented analytic/\allowbreak{}noncomputable leakage or duplicate scalar implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return complete zip;\newline Lean build local unless actually executed here.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Future finite tests deciding whether quadratic coordinates are operationally required or only comparison columns.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item O07/\allowbreak{}O08, O09, BR12.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Phase type & derivation\\
