Phase-type-specific contract & Derivation phase: record source objects, definitions, proof target, positive construction path, expected tactics, mathlib imports, concrete computable instance traversal if operational.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Unit group of the quadratic order\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Planned phase. Use source-preparation workflow before implementation: attach reliable sources, extract established objects, audit dependencies, split if necessary, and fill proof rehearsal before changing Lean code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Object placement follows the corrected v37 path split;\newline phase titles and object groups must match the actual mathematical source dependencies.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & V1.19 status policy: locked red until a release proof references the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and turns this phase yellow or orange. v37 repaired Phase 5-10 dependencies: Path A number-theory/\allowbreak{}geometric/\allowbreak{}modular/\allowbreak{}analytic and Path B spectral/\allowbreak{}physical/\allowbreak{}transfer are parallel after Phase 4 unless a specific object bridge says otherwise.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & First prove/\allowbreak{}release the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and record the pre-implementation check;\newline only then may this phase become yellow or orange. Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Use minimal source objects: Path B consumes Phase 4.1 directly;\newline Path A consumes D/\allowbreak{}order/\allowbreak{}lattice/\allowbreak{}modular prerequisites;\newline bridges are explicit and late.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & No implementation rehearsal authorized while red. Required rehearsal starts with prerequisite-object proof references and a release check. Pending. Must be written before implementation starts.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Pending. Any missing bridge must create or activate the earlier natural source phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & No implementation record. The phase is a planning row only and must remain untouched until it becomes the unique active frontier.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Not applicable yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation, verify imports and objects stayed within the v37 path split.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & When activated, first check dependency depth and split into subphases if the target consumes too many objects or proof layers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Global no-go inherited;\newline additionally no artificial modular-form/\allowbreak{}j dependency for finite spectral/\allowbreak{}physical consumers and no phase-title/\allowbreak{}object mismatch.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Phase split decision & split from v33 O07 because generic-vs-sentinel is not enough;\newline regime typing is a separate semantic axis.\\

First run generic finite rows;\newline then annotate rows by derived regime;\newline then interpret Eisenstein/\allowbreak{}Gauss as noOuter-root sentinels and all other Heegner/\allowbreak{}CM rows as projections/\allowbreak{}comparison until proven otherwise.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & pending Phase 1.1.1.1.1\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & test/\allowbreak{}schema layer, not generator layer\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & must reuse O07/\allowbreak{}canonical smoke-test generator;\newline no parallel Heegner test generator\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & consume the one canonical generator only\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & do not create a new module unless existing test/\allowbreak{}profile module cannot own the semantics\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & no code movement in this gate;\newline future test implementation must preserve full local build green status\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & not applicable at planning gate\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & 4.28.0 baseline unless version gate explicitly opens upgrade\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & EXEC-2 enforced\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Use minimal source objects: Path B consumes Phase 4.1 directly;\newline Path A consumes D/\allowbreak{}order/\allowbreak{}lattice/\allowbreak{}modular prerequisites;\newline bridges are explicit and late.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & review after Phase 1.1.2 whether this lock prevented false closed-system classification.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & No implementation rehearsal authorized while red. Required rehearsal starts with prerequisite-object proof references and a release check. Prove/\allowbreak{}record row provenance: generator output -> finite witness -> regime tag -> optional comparison target. A row may not change the regime tag based on h(D), j, or external Heegner membership.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & structural constructors/\allowbreak{}projections;\newline explicit row records;\newline no fragile rewrites;\newline no inverse oracle.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & none at planning gate;\newline future number-theory phases may require mathlib version review.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & Operational fields remain finite/\allowbreak{}rational/\allowbreak{}integer. tau, sqrt(D), analytic j and general CM fields stay mirror-only under EXEC-2.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & required later: every row must contain actual finite generator traversal evidence or remain unclosed\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & schema lock only now;\newline future rows must provide executable witnesses\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & finite row witness with branch mode, L\_max, regime tag, rational/\allowbreak{}integer outputs, optional comparison target\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & record any class number/\allowbreak{}CM/\allowbreak{}j mathlib dependency or noncomputable boundary explicitly\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & Heegner/\allowbreak{}class-number and analytic j data are comparison/\allowbreak{}mirror until operational invariant is derived\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & use a mirror layer or later version-policy gate if mathlib forces noncomputable definitions\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & open until noOuter/\allowbreak{}HasOuter regime split and O07 implementation exist\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & if a row needs regime data not yet produced, backjump to regime/\allowbreak{}source layer rather than patching the test consumer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Before Lean code, module manifest must state exact module placement and prove no duplicate generator/\allowbreak{}test harness.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Future number-theory/\allowbreak{}regime consumer phase: h(D)=1 is not closed/\allowbreak{}noOuter evidence;\newline classify after class-number and regime data exist.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & YAML/\allowbreak{}planning-level validation and generated views only;\newline no Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & planning-level dependency/\allowbreak{}order lock;\newline implementation proof obligations deferred to target phase\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build executed or claimed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation, verify imports and objects stayed within the v37 path split.\\

Phase-type-specific contract & Derivation phase: record source objects, definitions, proof target, positive construction path, expected tactics, mathlib imports, concrete computable instance traversal if operational.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Modular forms, CM j-invariant targets, and heuristic lattice test matrix\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Planned phase. Use source-preparation workflow before implementation: attach reliable sources, extract established objects, audit dependencies, split if necessary, and fill proof rehearsal before changing Lean code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Object placement follows the corrected v37 path split;\newline phase titles and object groups must match the actual mathematical source dependencies.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & V1.19 status policy: locked red until a release proof references the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and turns this phase yellow or orange. v37 repaired Phase 5-10 dependencies: Path A number-theory/\allowbreak{}geometric/\allowbreak{}modular/\allowbreak{}analytic and Path B spectral/\allowbreak{}physical/\allowbreak{}transfer are parallel after Phase 4 unless a specific object bridge says otherwise.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & First prove/\allowbreak{}release the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and record the pre-implementation check;\newline only then may this phase become yellow or orange. Not prepared yet.\\

Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & EXEC-2 likely relevant: algebraic irrational geometry/\allowbreak{}spectral/\allowbreak{}modular values are mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved for operational return.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Use minimal source objects: Path B consumes Phase 4.1 directly;\newline Path A consumes D/\allowbreak{}order/\allowbreak{}lattice/\allowbreak{}modular prerequisites;\newline bridges are explicit and late.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & No implementation rehearsal authorized while red. Required rehearsal starts with prerequisite-object proof references and a release check. Pending. Must be written before implementation starts.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & When activated, first check dependency depth and split into subphases if the target consumes too many objects or proof layers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Global no-go inherited;\newline additionally no artificial modular-form/\allowbreak{}j dependency for finite spectral/\allowbreak{}physical consumers and no phase-title/\allowbreak{}object mismatch.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Use separate path modules;\newline do not import modular APIs into finite physical consumers for convenience.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Open bridge objects remain late and cannot force early path sequentialization.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If a consumer needs a source from another path, add an explicit bridge dependency rather than moving the whole phase behind that path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Before implementing any phase, module manifest must state exact source phase IDs and must not inherit unrelated predecessor chains.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Governance-overhead review & This gate prevents a likely false implementation path: injecting angle heuristics into the generator rather than testing them as comparison targets.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & No implementation rehearsal authorized while red. Required rehearsal starts with prerequisite-object proof references and a release check. Pending until predecessor objects are available.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Structural constructors/\allowbreak{}projections, explicit finite-index calculations, and finite relation witnesses;\newline no fragile rewrite chain.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Use existing project imports first;\newline future CM/\allowbreak{}j mirror tests may require mathlib modular/\allowbreak{}complex APIs only in non-operational layers after import existence is checked.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & Operational path may record only rational/\allowbreak{}integer outputs: branching code value, finite addresses, collision relations, cos(theta), integer/\allowbreak{}rational Gram invariants, D target. Complex coordinates, tau, sqrt(D), and analytic j evaluation remain mirror/\allowbreak{}comparison.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Required at preparation: include b=2 static, L\_max values spanning 1-4, closure rows for 120/\allowbreak{}90 degree profiles, and at least one legal dynamic-branching case for 8.6.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Future test implementation must actually traverse finite addresses and compute expected finite invariants, not merely instantiate empty profile records.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & Finite test-matrix output rows, not just theorem stubs.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Record any noncomputable/\allowbreak{}j/\allowbreak{}tau/\allowbreak{}mathlib obstacle and isolate it outside operational path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & Mandatory before implementation closes.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Use rational/\allowbreak{}integer surrogates in operational layer;\newline isolate analytic or algebraic-irrational material in mirror/\allowbreak{}profile modules.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Open: source objects not yet closed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If tests require new generator semantics, backjump to the canonical generator layer;\newline do not patch the test module.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Before code: provide module manifest, reuse audit, concrete finite instances, and test matrix rows;\newline do not create duplicate generators.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planning record only. No Lean code has been changed in this phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & YAML/\allowbreak{}master validation and generated-view compilation;\newline no Lean build run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build executed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation, verify imports and objects stayed within the v37 path split.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return complete zip;\newline no Lean-build success may be claimed unless actually run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item post \#97 source note\item future closed generator/\allowbreak{}lattice/\allowbreak{}CM/\allowbreak{}j objects\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item test matrix rows\item finite branch/\allowbreak{}address witnesses\item angle/\allowbreak{}cosine profiles\item CM/\allowbreak{}j targets\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Global no-go inherited;\newline additionally no artificial modular-form/\allowbreak{}j dependency for finite spectral/\allowbreak{}physical consumers and no phase-title/\allowbreak{}object mismatch.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Use minimal source objects: Path B consumes Phase 4.1 directly;\newline Path A consumes D/\allowbreak{}order/\allowbreak{}lattice/\allowbreak{}modular prerequisites;\newline bridges are explicit and late.\\

Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\

Proof rehearsal before implementation & No implementation rehearsal authorized while red. Required rehearsal starts with prerequisite-object proof references and a release check. Pending. Must be written before implementation starts.\\

Expected tactics & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & When activated, first check dependency depth and split into subphases if the target consumes too many objects or proof layers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Global no-go inherited;\newline additionally no artificial modular-form/\allowbreak{}j dependency for finite spectral/\allowbreak{}physical consumers and no phase-title/\allowbreak{}object mismatch.\end{itemize}\\

\end{longtable}

Define horizontal Schur elimination and vertical Schur recursion as operations on this same matrix. State exact equality, commutation, or functorial factorization only after the domains/\allowbreak{}codomain indices match.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\subsection*{Phase 11 -- handoff bridges from canonical A-objects}
\label{impl:phase-11}
\par\smallskip\noindent\begin{minipage}{0.99\linewidth}\footnotesize\raggedright\textbf{Table legend.} \colorbox{green!18}{\strut G} = green/closed and derived-only; \colorbox{white}{\strut W} = white/non-direct-Lean tooling/refactor/infrastructure/documentation/comparison; \colorbox{orange!28}{\strut O} = orange/implementable after stated predecessor closure; \colorbox{yellow!25}{\strut Y} = yellow/active and implementable now; \colorbox{red!20}{\strut R} = red/locked Lean-derivation phase; release requires derived-only object/proof evidence. Context class is orthogonal to status.\end{minipage}\par\vspace{0.25em}
\begin{longtable}{L{0.16\linewidth} L{0.81\linewidth}}
\hline
\textbf{Field} & \textbf{Record}\\
\hline
Phase status & \cellcolor{red!20}R\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Context class & LeanDerivationPhase\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation tier & F0\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation depth requirement & Full dossier required before promotion or consumption: definition, natural provenance, exact source objects, proof target, proof sketch, verification/\allowbreak{}audit, consumer rights, and semantic uncertainty.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change version & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change timestamp & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation status & planned-not-active\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation status & red-locked-by-release-policy\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & derivation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & Derivation phase: record source objects, definitions, proof target, positive construction path, expected tactics, mathlib imports, concrete computable instance traversal if operational.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & handoff bridges from canonical A-objects\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Planned phase. Use source-preparation workflow before implementation: attach reliable sources, extract established objects, audit dependencies, split if necessary, and fill proof rehearsal before changing Lean code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & V1.19 status policy: locked red until a release proof references the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and turns this phase yellow or orange. Pending. Must be completed before this phase may become active.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & First prove/\allowbreak{}release the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and record the pre-implementation check;\newline only then may this phase become yellow or orange. Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & No implementation rehearsal authorized while red. Required rehearsal starts with prerequisite-object proof references and a release check. Pending. Must be written before implementation starts.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Pending. Any missing bridge must create or activate the earlier natural source phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & No implementation record. The phase is a planning row only and must remain untouched until it becomes the unique active frontier.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Not applicable yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Not available yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & When activated, first check dependency depth and split into subphases if the target consumes too many objects or proof layers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item j/\allowbreak{}q-expansion coefficient stream\item L-functions as indirect/\allowbreak{}derived via modular forms, not Riemann-zeta-first\item finite simple group taxonomy\item sporadic/\allowbreak{}Monster comparison\item Leech lattice/\allowbreak{}rootless lattice comparison\item Leech theta/\allowbreak{}shell coefficient comparison\item VOA/\allowbreak{}moonshine module comparison\item Hauptmodul/\allowbreak{}McKay-Thompson common-indicator bridge test\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Positive path plan & Do not start by falsifying or importing an established target. First derive CNNA data from A provenance;\newline then perform finite-prefix or theorem-level comparison against the registered external target.\\

Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\

Expected shape: define comparison records, prove coefficient/\allowbreak{}table equality for finite prefixes if computable, and isolate analytic/\allowbreak{}global equality as mirror theorem if needed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Use explicit records, finite list/\allowbreak{}vector comparisons, Nat/\allowbreak{}Int arithmetic certificates, and theorem forwarding. Avoid broad simplification or opaque imported classification assumptions.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & To be verified against mathlib 4.28.0 at activation time. Likely areas: algebra/\allowbreak{}group/\allowbreak{}basic finite groups for comparison tags, polynomials/\allowbreak{}series for q-prefixes, no large external theorem import in operational path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & Any comparison prefix must be computable data. Infinite series, analytic equality, VOA structures, and classification theorems remain mirror/\allowbreak{}comparison layers unless separately derived.\\

Source-to-CNNA mapping & Leech data are registered only as target fingerprints for later derived lattice/\allowbreak{}theta-like CNNA outputs.\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Keep as a planned comparison-only subphase;\newline split further when activated if formal objects require deep algebraic prerequisites.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Do not start by falsifying or importing an established target. First derive CNNA data from A provenance;\newline then perform finite-prefix or theorem-level comparison against the registered external target.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\

Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Pending until all predecessor CNNA objects are available. Expected shape: define comparison records, prove coefficient/\allowbreak{}table equality for finite prefixes if computable, and isolate analytic/\allowbreak{}global equality as mirror theorem if needed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Use explicit records, finite list/\allowbreak{}vector comparisons, Nat/\allowbreak{}Int arithmetic certificates, and theorem forwarding. Avoid broad simplification or opaque imported classification assumptions.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & To be verified against mathlib 4.28.0 at activation time. Likely areas: algebra/\allowbreak{}group/\allowbreak{}basic finite groups for comparison tags, polynomials/\allowbreak{}series for q-prefixes, no large external theorem import in operational path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & Any comparison prefix must be computable data. Infinite series, analytic equality, VOA structures, and classification theorems remain mirror/\allowbreak{}comparison layers unless separately derived.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No immediate Lean bridge required. Missing structures belong earlier: j/\allowbreak{}q-expansion, graded q-character, lattice/\allowbreak{}theta candidate, or B-derived algebraic consumer, depending on the subphase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If activation reveals missing data, backjump to the earliest natural generator: modular q-expansion for MOON0, graded-character source before MOON8, lattice/\allowbreak{}theta source before MOON5-6, or B algebra before MOON7.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\

Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Pending;\newline phase is not active. Source material was classified but no Lean proof is claimed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & To be specified when this phase becomes active. Positive path: derive CNNA-side stream/\allowbreak{}object first, then compare to external target;\newline never import target data as a generator.\\

Build result & not run\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Context class is orthogonal to status.\end{minipage}\par\vspace{0.25em}

\hline

Context class & LeanDerivationPhase\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation tier & F2\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change timestamp & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation status & planned\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation status & red-locked-by-release-policy\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & derivation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & Derivation phase: record source objects, definitions, proof target, positive construction path, expected tactics, mathlib imports, concrete computable instance traversal if operational.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Common-indicator /\allowbreak{} Hauptmodul bridge-test register\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Source-preparation workflow completed at roadmap level only: extract thread objects, classify as derived target vs comparison-only, map to phase/\allowbreak{}object IDs, and keep formal proof rehearsal for activation time.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & The common indicator is a post-derived comparison test: derived CNNA q-character first, known Hauptmodul/\allowbreak{}McKay-Thompson target second.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & V1.19 status policy: locked red until a release proof references the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and turns this phase yellow or orange. Very deep. Requires completed A-derived j/\allowbreak{}q-expansion or later graded/\allowbreak{}lattice/\allowbreak{}algebra output before any comparison is meaningful. Therefore it remains black/\allowbreak{}white horizon material, not an active proof target.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Keep as a planned comparison-only subphase;\newline split further when activated if formal objects require deep algebraic prerequisites.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & First prove/\allowbreak{}release the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and record the pre-implementation check;\newline only then may this phase become yellow or orange. Do not start by falsifying or importing an established target. First derive CNNA data from A provenance;\newline then perform finite-prefix or theorem-level comparison against the registered external target.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & No implementation rehearsal authorized while red. Required rehearsal starts with prerequisite-object proof references and a release check. Pending until all predecessor CNNA objects are available. Expected shape: define comparison records, prove coefficient/\allowbreak{}table equality for finite prefixes if computable, and isolate analytic/\allowbreak{}global equality as mirror theorem if needed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Use explicit records, finite list/\allowbreak{}vector comparisons, Nat/\allowbreak{}Int arithmetic certificates, and theorem forwarding. Avoid broad simplification or opaque imported classification assumptions.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & To be verified against mathlib 4.28.0 at activation time. Likely areas: algebra/\allowbreak{}group/\allowbreak{}basic finite groups for comparison tags, polynomials/\allowbreak{}series for q-prefixes, no large external theorem import in operational path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & Any comparison prefix must be computable data. Infinite series, analytic equality, VOA structures, and classification theorems remain mirror/\allowbreak{}comparison layers unless separately derived.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No immediate Lean bridge required. Missing structures belong earlier: j/\allowbreak{}q-expansion, graded q-character, lattice/\allowbreak{}theta candidate, or B-derived algebraic consumer, depending on the subphase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If activation reveals missing data, backjump to the earliest natural generator: modular q-expansion for MOON0, graded-character source before MOON8, lattice/\allowbreak{}theta source before MOON5-6, or B algebra before MOON7.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\

\subsection*{Phase 13.2.1 -- Pauli/\allowbreak{}Clifford boundary-star-algebra comparison gate}
\label{impl:phase-13-2-1}
\par\smallskip\noindent\begin{minipage}{0.99\linewidth}\footnotesize\raggedright\textbf{Table legend.} \colorbox{green!18}{\strut G} = green/closed and derived-only; \colorbox{white}{\strut W} = white/non-direct-Lean tooling/refactor/infrastructure/documentation/comparison; \colorbox{orange!28}{\strut O} = orange/implementable after stated predecessor closure; \colorbox{yellow!25}{\strut Y} = yellow/active and implementable now; \colorbox{red!20}{\strut R} = red/locked Lean-derivation phase; release requires derived-only object/proof evidence. Context class is orthogonal to status.\end{minipage}\par\vspace{0.25em}
\begin{longtable}{L{0.16\linewidth} L{0.81\linewidth}}
\hline
\textbf{Field} & \textbf{Record}\\
\hline
Phase status & \cellcolor{white}W\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Context class & ReferenceGatePhase\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation tier & F2\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation depth requirement & Standard dossier: short definition, source objects, proof target, implementation location, and next documentation action. No large narrative unless it blocks implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change version & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change timestamp & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation status & planned-not-active\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation status & planned-prepared\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & comparison\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & Comparison/\allowbreak{}reference phase: records external target criteria and scratchpad information;\newline it cannot supply CNNA premises or release mathematical phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Pauli/\allowbreak{}Clifford boundary-star-algebra comparison gate\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & External-source intake as comparison/\allowbreak{}reference gate with derived-only boundary.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Maps external Pauli/\allowbreak{}Clifford patterns to a later B-consumer check after boundary *-algebra is derived from A->B handoff.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Locked behind 13.2 and A->B handoff data. It cannot inspect A internals or supply B generators.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Split into narrow comparison gates so CD, Pillar-B boundary algebra, Dirac/\allowbreak{}STA and side-comparison targets do not collapse into one ambiguous external-theory phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Do not implement proof code yet. Keep target invariants in scratchpad;\newline when predecessor data is closed, add a small neutral comparison API and prove/\allowbreak{}falsify explicitly.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean modules in V1.25. Future optional modules must be neutral ReferenceGates/\allowbreak{}ComparisonGate modules, not phase-named public APIs.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Natural placement is comparison/\allowbreak{}reference-gate layer, not a foundational CNNA derivation layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuses existing CD, Pillar-B and side-comparison umbrella phases;\newline new rows are target-gate refinements, not duplicate derivation phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & The only generator remains the CNNA Lean/\allowbreak{}provenance chain. External theory may only define target profiles for later comparison.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep future comparison APIs small and isolated;\newline no broad GA framework should be introduced before a concrete CNNA-derived comparison need exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & No Lean refactor in V1.25. Future module changes require import graph check, consumer discipline audit and full local Lean build evidence.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No Lean migration. Future comparison module metrics: declarations added, imports added, consumer count, and target/\allowbreak{}equality proofs closed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline remains pinned Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot;\newline live documentation is only a source-discovery hint until verified locally against the pin.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Do not replace ExecComplex or CNNA scalar provenance with external complex quaternions or analytic Complex.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Comparison consumers may read CNNA-derived outputs;\newline CNNA derivation phases may not consume the comparison profile as a generator.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Added overhead is justified because sign, unit and semantic ambiguities are high-risk;\newline gates are narrow to avoid broad external-theory creep.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Future proof should derive B generators from boundary algebra, then compare against Clifford target relations through a minimal profile or mathlib Clifford lift only if version-pinned and noncircular.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Future Lean work should use explicit structures, field/\allowbreak{}projection equalities, constructor-based proofs, local case splits and finite matrix entry proofs;\newline avoid broad simp/\allowbreak{}simpa collapse and opaque native\_decide goals.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Reference candidates only: Mathlib.Algebra.Quaternion, Mathlib.Analysis.Quaternion, Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.CliffordAlgebra.Basic. Verify against the pinned Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot before any implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced. If finite numeric checks are later needed, keep them mirror/\allowbreak{}diagnostic unless an exact CNNA-derived computable path is proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Concrete traversal currently consists of source equation/\allowbreak{}profile extraction and target-object registration;\newline no CNNA runtime traversal yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Reference skeleton only. It must not be presented as computable CNNA evidence until future exact instances are constructed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & For V1.25: generated TSV/\allowbreak{}TEX/\allowbreak{}PDF artifacts. Future Lean witness: explicit comparison structure instantiated from CNNA-derived objects.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Current web docs indicate available Quaternion and CliffordAlgebra APIs, but the project pin is Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0;\newline implementation must recheck exact names and theorem availability.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No noncomputable Lean code introduced. Future use of analytic/\allowbreak{}normed quaternion APIs must be isolated from operational paths unless explicitly allowed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib Clifford/\allowbreak{}Quaternion APIs pull noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, keep them in mirror/\allowbreak{}comparison modules or define a minimal finite target profile instead.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Bridge intentionally open. The external reference describes target shapes;\newline CNNA must derive any matching structure internally before comparison.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If the comparison needs missing structure, patch only the earliest natural CNNA layer where that structure is generated, not the comparison/\allowbreak{}consumer phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Future implementation prompt must state comparison-only status, predecessor objects, no new generator axioms, no external-theory imports unless pinned and isolated, and exact target equalities/\allowbreak{}failures.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & All global no-go guardrails apply, especially derived-only, positive-path-first, patch-at-natural-origin and reference-theory-as-target-only rules.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planned reference/\allowbreak{}target-gate integration only. V1.25 records source reading, object links, proof-dossier placeholders and scratchpad material;\newline no Lean code is implemented.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & YAML generator validation and generated table/\allowbreak{}PDF outputs after V1.25 update. No Lean build evidence because no Lean source changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Positive path: wait for the natural CNNA predecessor objects, then encode the smallest comparison profile and prove target equality/\allowbreak{}failure from CNNA data only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only after YAML update.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After any future comparison implementation, record whether the target matched, failed, or required a natural-origin backjump;\newline do not smooth failure into a weakened claim.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Package YAML, generated tables, generated PDF and report. Do not package external PDFs as generated project truth unless they are user-uploaded source material.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & External theory is recorded only as comparison material. It may suggest target invariants, sign audits and future checks, but cannot release phases or provide CNNA generators.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Horn Pauli/\allowbreak{}GA sections\item mathlib CliffordAlgebra.Basic documentation\item Wieser/\allowbreak{}Song Lean GA formalization\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item boundary generator square/\allowbreak{}anti-commutation target\item Clifford universal-property seam\item Pauli coordinate/\allowbreak{}operator ambiguity warning\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Added modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}archive/\allowbreak{}reports/\allowbreak{}V1\_25\_HORN\_QUATERNION\_GEOMETRIC\_ALGEBRA\_REFERENCE\_GATE\_REPORT.md\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no external GA/\allowbreak{}quaternion theorem used as CNNA source\item no phase release from uploaded/\allowbreak{}reference paper\item no Pauli/\allowbreak{}Clifford/\allowbreak{}Dirac object imported into Pillar A or B as generator\item no free complex scalar layer introduced from biquaternions\item no Lean import added before natural predecessor closure and version-pinned check\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: all global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply.\item GNG37: quaternion/\allowbreak{}GA references are comparison-only and have no generator or handoff rights.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed added modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}archive/\allowbreak{}reports/\allowbreak{}V1\_25\_HORN\_QUATERNION\_GEOMETRIC\_ALGEBRA\_REFERENCE\_GATE\_REPORT.md\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Structural/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}*.lean\item Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}*.lean\item PillarB placeholder modules\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_full\_document.py\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item none identified\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\subsection*{Phase 13.6.1 -- Dirac/\allowbreak{}spacetime-algebra comparison target behind CPT, spin-statistics and split gates}
\label{impl:phase-13-6-1}
\par\smallskip\noindent\begin{minipage}{0.99\linewidth}\footnotesize\raggedright\textbf{Table legend.} \colorbox{green!18}{\strut G} = green/closed and derived-only; \colorbox{white}{\strut W} = white/non-direct-Lean tooling/refactor/infrastructure/documentation/comparison; \colorbox{orange!28}{\strut O} = orange/implementable after stated predecessor closure; \colorbox{yellow!25}{\strut Y} = yellow/active and implementable now; \colorbox{red!20}{\strut R} = red/locked Lean-derivation phase; release requires derived-only object/proof evidence. Context class is orthogonal to status.\end{minipage}\par\vspace{0.25em}
\begin{longtable}{L{0.16\linewidth} L{0.81\linewidth}}
\hline
\textbf{Field} & \textbf{Record}\\
\hline
Phase status & \cellcolor{white}W\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Context class & ReferenceGatePhase\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation tier & F2\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation depth requirement & Standard dossier: short definition, source objects, proof target, implementation location, and next documentation action. No large narrative unless it blocks implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change version & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change timestamp & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation status & planned-not-active\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation status & planned-prepared\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & comparison\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & Comparison/\allowbreak{}reference phase: records external target criteria and scratchpad information;\newline it cannot supply CNNA premises or release mathematical phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Dirac/\allowbreak{}spacetime-algebra comparison target behind CPT, spin-statistics and split gates\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & External-source intake as comparison/\allowbreak{}reference gate with derived-only boundary.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Maps Dirac/\allowbreak{}STA material to a late Pillar-B target gate only after local net, modular data and structural theorem hypotheses are CNNA-derived.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on 13.5/\allowbreak{}13.6 and GA4;\newline does not unblock any Pillar-B derivation. No Lorentz/\allowbreak{}Dirac/\allowbreak{}spacetime structure is imported.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Split into narrow comparison gates so CD, Pillar-B boundary algebra, Dirac/\allowbreak{}STA and side-comparison targets do not collapse into one ambiguous external-theory phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Do not implement proof code yet. Keep target invariants in scratchpad;\newline when predecessor data is closed, add a small neutral comparison API and prove/\allowbreak{}falsify explicitly.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean modules in V1.25. Future optional modules must be neutral ReferenceGates/\allowbreak{}ComparisonGate modules, not phase-named public APIs.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Natural placement is comparison/\allowbreak{}reference-gate layer, not a foundational CNNA derivation layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuses existing CD, Pillar-B and side-comparison umbrella phases;\newline new rows are target-gate refinements, not duplicate derivation phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & The only generator remains the CNNA Lean/\allowbreak{}provenance chain. External theory may only define target profiles for later comparison.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep future comparison APIs small and isolated;\newline no broad GA framework should be introduced before a concrete CNNA-derived comparison need exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & No Lean refactor in V1.25. Future module changes require import graph check, consumer discipline audit and full local Lean build evidence.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No Lean migration. Future comparison module metrics: declarations added, imports added, consumer count, and target/\allowbreak{}equality proofs closed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline remains pinned Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot;\newline live documentation is only a source-discovery hint until verified locally against the pin.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Do not replace ExecComplex or CNNA scalar provenance with external complex quaternions or analytic Complex.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Comparison consumers may read CNNA-derived outputs;\newline CNNA derivation phases may not consume the comparison profile as a generator.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Added overhead is justified because sign, unit and semantic ambiguities are high-risk;\newline gates are narrow to avoid broad external-theory creep.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Future proof compares CNNA-derived B structures with gamma/\allowbreak{}STA target signatures and structural theorem hypotheses;\newline any mismatch becomes an explicit comparison failure.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Future Lean work should use explicit structures, field/\allowbreak{}projection equalities, constructor-based proofs, local case splits and finite matrix entry proofs;\newline avoid broad simp/\allowbreak{}simpa collapse and opaque native\_decide goals.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Reference candidates only: Mathlib.Algebra.Quaternion, Mathlib.Analysis.Quaternion, Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.CliffordAlgebra.Basic. Verify against the pinned Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot before any implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced. If finite numeric checks are later needed, keep them mirror/\allowbreak{}diagnostic unless an exact CNNA-derived computable path is proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Concrete traversal currently consists of source equation/\allowbreak{}profile extraction and target-object registration;\newline no CNNA runtime traversal yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Reference skeleton only. It must not be presented as computable CNNA evidence until future exact instances are constructed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & For V1.25: generated TSV/\allowbreak{}TEX/\allowbreak{}PDF artifacts. Future Lean witness: explicit comparison structure instantiated from CNNA-derived objects.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Current web docs indicate available Quaternion and CliffordAlgebra APIs, but the project pin is Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0;\newline implementation must recheck exact names and theorem availability.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No noncomputable Lean code introduced. Future use of analytic/\allowbreak{}normed quaternion APIs must be isolated from operational paths unless explicitly allowed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib Clifford/\allowbreak{}Quaternion APIs pull noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, keep them in mirror/\allowbreak{}comparison modules or define a minimal finite target profile instead.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Bridge intentionally open. The external reference describes target shapes;\newline CNNA must derive any matching structure internally before comparison.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If the comparison needs missing structure, patch only the earliest natural CNNA layer where that structure is generated, not the comparison/\allowbreak{}consumer phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Future implementation prompt must state comparison-only status, predecessor objects, no new generator axioms, no external-theory imports unless pinned and isolated, and exact target equalities/\allowbreak{}failures.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & All global no-go guardrails apply, especially derived-only, positive-path-first, patch-at-natural-origin and reference-theory-as-target-only rules.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planned reference/\allowbreak{}target-gate integration only. V1.25 records source reading, object links, proof-dossier placeholders and scratchpad material;\newline no Lean code is implemented.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & YAML generator validation and generated table/\allowbreak{}PDF outputs after V1.25 update. No Lean build evidence because no Lean source changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Positive path: wait for the natural CNNA predecessor objects, then encode the smallest comparison profile and prove target equality/\allowbreak{}failure from CNNA data only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only after YAML update.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After any future comparison implementation, record whether the target matched, failed, or required a natural-origin backjump;\newline do not smooth failure into a weakened claim.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Package YAML, generated tables, generated PDF and report. Do not package external PDFs as generated project truth unless they are user-uploaded source material.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & External theory is recorded only as comparison material. It may suggest target invariants, sign audits and future checks, but cannot release phases or provide CNNA generators.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Horn Dirac/\allowbreak{}quaternion discussion\item Hestenes spacetime-algebra references\item mathlib CliffordAlgebra.Basic documentation\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Dirac/\allowbreak{}Clifford signature target\item Lorentz-invariance comparison target\item spin/\allowbreak{}CPT compatibility target\item STA comparison surface\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Added modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}archive/\allowbreak{}reports/\allowbreak{}V1\_25\_HORN\_QUATERNION\_GEOMETRIC\_ALGEBRA\_REFERENCE\_GATE\_REPORT.md\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no external GA/\allowbreak{}quaternion theorem used as CNNA source\item no phase release from uploaded/\allowbreak{}reference paper\item no Pauli/\allowbreak{}Clifford/\allowbreak{}Dirac object imported into Pillar A or B as generator\item no free complex scalar layer introduced from biquaternions\item no Lean import added before natural predecessor closure and version-pinned check\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: all global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply.\item GNG37: quaternion/\allowbreak{}GA references are comparison-only and have no generator or handoff rights.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed added modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}archive/\allowbreak{}reports/\allowbreak{}V1\_25\_HORN\_QUATERNION\_GEOMETRIC\_ALGEBRA\_REFERENCE\_GATE\_REPORT.md\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Structural/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}*.lean\item Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}*.lean\item PillarB placeholder modules\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_full\_document.py\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item none identified\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}
