Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & No implementation rehearsal authorized while red. Required rehearsal starts with prerequisite-object proof references and a release check. Pending. Must be written before implementation starts.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Pending. Any missing bridge must create or activate the earlier natural source phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Not implemented yet. Scratch-pad placeholder generated from the single YAML roadmap master.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Pending;\newline phase is not active.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & To be specified when this phase becomes active;\newline split into subphases if dependencies are too deep.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & not run\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Not available yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Roadmap placeholder;\newline does not assert the target is proven.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Roadmap placeholder;\newline does not assert the target is proven.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & No implementation rehearsal authorized while red. Required rehearsal starts with prerequisite-object proof references and a release check. Pending. Must be written before implementation starts.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Pending. Any missing bridge must create or activate the earlier natural source phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Not implemented yet. Scratch-pad placeholder generated from the single YAML roadmap master.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Pending;\newline phase is not active.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & To be specified when this phase becomes active;\newline split into subphases if dependencies are too deep.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & not run\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Not available yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Roadmap placeholder;\newline does not assert the target is proven.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation depth requirement & Extended dossier: definition, source chain, main lemmas/\allowbreak{}proof obligations, dependency risks, and downstream consumers. Enough detail for later implementation without re-reading chat history.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change version & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change timestamp & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation status & planned\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation status & red-locked-by-release-policy\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & derivation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & Derivation phase: record source objects, definitions, proof target, positive construction path, expected tactics, mathlib imports, concrete computable instance traversal if operational.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & E->A matter backreaction gate\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Planned phase. Use source-preparation workflow before implementation: attach reliable sources, extract established objects, audit dependencies, split if necessary, and fill proof rehearsal before changing Lean code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & V1.19 status policy: locked red until a release proof references the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and turns this phase yellow or orange. Pending. Must be completed before this phase may become active.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & First prove/\allowbreak{}release the prerequisite derived-only Lean objects and record the pre-implementation check;\newline only then may this phase become yellow or orange. Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Not applicable unless phase\_type is refactor or the phase changes imports/\allowbreak{}declarations. If refactor applies: wrapper-first, bounded migration package, local full-build evidence before closeout.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Not recorded yet. Refactor phases must fill declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline is Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot unless an explicit phase-boundary upgrade gate is opened. New imports must be verified against the chosen baseline;\newline noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure must be logged and isolated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2 when relevant: operational ExecComplex remains Q x Q;\newline algebraic irrational data stays mirror-only unless a rational/\allowbreak{}integer invariant is separately proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & No special cross-phase consumer contract recorded yet. If a later phase consumes this output, record export shape and import direction before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Pending until first real refactor/\allowbreak{}code-change package closes;\newline then record which governance gates prevented concrete errors and whether later phases can be flatter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & No implementation rehearsal authorized while red. Required rehearsal starts with prerequisite-object proof references and a release check. Pending. Must be written before implementation starts.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Infrastructure-only or not prepared yet. Before operational code implementation, name a concrete finite instance and the path from input to output.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline must be explicit before operational implementation\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & No phase-specific mathlib complication recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No phase-specific noncomputable-boundary audit recorded yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib introduces noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, isolate in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer or backjump to the earliest natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Pending. Any missing bridge must create or activate the earlier natural source phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Not prepared yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Use the standardized positive-path implementation workflow: respect all plan sections, import/\allowbreak{}consumer discipline, derived-only and computable operational path, no forbidden shortcuts, package the full modified code, and verify plan points after implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Not implemented yet. Scratch-pad placeholder generated from the single YAML roadmap master.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Pending;\newline phase is not active.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & To be specified when this phase becomes active;\newline split into subphases if dependencies are too deep.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & not run\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Not available yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with all modified files and generated planning artifacts when applicable. Lean build success may be recorded only from an actual current build or from the user-reported local build;\newline otherwise state that local Lean build is required.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Roadmap placeholder;\newline does not assert the target is proven.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply;\newline this phase list is local addenda only.\item no @[simp] attributes in the operational path\item no noncomputable in the operational path\item no classical helper unless isolated in allowed mirror/\allowbreak{}non-operational layer\item no Matrix.inv or external inverse oracle in operational derivations\item no free formula without proof-carrying entry structure\item no consumer-side patch when the missing structure belongs earlier\item no premature obstruction before a serious positive construction attempt\item no phase-semantic public API names\item no fragile rewrite chain when a structural constructor/\allowbreak{}projection proof is available\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\begin{longtable}{L{0.16\linewidth} L{0.81\linewidth}}
\hline
\textbf{Field} & \textbf{Record}\\
\hline
Phase status & \cellcolor{white}W\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Context class & ReferenceGatePhase\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation tier & F2\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation depth requirement & Standard dossier: short definition, source objects, proof target, implementation location, and next documentation action. No large narrative unless it blocks implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change version & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change timestamp & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation status & planned-not-active\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation status & planned-prepared\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & comparison\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & Comparison/\allowbreak{}reference phase: records external target criteria and scratchpad information;\newline it cannot supply CNNA premises or release mathematical phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Geometric and conformal algebra side-comparison register\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & External-source intake as comparison/\allowbreak{}reference gate with derived-only boundary.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Maps GA/\allowbreak{}CGA to Phase 18 side-comparison, not to Pillar-A/\allowbreak{}B generators. It may later help organize review questions and diagrams.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on GA0-GA5 and future CNNA outputs. It is non-blocking and cannot set spacetime dimension, metric, dynamics or matter.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Split into narrow comparison gates so CD, Pillar-B boundary algebra, Dirac/\allowbreak{}STA and side-comparison targets do not collapse into one ambiguous external-theory phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Do not implement proof code yet. Keep target invariants in scratchpad;\newline when predecessor data is closed, add a small neutral comparison API and prove/\allowbreak{}falsify explicitly.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean modules in V1.25. Future optional modules must be neutral ReferenceGates/\allowbreak{}ComparisonGate modules, not phase-named public APIs.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Natural placement is comparison/\allowbreak{}reference-gate layer, not a foundational CNNA derivation layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuses existing CD, Pillar-B and side-comparison umbrella phases;\newline new rows are target-gate refinements, not duplicate derivation phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & The only generator remains the CNNA Lean/\allowbreak{}provenance chain. External theory may only define target profiles for later comparison.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep future comparison APIs small and isolated;\newline no broad GA framework should be introduced before a concrete CNNA-derived comparison need exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & No Lean refactor in V1.25. Future module changes require import graph check, consumer discipline audit and full local Lean build evidence.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No Lean migration. Future comparison module metrics: declarations added, imports added, consumer count, and target/\allowbreak{}equality proofs closed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Baseline remains pinned Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot;\newline live documentation is only a source-discovery hint until verified locally against the pin.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Do not replace ExecComplex or CNNA scalar provenance with external complex quaternions or analytic Complex.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Comparison consumers may read CNNA-derived outputs;\newline CNNA derivation phases may not consume the comparison profile as a generator.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Added overhead is justified because sign, unit and semantic ambiguities are high-risk;\newline gates are narrow to avoid broad external-theory creep.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Future work prepares generated comparison documents from closed CNNA outputs, then asks whether GA/\allowbreak{}CGA offers a faithful target representation or only a heuristic analogy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Future Lean work should use explicit structures, field/\allowbreak{}projection equalities, constructor-based proofs, local case splits and finite matrix entry proofs;\newline avoid broad simp/\allowbreak{}simpa collapse and opaque native\_decide goals.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Reference candidates only: Mathlib.Algebra.Quaternion, Mathlib.Analysis.Quaternion, Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.CliffordAlgebra.Basic. Verify against the pinned Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib snapshot before any implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced. If finite numeric checks are later needed, keep them mirror/\allowbreak{}diagnostic unless an exact CNNA-derived computable path is proved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Concrete traversal currently consists of source equation/\allowbreak{}profile extraction and target-object registration;\newline no CNNA runtime traversal yet.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Reference skeleton only. It must not be presented as computable CNNA evidence until future exact instances are constructed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & For V1.25: generated TSV/\allowbreak{}TEX/\allowbreak{}PDF artifacts. Future Lean witness: explicit comparison structure instantiated from CNNA-derived objects.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Current web docs indicate available Quaternion and CliffordAlgebra APIs, but the project pin is Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0;\newline implementation must recheck exact names and theorem availability.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No noncomputable Lean code introduced. Future use of analytic/\allowbreak{}normed quaternion APIs must be isolated from operational paths unless explicitly allowed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If mathlib Clifford/\allowbreak{}Quaternion APIs pull noncomputable/\allowbreak{}classical pressure, keep them in mirror/\allowbreak{}comparison modules or define a minimal finite target profile instead.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Bridge intentionally open. The external reference describes target shapes;\newline CNNA must derive any matching structure internally before comparison.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If the comparison needs missing structure, patch only the earliest natural CNNA layer where that structure is generated, not the comparison/\allowbreak{}consumer phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Future implementation prompt must state comparison-only status, predecessor objects, no new generator axioms, no external-theory imports unless pinned and isolated, and exact target equalities/\allowbreak{}failures.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & All global no-go guardrails apply, especially derived-only, positive-path-first, patch-at-natural-origin and reference-theory-as-target-only rules.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planned reference/\allowbreak{}target-gate integration only. V1.25 records source reading, object links, proof-dossier placeholders and scratchpad material;\newline no Lean code is implemented.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & YAML generator validation and generated table/\allowbreak{}PDF outputs after V1.25 update. No Lean build evidence because no Lean source changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Positive path: wait for the natural CNNA predecessor objects, then encode the smallest comparison profile and prove target equality/\allowbreak{}failure from CNNA data only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only after YAML update.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After any future comparison implementation, record whether the target matched, failed, or required a natural-origin backjump;\newline do not smooth failure into a weakened claim.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Package YAML, generated tables, generated PDF and report. Do not package external PDFs as generated project truth unless they are user-uploaded source material.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & External theory is recorded only as comparison material. It may suggest target invariants, sign audits and future checks, but cannot release phases or provide CNNA generators.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Horn outlook on spacetime and conformal GA\item Hestenes/\allowbreak{}Sobczyk Clifford Algebra to Geometric Calculus\item Wieser/\allowbreak{}Song Lean GA formalization\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item geometric algebra side-comparison surface\item spacetime algebra side-comparison surface\item conformal GA side-comparison surface\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Added modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}archive/\allowbreak{}reports/\allowbreak{}V1\_25\_HORN\_QUATERNION\_GEOMETRIC\_ALGEBRA\_REFERENCE\_GATE\_REPORT.md\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no external GA/\allowbreak{}quaternion theorem used as CNNA source\item no phase release from uploaded/\allowbreak{}reference paper\item no Pauli/\allowbreak{}Clifford/\allowbreak{}Dirac object imported into Pillar A or B as generator\item no free complex scalar layer introduced from biquaternions\item no Lean import added before natural predecessor closure and version-pinned check\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: all global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply.\item GNG37: quaternion/\allowbreak{}GA references are comparison-only and have no generator or handoff rights.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed added modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}archive/\allowbreak{}reports/\allowbreak{}V1\_25\_HORN\_QUATERNION\_GEOMETRIC\_ALGEBRA\_REFERENCE\_GATE\_REPORT.md\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Structural/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}*.lean\item Arithmetic/\allowbreak{}CayleyDickson/\allowbreak{}*.lean\item PillarB placeholder modules\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_full\_document.py\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item none identified\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\phantomsection
\subsection*{Phase 20 -- DB-REVIEW main side objective: database-ready CNNA review and documentation structure with immediate expert-review principles}
\label{impl:phase-20}

Context class is orthogonal to status.\end{minipage}\par\vspace{0.25em}

\hline

\hline

Phase documentation tier & F1\\

Phase type & documentation\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & DB-REVIEW side objective governance row\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & DB-REVIEW database-ready documentation and expert-review workflow.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Maps documentation/\allowbreak{}database/\allowbreak{}review infrastructure to generated-secondary metadata only. It cannot supply CNNA-generative mathematical or physical inputs.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & No Lean dependency introduced. Depends on YAML master and generated views only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Split into immediate principles (20.1) and later technical/\allowbreak{}database/\allowbreak{}review phases (20.2-20.5).\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Apply expert-review/\allowbreak{}no-infallibility principles immediately;\newline later add schema/\allowbreak{}export/\allowbreak{}review tooling without touching Lean truth semantics.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean module manifest change. Future DB/\allowbreak{}export scripts require separate manifest if implemented.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & DB-REVIEW belongs to documentation/\allowbreak{}review/\allowbreak{}tooling infrastructure, not to Pillar-A mathematical derivation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse Single-YAML-Master and existing generator/\allowbreak{}export seams;\newline do not create a second authoritative planning source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & YAML remains the manual planning source;\newline generated DB/\allowbreak{}TSV/\allowbreak{}PDF/\allowbreak{}graph views remain secondary and reproducible.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep Lean implementation packets compact;\newline DB/\allowbreak{}audit-full exploration must not overload routine code-writing phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & No Lean refactor. Future tooling must preserve generated-view reproducibility and YAML single-source rule.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No declaration migration;\newline no imports changed;\newline no Lean modules moved.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & No Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version change. Lean data timestamp remains fixed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & No ExecComplex change. Operational scalar boundaries remain governed by EXEC-2 when relevant.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & All consumers are documentation/\allowbreak{}review/\allowbreak{}tooling consumers. No pillar handoff or mathematical consumer rights are granted.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & DB-REVIEW is non-blocking for Lean coding;\newline principles are mandatory, but technical DB work must remain compact and phase-bound.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & For completed governance rows, validation is generator/\allowbreak{}YAML consistency and explicit guardrails. Future rows must rehearse schema round-trip and no-generator boundary.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & None;\newline documentation/\allowbreak{}tooling phase, not Lean proof phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & None added.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced or consumed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not an operational Lean computation. Concrete traversal is metadata path: YAML row -> generated TSV/\allowbreak{}TeX/\allowbreak{}PDF -> future DB row/\allowbreak{}view.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & non-operational metadata path;\newline no computable CNNA object claimed\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & For future DB phases: reproducible export/\allowbreak{}round-trip script output, not a Lean mathematical witness.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & None;\newline no mathlib imports or Lean code changes.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No noncomputable Lean boundary involved;\newline semantic review is a documentation governance rule.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Not applicable unless future Lean-readable metadata tooling is added;\newline then isolate outside operational path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge closed. Review gaps and missing blue marks remain explicit audit debt.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If a future view needs semantic truth not present in Lean/\allowbreak{}YAML metadata, backjump to the relevant Lean/\allowbreak{}object proof source, not to the database/\allowbreak{}view consumer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & For future DB-REVIEW phases: preserve Lean-primary/\allowbreak{}generated-secondary semantics, keep expert review mandatory, and do not turn established theory or database views into CNNA inputs.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG24)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Added as a main side objective in the YAML phase DAG with direct DBR0 object and child phases 20.1-20.5. Technical database work remains later/\allowbreak{}non-blocking, but review principles apply immediately.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & YAML contains Phase 20, DBR0 proof dossier, SLTG-06, GNG23-GNG24, DB-REVIEW workflow, and generated exports/\allowbreak{}tables.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Governance/\allowbreak{}documentation proof: preserve Lean-primary/\allowbreak{}generated-secondary boundary and explicit review obligations.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Generator/\allowbreak{}PDF regeneration only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Completed rows changed YAML/\allowbreak{}generator views only. Future rows must record schema/\allowbreak{}export artifacts, review status coverage, and no Lean-source mutation unless explicitly requested.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with the updated YAML, generated tables/\allowbreak{}exports, report, and PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success unless actually run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Side objective is closed as a governance/\allowbreak{}roadmap insertion, not as a database implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item user instruction for DB-REVIEW main side objective\item Single YAML master\item generated exports/\allowbreak{}tables\item object proof dossiers\item global no-go guardrails\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Lean-primary truth-system rule\item generated-secondary documentation rule\item discipline-specific expert-review obligation\item blue/\allowbreak{}reference marking audit debt\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no Lean source edit\item no database/\allowbreak{}export object used as CNNA generator\item no semantic infallibility claim\item no established-theory input hidden behind blue/\allowbreak{}reference marking\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: all global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply, especially GNG23 and GNG24.\item no 100-percent truth declaration\item no generated artifact as semantic certificate\item no ignored missing blue/\allowbreak{}reference-theory marking\item no database/\allowbreak{}view layer as CNNA generator\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\item Repository/\allowbreak{}generated\_exports/\allowbreak{}*.tsv\item Repository/\allowbreak{}tables/\allowbreak{}*.tex\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item second-source-of-truth risk\item generated-view-as-truth risk\item unmarked-established-theory risk\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & For future DB-REVIEW phases: preserve Lean-primary/\allowbreak{}generated-secondary semantics, keep expert review mandatory, and do not turn established theory or database views into CNNA inputs.\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Future database/\allowbreak{}schema phase. Must preserve YAML as manual source and Lean as primary truth system.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Lean-primary truth-system rule\item generated-secondary documentation rule\item discipline-specific expert-review obligation\item blue/\allowbreak{}reference marking audit debt\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no Lean source edit\item no database/\allowbreak{}export object used as CNNA generator\item no semantic infallibility claim\item no established-theory input hidden behind blue/\allowbreak{}reference marking\end{itemize}\\

\end{longtable}

Implementation notes & The Stats section is a generated-secondary front surface. It is useful for orientation and review, but it does not certify semantic truth. The tool-interface principle is a Leitmetapher with operative review consequences, not a mathematical CNNA theorem.\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & No Lean dependency introduced. Tool dependencies are Python stdlib, PyYAML already used by generate\_tables.py, and optional pdflatex for full documentation generation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Implemented as DB-REVIEW documentation/\allowbreak{}tooling phase 20.8, not as a Lean refactor and not as a database implementation phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Keep the root clean before returning to the active content path. Future phase closeouts should generate context docs or full docs only on demand and avoid accumulating root artifacts.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & Added two Python tool scripts only;\newline no Lean module manifest change.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Belongs to DB-REVIEW generated-secondary documentation/\allowbreak{}tooling. It is a retention policy, not a Pillar-A mathematical derivation layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuses existing generation pipeline;\newline avoids duplicating versioned full-doc TeX/\allowbreak{}PDF in root. Adds a single canonical full-document generator path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & Full document TeX/\allowbreak{}PDF must be generated from YAML/\allowbreak{}tables by script and treated as disposable unless explicitly requested as an external artifact.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Reduces package clutter and clarifies active source boundaries without changing Lean source structure.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & No Lean refactor. Verify source/\allowbreak{}control files remain, reports are archived, and root generated artifacts are absent after cleanup.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No declaration migration;\newline no imports changed;\newline no Lean modules moved. Root report files moved to archive/\allowbreak{}reports;\newline root generated PDFs/\allowbreak{}TeX/\allowbreak{}build products removed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & No Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version change. Lean data timestamp remains fixed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & No ExecComplex change.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & All consumers are documentation/\allowbreak{}review/\allowbreak{}tooling consumers. No pillar handoff or mathematical consumer rights are granted.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Positive: reduces root clutter and prevents generated artifacts from being mistaken for sources. Risk: losing convenient PDFs;\newline mitigated by explicit regeneration script and context-documentation workflow.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Run root audit, add generator/\allowbreak{}cleanup scripts, regenerate tables, optionally compile full PDF outside root, execute cleanup, and verify root artifact invariants.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & None;\newline Python/\allowbreak{}documentation-tooling phase, not Lean proof phase.\\

Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If root artifacts reappear, fix release packaging/\allowbreak{}cleanup workflow, not the Lean source tree. If a report becomes source-like, promote its content into YAML rather than keeping it as an active root Markdown file.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & For future packaging: do not retain full PDFs/\allowbreak{}TeX in root;\newline archive reports;\newline keep README in root;\newline regenerate documentation on demand from YAML/\allowbreak{}tables/\allowbreak{}scripts.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited (GNG01-GNG27)\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Audited V1.12 project-root artifacts, added GNG27/\allowbreak{}SCF46/\allowbreak{}DBR8, introduced scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_full\_document.py for disposable full-document generation under generated\_docs/\allowbreak{}full/\allowbreak{}, introduced scripts/\allowbreak{}clean\_generated\_root\_artifacts.py for root cleanup, and moved historical Markdown reports to archive/\allowbreak{}reports/\allowbreak{} while removing root PDF/\allowbreak{}TeX/\allowbreak{}LaTeX build products.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Root extension audit before cleanup found 36 Markdown reports, 20 PDFs, 20 TeX files, 19 aux files, 22 logs, 8 out files, 11 toc files and latexmk artifacts. V1.13 validates YAML, regenerates tables/\allowbreak{}exports, compiles an optional full document under generated\_docs/\allowbreak{}full/\allowbreak{}, then verifies the packaged root has README.md as the only Markdown file and no root PDF/\allowbreak{}TeX/\allowbreak{}LaTeX build artifacts.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Classify root files by epistemic role: source/\allowbreak{}control files stay active;\newline generated full-doc PDFs/\allowbreak{}TeX and LaTeX byproducts are disposable;\newline historical Markdown reports are archived for traceability. Preserve regeneration commands instead of retaining rendered artifacts.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table generation and optional PDF compilation only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & V1.13 makes generated documentation disposable and root hygiene explicit. The active cursor remains 1.1.1.1.5.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with YAML, scripts, tables/\allowbreak{}exports, repo inventory, repo snapshot, archived reports, and no retained root PDF/\allowbreak{}TeX/\allowbreak{}LaTeX byproducts unless the user explicitly asks for a PDF deliverable.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & This is repository hygiene, not CNNA mathematics. PDFs/\allowbreak{}TeX are disposable because they can be regenerated from YAML/\allowbreak{}tables/\allowbreak{}scripts. Markdown reports are archival evidence and should not crowd the active root or be mistaken for authoritative sources.\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Design DB mirror in staged order: schema -> import/\allowbreak{}roundtrip -> snapshots/\allowbreak{}checksums -> read-only api views/\allowbreak{}read-only access policy -> web frontend contract -> later reviewer/\allowbreak{}admin model.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean modules added or modified. Future DB files may live under Repository/\allowbreak{}database/\allowbreak{}sql\_mirror or Repository/\allowbreak{}web once activated.\\

Semantic placement decision & Natural placement is DB-REVIEW/\allowbreak{}generated-secondary publication infrastructure, not a CNNA mathematical pillar.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse existing YAML/\allowbreak{}export/\allowbreak{}context-doc data;\newline do not create a second canonical planning model in DB without roundtrip contract.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & database mirror data must be generated/\allowbreak{}imported from Master YAML and generated exports with snapshot\_id/\allowbreak{}hash evidence.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep DB schema normalized and queryable;\newline avoid large JSON blobs/\allowbreak{}PDFs/\allowbreak{}ZIPs as primary DB content.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & No Lean refactor. Future DB schema changes must preserve YAML roundtrip and public view compatibility.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No migration executed. Future metrics: tables imported, rows imported, snapshot hash, read-only access policy test count, anon write-denial tests.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & No Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version change. Lean data timestamp remains fixed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & No ExecComplex change.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Consumers are public read-only frontend/\allowbreak{}API users and internal admin/\allowbreak{}import tooling only;\newline no pillar handoff or mathematical consumer rights.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Planned sidechain is justified by long-term public visualization/\allowbreak{}query value, but it must remain non-blocking and sparse until YAML/\allowbreak{}Lean surfaces stabilize.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Before activation, rehearse importer locally using a disposable database, check hashes, verify anon read-only views, and prove that every public row traces to a snapshot\_id.\\

Expected tactics & None;\newline database/\allowbreak{}tooling phase, not Lean proof phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\item generated\_exports/\allowbreak{}*.tsv\item repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export/\allowbreak{}*.json\item scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item second truth system risk\item manual DB table edits\item public write policy leak\item admin write credential key leak\item snapshot provenance loss\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Positive path plan & Design DB mirror in staged order: schema -> import/\allowbreak{}roundtrip -> snapshots/\allowbreak{}checksums -> read-only api views/\allowbreak{}read-only access policy -> web frontend contract -> later reviewer/\allowbreak{}admin model.\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse existing YAML/\allowbreak{}export/\allowbreak{}context-doc data;\newline do not create a second canonical planning model in DB without roundtrip contract.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & database mirror data must be generated/\allowbreak{}imported from Master YAML and generated exports with snapshot\_id/\allowbreak{}hash evidence.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep DB schema normalized and queryable;\newline avoid large JSON blobs/\allowbreak{}PDFs/\allowbreak{}ZIPs as primary DB content.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & No Lean refactor. Future DB schema changes must preserve YAML roundtrip and public view compatibility.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No migration executed. Future metrics: tables imported, rows imported, snapshot hash, read-only access policy test count, anon write-denial tests.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & No Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version change. Lean data timestamp remains fixed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & No ExecComplex change.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Consumers are public read-only frontend/\allowbreak{}API users and internal admin/\allowbreak{}import tooling only;\newline no pillar handoff or mathematical consumer rights.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Planned sidechain is justified by long-term public visualization/\allowbreak{}query value, but it must remain non-blocking and sparse until YAML/\allowbreak{}Lean surfaces stabilize.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Before activation, rehearse importer locally using a disposable database, check hashes, verify anon read-only views, and prove that every public row traces to a snapshot\_id.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & None;\newline database/\allowbreak{}tooling phase, not Lean proof phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & None added.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced or consumed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & No live DB traversal yet. Future traversal is YAML/\allowbreak{}export rows -> normalized SQL tables -> api.* views -> web frontend.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Not an operational/\allowbreak{}computable CNNA path;\newline concrete future output is schema/\allowbreak{}import/\allowbreak{}view/\allowbreak{}frontend contract, not a mathematical witness.\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If DB requirements conflict with YAML schema, patch the YAML/\allowbreak{}export schema at the natural documentation/\allowbreak{}tooling layer;\newline do not alter Lean derivations for DB convenience.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & When activated, generate migrations/\allowbreak{}importer/\allowbreak{}frontend contracts from this phase. Do not ask for or store admin write credential keys in chat or repo;\newline use local .env/\allowbreak{}admin execution.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & All global no-go guardrails apply;\newline especially Lean-primary/\allowbreak{}generated-secondary and future database mirror read-only guardrails.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Not implemented. V1.22 records the phase as a non-blocking DB/\allowbreak{}tooling sidechain for future provider-neutral SQL database public read-only mirror and web-frontend work.\\

Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Planning record only. No live database mirror connection, no DB write, no frontend deployment and no Lean source change were performed in V1.22.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & V1.22 only records the sidechain. Active mathematical/\allowbreak{}content cursor remains 1.1.1.1.5.1.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Full updated zip package;\newline no secrets, no .env, no live DB credentials, no generated DB dumps with sensitive keys.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & db\_snapshots with snapshot\_id, lean\_data\_version, lean\_data\_timestamp, planning\_data\_version, planning\_data\_timestamp, tool\_infrastructure\_version, tool\_infrastructure\_timestamp, yaml\_hash, repo\_inventory\_hash, tool\_hash, created\_at, created\_by, source\_zip\_name and optional import\_report\_hash. Source-to-CNNA mapping & Maps CNNA Lean/\allowbreak{}YAML planning metadata into generated-secondary graph/\allowbreak{}database/\allowbreak{}frontend views. It is not a mathematical CNNA input and not a Lean replacement.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on stable YAML identifiers, context/\allowbreak{}significance classification, object/\allowbreak{}proof/\allowbreak{}scratchpad registers, module/\allowbreak{}declaration inventory and explicit edge semantics. Does not release any Lean derivation phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Kept inside main block 21 so the Explorer audit, schema, importer, API, UI, filters, history/\allowbreak{}hypothesis and later lab boundaries remain in one visible sidechain.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Keep Phase 21 as a visible sidechain: audit first, then schema/\allowbreak{}import/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}UI/\allowbreak{}filter/\allowbreak{}history/\allowbreak{}labs/\allowbreak{}deployment.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean module manifest change unless a later explicit source-scan/\allowbreak{}refactor script is implemented. Frontend/\allowbreak{}database files must be recorded as tooling artifacts, not Lean modules.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & CNNA Explorer belongs to documentation/\allowbreak{}review/\allowbreak{}tooling infrastructure. It may visualize Lean/\allowbreak{}YAML-derived metadata but cannot generate mathematical CNNA truth.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse Single-YAML-Master, generated TSV exports, repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export and existing context/\allowbreak{}significance taxonomies. Do not create a second authoritative plan source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & YAML remains the manual planning source. SQL/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}frontend/\allowbreak{}graph/\allowbreak{}PDF outputs remain generated-secondary and reproducible from YAML plus inventory snapshots.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep the Explorer sidechain modular: audit first, schema second, importer/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}UI/\allowbreak{}history/\allowbreak{}labs as separated layers. Do not overload active Lean implementation phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & For Phase 21.0: consolidate with LEG37-LEG41 and preserve source/\allowbreak{}refactor regression expectations. For later frontend/\allowbreak{}database phases: compare generated exports before/\allowbreak{}after and verify no semantic field loss.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No migration executed in V1.28. Phase 21.0 must record field coverage, object/\allowbreak{}declaration coverage, neutral-name candidates, edge-typing coverage and unresolved schema gaps.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & No Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib dependency change. Lean data timestamp remains fixed unless source code changes in a separately verified package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & No ExecComplex change. Later labs can only display ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable witnesses already produced by registered derived paths.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Explorer consumes YAML/\allowbreak{}inventory metadata and read-only SQL/\allowbreak{}API views. It never feeds back into Lean or phase release except as an audit finding routed to the natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Overhead is justified only because the Explorer can otherwise create false visual certainty. Keep Phase 21.0 as the single completeness/\allowbreak{}coherence gate before design/\allowbreak{}implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Check that every child phase consumes CEX0 or earlier CEX outputs and does not bypass Lean-primary/\allowbreak{}generated-secondary boundaries.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & None;\newline tooling/\allowbreak{}refactor/\allowbreak{}database/\allowbreak{}frontend phase, not Lean proof phase. If later Lean-source scan tools are implemented, use explicit parsers/\allowbreak{}exports and avoid semantic inference by filename alone.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & None added. Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib remains at the existing project snapshot unless a separate Lean refactor phase explicitly changes source files.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced or consumed. Later Matrix/\allowbreak{}Approximation Labs may display executable mirror outputs only after their source data is registered and classified.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Concrete traversal is metadata path: Lean module/\allowbreak{}declaration inventory and YAML rows -> normalized graph nodes/\allowbreak{}edges -> SQL mirror rows -> UI projections.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Non-operational metadata path. Later executable/\allowbreak{}Matrix views must show source and classification before rendering computed values.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & For audit/\allowbreak{}schema/\allowbreak{}import phases: reproducible reports, SQL schema/\allowbreak{}import dry-run, graph query samples, and frontend snapshot rendering. Not a Lean mathematical witness.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & None in the planning/\allowbreak{}tooling layer. Any Lean-source parser/\allowbreak{}refactor concern must be routed through the existing Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}import-discipline policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No noncomputable Lean boundary involved. Later labs may not hide noncomputable assumptions behind visual approximations.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Not applicable unless an explicit Lean-facing parser/\allowbreak{}refactor module is added;\newline then isolate from operational path and verify locally.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge closed. Current bridge is metadata/\allowbreak{}query/\allowbreak{}visualization: YAML/\allowbreak{}repo inventory -> SQL/\allowbreak{}public views -> Explorer UI.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If Explorer requirements expose missing fields, patch the YAML/\allowbreak{}export/\allowbreak{}schema or Lean-facing inventory ledger at the natural source layer;\newline do not patch frontend consumers to invent semantics.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & Umbrella ToolInfrastructurePhase;\newline no direct implementation closure and no Lean truth role.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Not implemented. V1.28 records CNNA Explorer main block as part of the CNNA Explorer main block;\newline no Lean source and no frontend/\allowbreak{}database code changed in this package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Planning record only. Closure requires generated audit/\allowbreak{}import/\allowbreak{}frontend evidence recorded in the corresponding proof dossier and scratchpad. No Lean build was run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Planning/\allowbreak{}tooling proof by explicit source separation: Lean code primary, YAML curated semantic mirror, SQL generated read-only mirror, frontend visual/\allowbreak{}query surface only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only after YAML update.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation, regenerate YAML-derived tables/\allowbreak{}TSV/\allowbreak{}PDF, record snapshot/\allowbreak{}import/\allowbreak{}frontend evidence, verify no provider-specific residue, and keep Lean-data timestamp unchanged unless Lean code actually changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a full zip with updated YAML, generated exports/\allowbreak{}tables and PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success unless actually run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Umbrella phase for CNNA Explorer and later Universe Explorer trajectory;\newline child phases own direct CEX objects.\\
