Preparation status & planned-after-predecessor-closure\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & refactor\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & LeanRefactorPhase-style audit;\newline no Lean module move in this phase unless separately authorized and regression-tested.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Explorer Phase 0: YAML/\allowbreak{}refactor/\allowbreak{}source-intake/\allowbreak{}total declaration classification readiness audit\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & CNNA Explorer generated-secondary graph/\allowbreak{}database/\allowbreak{}frontend workflow.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Explorer Phase 0 maps YAML rows and Lean inventory into typed metadata only. It must additionally classify object lifecycle states: current, superseded, renamed-alias, deleted-retired. Historical object rows remain visible and point to successors/\allowbreak{}current dossiers;\newline phases remain historical implementation events and are linked by successor/\allowbreak{}patch edges, never marked outdated.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on LEG5, LEG37-LEG41, CEX10, CEX11, full YAML/\allowbreak{}entity/\allowbreak{}edge/\allowbreak{}lifecycle fields, repo\_inventory raw exports and direct Lean source scan. Explorer design remains blocked until total declaration classification either closes or produces explicit upstream blockers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Kept inside main block 21 so the Explorer audit, schema, importer, API, UI, filters, history/\allowbreak{}hypothesis and later lab boundaries remain in one visible sidechain.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & First build a total declaration classification ledger from existing inventory/\allowbreak{}consumption records, then add manual overrides for triviality/\allowbreak{}significance, then prove every declaration has an owner object or explicit non-object bucket before SQL/\allowbreak{}frontend schema design.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean module manifest change unless a later explicit source-scan/\allowbreak{}refactor script is implemented. Frontend/\allowbreak{}database files must be recorded as tooling artifacts, not Lean modules.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Total Lean declaration classification belongs at the source-intake/\allowbreak{}refactor/\allowbreak{}Explorer-readiness layer, not inside frontend consumers. The frontend must render classifications supplied by CEX11/\allowbreak{}LEG37, never infer truth or triviality by display heuristics.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse Single-YAML-Master, generated TSV exports, repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export, context/\allowbreak{}significance taxonomies and CEX10 lifecycle ledger. Do not duplicate old object dossiers during a patch;\newline retain old row and link to the new current dossier.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & YAML remains the manual planning source. Object lifecycle fields are rendered/\allowbreak{}exported by the generator. SQL/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}frontend/\allowbreak{}graph/\allowbreak{}PDF outputs remain generated-secondary and reproducible from YAML plus inventory snapshots.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep the Explorer sidechain modular: audit first, schema second, importer/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}UI/\allowbreak{}history/\allowbreak{}labs as separated layers. Do not overload active Lean implementation phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & For Phase 21.0: consolidate with LEG37-LEG41 and preserve source/\allowbreak{}refactor regression expectations. For later frontend/\allowbreak{}database phases: compare generated exports before/\allowbreak{}after and verify no semantic field loss.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Phase 21.0 must record field coverage, object/\allowbreak{}declaration coverage, neutral-name candidates, edge-typing coverage, lifecycle-state coverage, successor-pointer coverage, current-dossier-pointer coverage and unresolved schema gaps.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & No Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib dependency change. Lean data timestamp remains fixed unless source code changes in a separately verified package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & No ExecComplex change. Later labs can only display ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable witnesses already produced by registered derived paths.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Explorer consumes YAML/\allowbreak{}inventory metadata and read-only SQL/\allowbreak{}API views. Object lifecycle findings can trigger new planning/\allowbreak{}refactor phases at natural origins;\newline they never overwrite old object rows and never feed directly into Lean as truth.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & The extra classification is justified because without it the Explorer could falsely imply complete source understanding. Generated TSVs should keep the full 8000+ declaration detail out of the main PDF except through summaries and filters.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Check a sample and then the full inventory for exactly-one classification across declaration\_kind, semantic\_role, triviality\_tier, documentation policy, lifecycle\_state, public\_surface\_status and owner bucket. Verify rfl/\allowbreak{}projection declarations with handoff/\allowbreak{}boundary semantics are not demoted by heuristic rules.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & None;\newline tooling/\allowbreak{}refactor/\allowbreak{}database/\allowbreak{}frontend phase, not Lean proof phase. If later Lean-source scan tools are implemented, use explicit parsers/\allowbreak{}exports and avoid semantic inference by filename alone.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & None added. Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib remains at the existing project snapshot unless a separate Lean refactor phase explicitly changes source files.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced or consumed. Later Matrix/\allowbreak{}Approximation Labs may display executable mirror outputs only after their source data is registered and classified.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Concrete traversal is metadata path: Lean module/\allowbreak{}declaration inventory and YAML rows -> normalized graph nodes/\allowbreak{}edges -> SQL mirror rows -> UI projections.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Non-operational metadata path. Later executable/\allowbreak{}Matrix views must show source and classification before rendering computed values.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & For audit/\allowbreak{}schema/\allowbreak{}import phases: reproducible reports, SQL schema/\allowbreak{}import dry-run, graph query samples, and frontend snapshot rendering. Not a Lean mathematical witness.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & None in the planning/\allowbreak{}tooling layer. Any Lean-source parser/\allowbreak{}refactor concern must be routed through the existing Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}import-discipline policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No noncomputable Lean boundary involved. Later labs may not hide noncomputable assumptions behind visual approximations.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Not applicable unless an explicit Lean-facing parser/\allowbreak{}refactor module is added;\newline then isolate from operational path and verify locally.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Blocked until LEG42/\allowbreak{}LEG38/\allowbreak{}LEG39/\allowbreak{}LEG37/\allowbreak{}LEG40/\allowbreak{}LEG41 close. Explorer must not begin on pre-refactor or partially mirrored data.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If Explorer requirements expose missing fields, patch the YAML/\allowbreak{}export/\allowbreak{}schema or Lean-facing inventory ledger at the natural source layer;\newline do not patch frontend consumers to invent semantics.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & LeanRefactorPhase-style audit;\newline no Lean module move in this phase unless separately authorized and regression-tested.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Not implemented as a closed audit. P1.41 makes Explorer readiness explicitly downstream of notation cleanup, neutral refactor, and post-refactor 1:1 Lean mirror closure.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Planning/\allowbreak{}tooling evidence only: CEX11, taxonomy, guardrails and workflows added. Full verification requires a generated total declaration classification ledger over the current Lean snapshot;\newline no Lean build was run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Planning/\allowbreak{}tooling proof by explicit source separation after refactor: Lean code primary, YAML curated semantic mirror of the post-refactor source, SQL generated read-only mirror, frontend visual/\allowbreak{}query surface only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only after YAML update.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation, regenerate YAML-derived tables/\allowbreak{}TSV/\allowbreak{}PDF, verify lifecycle fields are present for every object, verify successor pointers have no accidental cycles, record snapshot/\allowbreak{}import/\allowbreak{}frontend evidence, and keep Lean-data timestamp unchanged unless Lean code actually changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a full zip with updated YAML, generated exports/\allowbreak{}tables and PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success unless actually run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Phase 21.0 must now reject any Explorer-readiness claim based only on consumption classification. It must classify all Lean declarations by kind, role, triviality, documentation policy, lifecycle, public-surface status and owner/\allowbreak{}non-object bucket.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item LEG37\item LEG38\item LEG39\item LEG40\item LEG41\item DBR27\item context\_class\_taxonomy\item object\_significance\_taxonomy\item repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export\item generated\_exports\item CEX10 object lifecycle/\allowbreak{}provenance ledger\item object lifecycle fields: state, predecessor, successor/\allowbreak{}current object, current dossier pointer, lifecycle note\item CEX11 total Lean declaration classification ledger\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item CEX0\item YAML completeness matrix\item edge semantics register\item neutral module-name map\item IST Lean object/\allowbreak{}declaration scan\item CEX11 total Lean declaration classification ledger\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no Explorer/\allowbreak{}SQL/\allowbreak{}frontend row as CNNA truth source\item no public write path\item no hypothesis rendered as verified object\item no Lean-import edge conflated with semantic derivation edge\item CEX11 total Lean declaration classification ledger\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: all global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply, especially Lean-primary/\allowbreak{}generated-secondary and no-public-write rules.\item Explorer views, SQL rows, simulations and hypotheses cannot be cited as derived CNNA objects.\item Kanten müssen ihre Richtung und Semantik explizit deklarieren.\item Object rows may never be destructively overwritten when patched, renamed or retired;\newline old rows must retain provenance and point to the successor/\allowbreak{}current dossier.\item Phases are historical implementation events and must not receive an outdated lifecycle state;\newline use successor/\allowbreak{}patch phase links instead.\item CEX11 total Lean declaration classification ledger\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item LEG37-LEG41\item Repository/\allowbreak{}repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export/\allowbreak{}*.json\item Repository/\allowbreak{}generated\_exports/\allowbreak{}*.tsv\item Repository/\allowbreak{}scripts/\allowbreak{}build\_export\_script\_v1.8.py\item Repository/\allowbreak{}scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item duplicate source-intake audit outside LEG37-LEG41\item phase-semantic module names leaking into Explorer schema\item prose-only edge semantics\item unclassified Lean declarations\item destructive overwrite of patched object\item renamed object losing old dossier\item deleted Lean declaration disappearing from provenance\item phase incorrectly marked outdated instead of linked to patch/\allowbreak{}successor phase\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Source-to-CNNA mapping & Maps CNNA Lean/\allowbreak{}YAML planning metadata into generated-secondary graph/\allowbreak{}database/\allowbreak{}frontend views. It is not a mathematical CNNA input and not a Lean replacement.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on stable YAML identifiers, context/\allowbreak{}significance classification, object/\allowbreak{}proof/\allowbreak{}scratchpad registers, module/\allowbreak{}declaration inventory and explicit edge semantics. Does not release any Lean derivation phase. Also depends on CEX11 whenever declaration nodes, declaration filters, inspector cards or public-surface views are rendered.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Kept inside main block 21 so the Explorer audit, schema, importer, API, UI, filters, history/\allowbreak{}hypothesis and later lab boundaries remain in one visible sidechain.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Create SQL mirror contract after graph schema;\newline every table row must carry snapshot/\allowbreak{}source hash provenance, commit SHA and Lean toolchain metadata. Then split repository safety, CI artifact and Webhosting importer into 21.2.1-21.2.3.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean module manifest change unless a later explicit source-scan/\allowbreak{}refactor script is implemented. Frontend/\allowbreak{}database files must be recorded as tooling artifacts, not Lean modules.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & CNNA Explorer belongs to documentation/\allowbreak{}review/\allowbreak{}tooling infrastructure. It may visualize Lean/\allowbreak{}YAML-derived metadata but cannot generate mathematical CNNA truth.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse Single-YAML-Master, generated TSV exports, repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export and existing context/\allowbreak{}significance taxonomies. Do not create a second authoritative plan source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & YAML remains the manual planning source. SQL/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}frontend/\allowbreak{}graph/\allowbreak{}PDF outputs remain generated-secondary and reproducible from YAML plus inventory snapshots.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep the Explorer sidechain modular: audit first, schema second, importer/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}UI/\allowbreak{}history/\allowbreak{}labs as separated layers. Do not overload active Lean implementation phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & For Phase 21.0: consolidate with LEG37-LEG41 and preserve source/\allowbreak{}refactor regression expectations. For later frontend/\allowbreak{}database phases: compare generated exports before/\allowbreak{}after and verify no semantic field loss.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No migration executed in V1.28. Phase 21.0 must record field coverage, object/\allowbreak{}declaration coverage, neutral-name candidates, edge-typing coverage and unresolved schema gaps.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & No Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib dependency change. Lean data timestamp remains fixed unless source code changes in a separately verified package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & No ExecComplex change. Later labs can only display ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable witnesses already produced by registered derived paths.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Explorer consumes YAML/\allowbreak{}inventory metadata and read-only SQL/\allowbreak{}API views. It never feeds back into Lean or phase release except as an audit finding routed to the natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Overhead is justified only because the Explorer can otherwise create false visual certainty. Keep Phase 21.0 as the single completeness/\allowbreak{}coherence gate before design/\allowbreak{}implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Dry-run expected: emit CI snapshot artifact, import Master YAML/\allowbreak{}generated exports into disposable staging DB, compare row counts and hash coverage, verify no manual-edit truth path and test rollback/\allowbreak{}current-snapshot preservation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & None;\newline tooling/\allowbreak{}refactor/\allowbreak{}database/\allowbreak{}frontend phase, not Lean proof phase. If later Lean-source scan tools are implemented, use explicit parsers/\allowbreak{}exports and avoid semantic inference by filename alone.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & None added. Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib remains at the existing project snapshot unless a separate Lean refactor phase explicitly changes source files.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced or consumed. Later Matrix/\allowbreak{}Approximation Labs may display executable mirror outputs only after their source data is registered and classified.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Concrete traversal is metadata path: Lean module/\allowbreak{}declaration inventory and YAML rows -> normalized graph nodes/\allowbreak{}edges -> SQL mirror rows -> UI projections.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Non-operational metadata path. Later executable/\allowbreak{}Matrix views must show source and classification before rendering computed values.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & For audit/\allowbreak{}schema/\allowbreak{}import phases: reproducible reports, SQL schema/\allowbreak{}import dry-run, graph query samples, and frontend snapshot rendering. Not a Lean mathematical witness.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & None in the planning/\allowbreak{}tooling layer. Any Lean-source parser/\allowbreak{}refactor concern must be routed through the existing Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}import-discipline policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No noncomputable Lean boundary involved. Later labs may not hide noncomputable assumptions behind visual approximations.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Not applicable unless an explicit Lean-facing parser/\allowbreak{}refactor module is added;\newline then isolate from operational path and verify locally.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge closed. Current bridge is metadata/\allowbreak{}query/\allowbreak{}visualization: YAML/\allowbreak{}repo inventory -> SQL/\allowbreak{}public views -> Explorer UI.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If Explorer requirements expose missing fields, patch the YAML/\allowbreak{}export/\allowbreak{}schema or Lean-facing inventory ledger at the natural source layer;\newline do not patch frontend consumers to invent semantics.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & DatabaseMirrorPhase importer/\allowbreak{}schema design;\newline public DB is read-only mirror only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Not implemented. V1.28 records YAML2SQL/\allowbreak{}MySQL-compatible mirror contract as part of the CNNA Explorer main block;\newline no Lean source and no frontend/\allowbreak{}database code changed in this package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Planning record only. Closure requires generated audit/\allowbreak{}import/\allowbreak{}frontend evidence recorded in the corresponding proof dossier and scratchpad. No Lean build was run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Planning/\allowbreak{}tooling proof by explicit source separation: Lean code primary, YAML curated semantic mirror, SQL generated read-only mirror, frontend visual/\allowbreak{}query surface only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only after YAML update.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation, regenerate YAML-derived tables/\allowbreak{}TSV/\allowbreak{}PDF, record snapshot/\allowbreak{}import/\allowbreak{}frontend evidence, verify no provider-specific residue, and keep Lean-data timestamp unchanged unless Lean code actually changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a full zip with updated YAML, generated exports/\allowbreak{}tables and PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success unless actually run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Design deterministic one-way importer and MySQL-compatible schema for Explorer presentation data. P1.37 narrows the robust deployment path: CI emits snapshot artifacts;\newline Webhosting imports locally into staging/\allowbreak{}current read-only mirror rather than treating direct remote-MySQL writes as the default.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item CEX0\item CEX1\item DBR15-DBR18\item generated\_exports\item CEX11\item future GitHub commit/\allowbreak{}build metadata\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item CEX2\item YAML2SQL\item MySQL-compatible mirror\item snapshot artifact import\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no Explorer/\allowbreak{}SQL/\allowbreak{}frontend row as CNNA truth source\item no public write path\item no hypothesis rendered as verified object\item no Lean-import edge conflated with semantic derivation edge\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: all global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply, especially Lean-primary/\allowbreak{}generated-secondary and no-public-write rules.\item Explorer views, SQL rows, simulations and hypotheses cannot be cited as derived CNNA objects.\item Kanten müssen ihre Richtung und Semantik explizit deklarieren.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed added modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item future Repository/\allowbreak{}explorer/\allowbreak{}yaml2sql/\allowbreak{}*\item future SQL migrations/\allowbreak{}importer contract\item future snapshot\_manifest.json schema\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\item Repository/\allowbreak{}generated\_exports/\allowbreak{}*.tsv\item Repository/\allowbreak{}repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export/\allowbreak{}*.json\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item second-source-of-truth risk\item visual-coherence-without-provenance risk\item edge-semantics conflation risk\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Phase split decision & Split under 21.2 because GitHub access/\allowbreak{}backup, CI artifact generation and Webhosting-local MySQL import are distinct source layers and must not be hidden inside the public UI phases.\\

Positive path plan & Implement only after 21.0/\allowbreak{}21.1/\allowbreak{}21.2 supply stable identifiers and schema contracts;\newline then add automation in small verifiable steps with dry-run outputs before production deployment.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean module manifest change. Future CI/\allowbreak{}importer/\allowbreak{}frontend files must be recorded as tooling/\allowbreak{}database artifacts, not Lean modules.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Automation belongs to documentation/\allowbreak{}review/\allowbreak{}tooling infrastructure. It can verify, mirror and display project state, but cannot generate mathematical CNNA truth.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse Single-YAML-Master, generated TSV exports, repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export, Git commit identities and snapshot manifests. Do not create a second authoritative plan source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & Lean remains primary;\newline YAML remains curated planning source;\newline GitHub CI, SQL/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}frontend/\allowbreak{}graph/\allowbreak{}PDF outputs remain generated-secondary and reproducible from commit/\allowbreak{}YAML/\allowbreak{}inventory snapshots.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep automation as small source-layer contracts: repository safety, CI artifact, importer/\allowbreak{}swap, API/\allowbreak{}UI. Avoid a monolithic opaque deployment script.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Compare generated exports before/\allowbreak{}after, check schema compatibility, verify no semantic field loss, and keep previous snapshot importable for rollback.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Closure must record workflow success count, artifact count, checksum coverage, staging/\allowbreak{}current row counts, backup identifiers, rollback test result and unresolved risks.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & No Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib dependency change in this planning update. CI must use repository lean-toolchain/\allowbreak{}lake-manifest and must not silently upgrade mathlib.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & No ExecComplex change. Future labs can only display ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable witnesses already produced by registered derived paths.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Automation consumes repository/\allowbreak{}YAML/\allowbreak{}inventory data and emits generated artifacts/\allowbreak{}read-only views. It never feeds back into Lean or phase release except as an audit finding routed to the natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Overhead is justified because unattended automation can otherwise convert generated mirrors into false authority. Keep contracts small and testable.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Expected rehearsal: create backup tag/\allowbreak{}branch, create work branch, run CI, emit snapshot artifacts, import into staging DB, validate row/\allowbreak{}hash coverage, atomically swap read-only views, then demonstrate rollback.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & None;\newline infrastructure phase, not Lean proof phase. Use deterministic scripts, explicit manifests, checksum comparison, least-privilege credentials and branch protection rather than heuristic inference.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & None added. Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib remains at the existing project snapshot unless a separate Lean phase explicitly changes source files.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced or consumed. Later executable displays may consume only already registered computable outputs.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Concrete traversal is automation path: commit SHA -> CI build status/\allowbreak{}artifacts -> snapshot manifest/\allowbreak{}hashes -> staging import -> read-only current snapshot -> Explorer/\allowbreak{}API projection.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Non-operational metadata path. It is concrete infrastructure, but not a Lean mathematical computation path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & Concrete witness is a reproducible workflow run, artifact manifest, importer dry-run, staging validation report, read-only access test and rollback test.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & None in the planning/\allowbreak{}tooling layer. Lean CI must pin the project lean-toolchain/\allowbreak{}lake-manifest and report exact versions.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No noncomputable Lean boundary involved. CI must not hide Lean errors or sorry/\allowbreak{}axiom exceptions behind a green deployment status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Not applicable unless a separate Lean-facing source scanner/\allowbreak{}refactor module is added;\newline then isolate from operational proof paths and verify locally/\allowbreak{}CI.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge closed. Bridge is metadata/\allowbreak{}automation only: GitHub commit/\allowbreak{}build/\allowbreak{}artifact -> YAML/\allowbreak{}inventory snapshot -> SQL mirror -> read-only Explorer/\allowbreak{}API.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If automation exposes missing metadata, patch the natural source layer: Lean source/\allowbreak{}inventory/\allowbreak{}YAML/\allowbreak{}export/\allowbreak{}schema, never the consumer frontend or SQL row by manual invention.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & GitHub repository safety automation contract;\newline no public deployment or direct DB write in P1.37.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Not implemented. P1.37 records the GitHub/\allowbreak{}Webhosting/\allowbreak{}MySQL automation contract in the planning layer only;\newline no Lean source, CI workflow, database or frontend code changed in this package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Planning record only. Closure requires concrete GitHub workflow files, artifact manifests, importer dry-runs, backup/\allowbreak{}rollback tests and generated evidence in the corresponding proof dossier. No Lean build was run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Tooling proof by explicit source/\allowbreak{}provenance separation: Lean code primary, GitHub CI verifies builds and emits artifacts, YAML/\allowbreak{}inventory supply curated metadata, SQL/\allowbreak{}Webhosting mirrors are read-only/\allowbreak{}generated-secondary.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only after YAML update.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation, regenerate YAML-derived tables/\allowbreak{}TSV/\allowbreak{}PDF, record workflow/\allowbreak{}import/\allowbreak{}rollback evidence, verify no credential leakage and keep Lean-data timestamp unchanged unless Lean code actually changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a full zip with updated YAML, generated exports/\allowbreak{}tables and PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success unless actually run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Design repository safety before CI/\allowbreak{}import deployment: never treat assistant/\allowbreak{}API access as license to mutate main directly;\newline create a recoverable backup pointer first.\\

Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item CEX0-CEX2\item GitHub repository default branch\item future GitHub App/\allowbreak{}API permissions\item branch-protection policy\end{itemize}\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Compare generated exports before/\allowbreak{}after, check schema compatibility, verify no semantic field loss, and keep previous snapshot importable for rollback.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Closure must record workflow success count, artifact count, checksum coverage, staging/\allowbreak{}current row counts, backup identifiers, rollback test result and unresolved risks.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & No Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib dependency change in this planning update. CI must use repository lean-toolchain/\allowbreak{}lake-manifest and must not silently upgrade mathlib.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & No ExecComplex change. Future labs can only display ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable witnesses already produced by registered derived paths.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Automation consumes repository/\allowbreak{}YAML/\allowbreak{}inventory data and emits generated artifacts/\allowbreak{}read-only views. It never feeds back into Lean or phase release except as an audit finding routed to the natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Overhead is justified because unattended automation can otherwise convert generated mirrors into false authority. Keep contracts small and testable.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Expected rehearsal: create backup tag/\allowbreak{}branch, create work branch, run CI, emit snapshot artifacts, import into staging DB, validate row/\allowbreak{}hash coverage, atomically swap read-only views, then demonstrate rollback.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & None;\newline infrastructure phase, not Lean proof phase. Use deterministic scripts, explicit manifests, checksum comparison, least-privilege credentials and branch protection rather than heuristic inference.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & None added. Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib remains at the existing project snapshot unless a separate Lean phase explicitly changes source files.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced or consumed. Later executable displays may consume only already registered computable outputs.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Concrete traversal is automation path: commit SHA -> CI build status/\allowbreak{}artifacts -> snapshot manifest/\allowbreak{}hashes -> staging import -> read-only current snapshot -> Explorer/\allowbreak{}API projection.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Non-operational metadata path. It is concrete infrastructure, but not a Lean mathematical computation path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & Concrete witness is a reproducible workflow run, artifact manifest, importer dry-run, staging validation report, read-only access test and rollback test.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & None in the planning/\allowbreak{}tooling layer. Lean CI must pin the project lean-toolchain/\allowbreak{}lake-manifest and report exact versions.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & No noncomputable Lean boundary involved. CI must not hide Lean errors or sorry/\allowbreak{}axiom exceptions behind a green deployment status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Not applicable unless a separate Lean-facing source scanner/\allowbreak{}refactor module is added;\newline then isolate from operational proof paths and verify locally/\allowbreak{}CI.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & No mathematical bridge closed. Bridge is metadata/\allowbreak{}automation only: GitHub commit/\allowbreak{}build/\allowbreak{}artifact -> YAML/\allowbreak{}inventory snapshot -> SQL mirror -> read-only Explorer/\allowbreak{}API.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If automation exposes missing metadata, patch the natural source layer: Lean source/\allowbreak{}inventory/\allowbreak{}YAML/\allowbreak{}export/\allowbreak{}schema, never the consumer frontend or SQL row by manual invention.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & CI artifact automation contract;\newline no public deployment or direct DB write in P1.37.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Not implemented. P1.37 records the GitHub/\allowbreak{}Webhosting/\allowbreak{}MySQL automation contract in the planning layer only;\newline no Lean source, CI workflow, database or frontend code changed in this package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Planning record only. Closure requires concrete GitHub workflow files, artifact manifests, importer dry-runs, backup/\allowbreak{}rollback tests and generated evidence in the corresponding proof dossier. No Lean build was run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Tooling proof by explicit source/\allowbreak{}provenance separation: Lean code primary, GitHub CI verifies builds and emits artifacts, YAML/\allowbreak{}inventory supply curated metadata, SQL/\allowbreak{}Webhosting mirrors are read-only/\allowbreak{}generated-secondary.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only after YAML update.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation, regenerate YAML-derived tables/\allowbreak{}TSV/\allowbreak{}PDF, record workflow/\allowbreak{}import/\allowbreak{}rollback evidence, verify no credential leakage and keep Lean-data timestamp unchanged unless Lean code actually changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a full zip with updated YAML, generated exports/\allowbreak{}tables and PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success unless actually run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Design CI as a bounded verifier/\allowbreak{}exporter. Green status is build/\allowbreak{}check success only, not semantic infallibility.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item CEX12\item lean-toolchain\item lake-manifest\item generated\_exports\item repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item CEX13\item lake build CI\item inventory scan\item snapshot\_manifest.json\item artifact upload\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no direct write to main as normal assistant workflow\item no public MySQL write path\item no SQL/\allowbreak{}Explorer row as CNNA truth source\item no CI-green status treated as semantic infallibility\item no credentials in browser/\allowbreak{}chat/\allowbreak{}repository plaintext\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: all global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply, especially Lean-primary/\allowbreak{}generated-secondary, no-public-write and natural-source patching rules.\item Automation outputs cannot release Lean derivation phases unless the underlying Lean/\allowbreak{}YAML object evidence is already present.\item GitHub, SQL, API and Explorer layers are audit/\allowbreak{}review surfaces, never CNNA generators.\end{itemize}\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\item Repository/\allowbreak{}generated\_exports/\allowbreak{}*.tsv\item Repository/\allowbreak{}repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export/\allowbreak{}*.json\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item second-source-of-truth risk\item direct-main-write risk\item remote-DB-write risk\item unversioned-snapshot risk\item rollback-gap risk\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\subsection*{Phase 21.2.4 -- CI build-result phase-state controller: red build creates visible failure snapshot and upstream repair phase;\newline green build closes active phase and advances the cursor}
\label{impl:phase-21-2-4}
\par\smallskip\noindent\begin{minipage}{0.99\linewidth}\footnotesize\raggedright\textbf{Table legend.} \colorbox{green!18}{\strut G} = green/closed and derived-only; \colorbox{white}{\strut W} = white/non-direct-Lean tooling/refactor/infrastructure/documentation/comparison; \colorbox{orange!28}{\strut O} = orange/implementable after stated predecessor closure; \colorbox{yellow!25}{\strut Y} = yellow/active and implementable now; \colorbox{red!20}{\strut R} = red/locked Lean-derivation phase; release requires derived-only object/proof evidence. Context class is orthogonal to status.\end{minipage}\par\vspace{0.25em}
\begin{longtable}{L{0.16\linewidth} L{0.81\linewidth}}
\hline
\textbf{Field} & \textbf{Record}\\
\hline
Phase status & \cellcolor{white}W\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Context class & ToolInfrastructurePhase\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation tier & F1\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation depth requirement & Extended dossier: state machine definition, source registers, red/\allowbreak{}green transition invariants, generated repair-phase schema, closeout evidence, rollback/\allowbreak{}no-deploy guarantees and semantic uncertainty.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change version & P1.39\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change timestamp & 2026-05-12T07:55:00+02:00\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation status & planned-not-active\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation status & planned-not-active\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & infrastructure\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & CI phase-state controller with red repair predecessor and green closeout/\allowbreak{}cursor advance.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & CI build-result phase-state controller, visible red failure snapshot and automatic repair-phase generator\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & CI build-result phase-transition workflow.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Maps CI/\allowbreak{}build evidence into generated-secondary planning-state changes. It is infrastructure only and cannot create mathematical CNNA truth or pillar handoff data.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on repository backup/\allowbreak{}PR discipline, CI snapshot artifacts, Webhosting no-deploy guarantees, typed phase/\allowbreak{}object dependencies and a deterministic next-active-phase selection rule. Does not release any Lean derivation phase by itself.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Split after 21.2.3 because CI result feedback is neither the repository safety contract, nor the artifact generator, nor the MySQL importer. It is the governance state machine that consumes their evidence.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & First specify manifest schemas and transition invariants;\newline then implement dry-run mode that emits YAML patches for red and green cases;\newline only after review allow PR-based application of those patches.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean module manifest change. Future CI/\allowbreak{}controller files must be recorded as tooling artifacts, not Lean modules.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & CEX15 belongs to CI/\allowbreak{}governance infrastructure. It updates planning metadata from build evidence but cannot generate mathematical CNNA truth.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse Post-green closeout, Gap localization/\allowbreak{}backjump, Natural-origin missing-structure and GitHub backup-gated workflows;\newline do not create a parallel uncontrolled status system.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & Lean remains primary;\newline YAML remains curated planning source;\newline CEX15 produces reviewable YAML patches/\allowbreak{}manifests rather than mutating truth state silently.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep the controller small: parse result, validate evidence, choose transition, emit manifest/\allowbreak{}YAML patch. Do not combine with Lean build, DB importer or frontend code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Compare YAML/\allowbreak{}table diffs for red and green fixtures;\newline verify repair phases are inserted before blocked phases and green closeout does not alter unrelated phases/\allowbreak{}objects.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & Closure must record red fixture count, green fixture count, generated repair phase fields, cursor uniqueness check, no-deploy/\allowbreak{}no-merge checks and unresolved localization risks.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & No Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib dependency change in this planning update. CI must use repository lean-toolchain/\allowbreak{}lake-manifest and must not silently upgrade mathlib.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & No ExecComplex change. Future labs can only display ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable witnesses already produced by registered derived paths.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & CEX15 consumes CI evidence and planning metadata, then emits generated-secondary YAML patches/\allowbreak{}manifests. It never feeds mathematical content into Lean or handoffs.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Overhead is justified because automated green/\allowbreak{}red status changes can otherwise corrupt the active phase order. Keep the controller evidence-driven and auditable.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Red rehearsal: failed Lean job -> attempted phase R -> failure log references -> visible red\_failure\_snapshot.json/\allowbreak{}history entry -> generated predecessor repair phase with source dependencies/\allowbreak{}object-link policy/\allowbreak{}scratchpad/\allowbreak{}dossier stubs -> no merge and no production/\allowbreak{}current import/\allowbreak{}deploy. Green rehearsal: successful Lean/\allowbreak{}scans/\allowbreak{}artifacts -> active phase G -> linked records closed -> next dependency-complete phase selected -> exactly one active cursor.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & None;\newline infrastructure phase, not Lean proof phase. Use explicit state-machine code, dependency graph traversal, manifest validation and generated YAML patches instead of heuristic prose edits.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If red CI exposes missing structure, the generated repair phase must be inserted before the blocked phase at the earliest known natural origin. If the origin cannot be localized automatically, the repair phase is created as a localization gate and remains red/\allowbreak{}yellow until manual or scripted localization proves its source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & CI phase-state controller contract;\newline no repository mutation or deployment in P1.38.\\

How implemented & Not implemented. P1.39 refines the P1.38 planning rule: red CI still cannot merge or update production/\allowbreak{}current mirrors, but it must emit a visible read-only failure-history snapshot and generated repair predecessor. No Lean source, CI workflow, GitHub bot, database or frontend code changed in this package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Planning record only. Closure requires concrete GitHub Actions run examples, red-run failure manifest, visible red failure snapshot, generated repair-phase YAML patch, green closeout/\allowbreak{}cursor manifest and no-production-current-deploy evidence for red CI. No Lean build was run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Tooling proof by state-machine invariants: two normal CI conclusions;\newline red blocks merge/\allowbreak{}deploy and creates repair predecessor;\newline green closes active phase and advances cursor only through evidence;\newline all outputs remain generated-secondary.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only after YAML update.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation, test red and green dry-runs, regenerate YAML-derived tables/\allowbreak{}TSV/\allowbreak{}PDF, record transition manifests, verify no credential leakage, no direct-main writes and no public DB writes. Lean-data timestamp changes only if Lean code changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a full zip with updated YAML, generated exports/\allowbreak{}tables and PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success unless actually run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Implement as a deterministic controller over generated planning metadata. Red Lean CI must not patch the consumer blindly;\newline it creates/\allowbreak{}activates a predecessor repair phase at the natural source layer, records failure evidence and emits a visible failure-history artifact. Green Lean CI closes only with required evidence and advances exactly one active cursor.\\

Module implementation manifest & No Lean module manifest change unless a later explicit source-scan/\allowbreak{}refactor script is implemented. Frontend/\allowbreak{}database files must be recorded as tooling artifacts, not Lean modules.\\

Semantic placement decision & CNNA Explorer belongs to documentation/\allowbreak{}review/\allowbreak{}tooling infrastructure. It may visualize Lean/\allowbreak{}YAML-derived metadata but cannot generate mathematical CNNA truth.\\

Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse Single-YAML-Master, generated TSV exports, repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export and existing context/\allowbreak{}significance taxonomies. Do not create a second authoritative plan source.\\

Canonical generator policy & YAML remains the manual planning source. SQL/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}frontend/\allowbreak{}graph/\allowbreak{}PDF outputs remain generated-secondary and reproducible from YAML plus inventory snapshots.\\

Module compactness rule & Keep the Explorer sidechain modular: audit first, schema second, importer/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}UI/\allowbreak{}history/\allowbreak{}labs as separated layers. Do not overload active Lean implementation phases.\\

Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Planning record only. Closure requires generated audit/\allowbreak{}import/\allowbreak{}frontend evidence recorded in the corresponding proof dossier and scratchpad. No Lean build was run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Planning/\allowbreak{}tooling proof by explicit source separation: Lean code primary, YAML curated semantic mirror, SQL generated read-only mirror, frontend visual/\allowbreak{}query surface only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build run;\newline no Lean source changed. Python table/\allowbreak{}PDF generation only after YAML update.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & After implementation, regenerate YAML-derived tables/\allowbreak{}TSV/\allowbreak{}PDF, record snapshot/\allowbreak{}import/\allowbreak{}frontend evidence, verify no provider-specific residue, and keep Lean-data timestamp unchanged unless Lean code actually changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a full zip with updated YAML, generated exports/\allowbreak{}tables and PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success unless actually run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Define inspector cards and translation/\allowbreak{}explanation surfaces while preserving code identifiers unchanged.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item CEX1-CEX4\item object/\allowbreak{}proof/\allowbreak{}scratchpad registers\item context docs\item CEX11\item CEX12-CEX15\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item CEX5\item inspector cards\item localized explanation schema\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no Explorer/\allowbreak{}SQL/\allowbreak{}frontend row as CNNA truth source\item no public write path\item no hypothesis rendered as verified object\item no Lean-import edge conflated with semantic derivation edge\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: all global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply, especially Lean-primary/\allowbreak{}generated-secondary and no-public-write rules.\item Explorer views, SQL rows, simulations and hypotheses cannot be cited as derived CNNA objects.\item Kanten müssen ihre Richtung und Semantik explizit deklarieren.\item P1.37: public UI/\allowbreak{}API must expose only read-only validated snapshots and must not expose importer/\allowbreak{}admin credentials or direct write endpoints.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed added modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item future Repository/\allowbreak{}explorer/\allowbreak{}frontend/\allowbreak{}*\item future localized\_text schema\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proposed modified modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}masters/\allowbreak{}cnna\_roadmap\_master.yaml\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Repository/\allowbreak{}scripts/\allowbreak{}generate\_tables.py\item Repository/\allowbreak{}generated\_exports/\allowbreak{}*.tsv\item Repository/\allowbreak{}repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export/\allowbreak{}*.json\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item second-source-of-truth risk\item visual-coherence-without-provenance risk\item edge-semantics conflation risk\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Title /\allowbreak{} state & Explorer filter and projection engine\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & CNNA Explorer generated-secondary graph/\allowbreak{}database/\allowbreak{}frontend workflow.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & Maps CNNA Lean/\allowbreak{}YAML planning metadata into generated-secondary graph/\allowbreak{}database/\allowbreak{}frontend views. It is not a mathematical CNNA input and not a Lean replacement.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & Depends on stable YAML identifiers, context/\allowbreak{}significance classification, object/\allowbreak{}proof/\allowbreak{}scratchpad registers, module/\allowbreak{}declaration inventory and explicit edge semantics. Does not release any Lean derivation phase. Also depends on CEX11 whenever declaration nodes, declaration filters, inspector cards or public-surface views are rendered.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Kept inside main block 21 so the Explorer audit, schema, importer, API, UI, filters, history/\allowbreak{}hypothesis and later lab boundaries remain in one visible sidechain.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Implement projection model after graph/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}inspector contracts;\newline keep derivation/\allowbreak{}import/\allowbreak{}handoff/\allowbreak{}reference/\allowbreak{}hypothesis views independently selectable.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean module manifest change unless a later explicit source-scan/\allowbreak{}refactor script is implemented. Frontend/\allowbreak{}database files must be recorded as tooling artifacts, not Lean modules.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & CNNA Explorer belongs to documentation/\allowbreak{}review/\allowbreak{}tooling infrastructure. It may visualize Lean/\allowbreak{}YAML-derived metadata but cannot generate mathematical CNNA truth.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse Single-YAML-Master, generated TSV exports, repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export and existing context/\allowbreak{}significance taxonomies. Do not create a second authoritative plan source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & YAML remains the manual planning source. SQL/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}frontend/\allowbreak{}graph/\allowbreak{}PDF outputs remain generated-secondary and reproducible from YAML plus inventory snapshots.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep the Explorer sidechain modular: audit first, schema second, importer/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}UI/\allowbreak{}history/\allowbreak{}labs as separated layers. Do not overload active Lean implementation phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & For Phase 21.0: consolidate with LEG37-LEG41 and preserve source/\allowbreak{}refactor regression expectations. For later frontend/\allowbreak{}database phases: compare generated exports before/\allowbreak{}after and verify no semantic field loss.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No migration executed in V1.28. Phase 21.0 must record field coverage, object/\allowbreak{}declaration coverage, neutral-name candidates, edge-typing coverage and unresolved schema gaps.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & No Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib dependency change. Lean data timestamp remains fixed unless source code changes in a separately verified package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & No ExecComplex change. Later labs can only display ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable witnesses already produced by registered derived paths.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Explorer consumes YAML/\allowbreak{}inventory metadata and read-only SQL/\allowbreak{}API views. It never feeds back into Lean or phase release except as an audit finding routed to the natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Overhead is justified only because the Explorer can otherwise create false visual certainty. Keep Phase 21.0 as the single completeness/\allowbreak{}coherence gate before design/\allowbreak{}implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Rehearse filters on representative use cases: Pillar A DtN path, active phase chain, blocked red phases, blue reference gates, and module import hotspots.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & None;\newline tooling/\allowbreak{}refactor/\allowbreak{}database/\allowbreak{}frontend phase, not Lean proof phase. If later Lean-source scan tools are implemented, use explicit parsers/\allowbreak{}exports and avoid semantic inference by filename alone.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & None added. Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib remains at the existing project snapshot unless a separate Lean refactor phase explicitly changes source files.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced or consumed. Later Matrix/\allowbreak{}Approximation Labs may display executable mirror outputs only after their source data is registered and classified.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Concrete traversal is metadata path: Lean module/\allowbreak{}declaration inventory and YAML rows -> normalized graph nodes/\allowbreak{}edges -> SQL mirror rows -> UI projections.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Non-operational metadata path. Later executable/\allowbreak{}Matrix views must show source and classification before rendering computed values.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & For audit/\allowbreak{}schema/\allowbreak{}import phases: reproducible reports, SQL schema/\allowbreak{}import dry-run, graph query samples, and frontend snapshot rendering. Not a Lean mathematical witness.\\

Mathlib complication log & None in the planning/\allowbreak{}tooling layer. Any Lean-source parser/\allowbreak{}refactor concern must be routed through the existing Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}import-discipline policy.\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Semantic placement decision & CNNA Explorer belongs to documentation/\allowbreak{}review/\allowbreak{}tooling infrastructure. It may visualize Lean/\allowbreak{}YAML-derived metadata but cannot generate mathematical CNNA truth.\\

Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse Single-YAML-Master, generated TSV exports, repo\_inventory/\allowbreak{}raw\_export and existing context/\allowbreak{}significance taxonomies. Do not create a second authoritative plan source.\\

Canonical generator policy & YAML remains the manual planning source. SQL/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}frontend/\allowbreak{}graph/\allowbreak{}PDF outputs remain generated-secondary and reproducible from YAML plus inventory snapshots.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Keep the Explorer sidechain modular: audit first, schema second, importer/\allowbreak{}API/\allowbreak{}UI/\allowbreak{}history/\allowbreak{}labs as separated layers. Do not overload active Lean implementation phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & For Phase 21.0: consolidate with LEG37-LEG41 and preserve source/\allowbreak{}refactor regression expectations. For later frontend/\allowbreak{}database phases: compare generated exports before/\allowbreak{}after and verify no semantic field loss.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & No migration executed in V1.28. Phase 21.0 must record field coverage, object/\allowbreak{}declaration coverage, neutral-name candidates, edge-typing coverage and unresolved schema gaps.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & No Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib dependency change. Lean data timestamp remains fixed unless source code changes in a separately verified package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & No ExecComplex change. Later labs can only display ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable witnesses already produced by registered derived paths.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Explorer consumes YAML/\allowbreak{}inventory metadata and read-only SQL/\allowbreak{}API views. It never feeds back into Lean or phase release except as an audit finding routed to the natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Overhead is justified only because the Explorer can otherwise create false visual certainty. Keep Phase 21.0 as the single completeness/\allowbreak{}coherence gate before design/\allowbreak{}implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Check every prospective lab element against provenance, computable-path status, snapshot source, and visual-disclaimer requirements.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & None;\newline tooling/\allowbreak{}refactor/\allowbreak{}database/\allowbreak{}frontend phase, not Lean proof phase. If later Lean-source scan tools are implemented, use explicit parsers/\allowbreak{}exports and avoid semantic inference by filename alone.\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex object introduced or consumed. Later Matrix/\allowbreak{}Approximation Labs may display executable mirror outputs only after their source data is registered and classified.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Concrete traversal is metadata path: Lean module/\allowbreak{}declaration inventory and YAML rows -> normalized graph nodes/\allowbreak{}edges -> SQL mirror rows -> UI projections.\\

Mathlib complication log & None in the planning/\allowbreak{}tooling layer. Any Lean-source parser/\allowbreak{}refactor concern must be routed through the existing Lean 4.28.0/\allowbreak{}import-discipline policy.\\

Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Planning record only. Closure requires generated audit/\allowbreak{}import/\allowbreak{}frontend evidence recorded in the corresponding proof dossier and scratchpad. No Lean build was run.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Phase split decision & Split into a roadmap-integration block plus concrete future Lean/\allowbreak{}reference phases so broad roadmap prose does not become a single opaque dependency.\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & No generator change to CNNA mathematics. The planning generator only renders the new audit rows.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Future code phases must use neutral, role-based modules and avoid phase-semantic public API names.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & If future refactor/\allowbreak{}de-seeding occurs: wrapper-first, importgraph cycle test, old-path regression oracle, rollback snapshot, and non-destructive lifecycle record.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & To be filled only when real code refactoring is executed: declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Lean toolchain remains lean-4.28.0 unless a separate upgrade phase is opened.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2/\allowbreak{}EXEC-4 when relevant;\newline roadmap analytic objects do not alter operational ExecComplex by themselves.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Future consumers may read only through explicit A->B/\allowbreak{}C/\allowbreak{}D/\allowbreak{}E or B/\allowbreak{}C/\allowbreak{}D/\allowbreak{}E->A handoff gates. Roadmap rows do not create new consumption rights.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Roadmap integration is intentionally governance-heavy because it prevents silent import of legacy scaffold semantics into future Lean phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Close the representation chain ComplementGNS -> SeparatingProperty -> TomitaTakesakiData/\allowbreak{}ModularConjugation -> ComplementKMS -> ComplementSpectrumCondition before BW/\allowbreak{}CPT/\allowbreak{}spin-statistics/\allowbreak{}Kramers readings. Bright-only recovery is insufficient for a full-derived QFT face.\\

Expected tactics & Future Lean implementation should prefer explicit constructors, source maps, gate records, module-local lemmas and structural projections;\newline avoid consumer-side patches and fragile rewrite chains.\\

Bridge gap status & Roadmap-derived gaps are registered as phase/\allowbreak{}object obligations. A gap is not closed by appearing in the uploaded roadmap.\\

Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with updated YAML, generated tables/\allowbreak{}exports and compiled PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success without a current Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Lean toolchain remains lean-4.28.0 unless a separate upgrade phase is opened.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2/\allowbreak{}EXEC-4 when relevant;\newline roadmap analytic objects do not alter operational ExecComplex by themselves.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Future consumers may read only through explicit A->B/\allowbreak{}C/\allowbreak{}D/\allowbreak{}E or B/\allowbreak{}C/\allowbreak{}D/\allowbreak{}E->A handoff gates. Roadmap rows do not create new consumption rights.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Roadmap integration is intentionally governance-heavy because it prevents silent import of legacy scaffold semantics into future Lean phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Replace primitive branching, L\_max, beta and numerical regularizers by derived selectors, horizon/\allowbreak{}fixed-point data or explicitly marked residual variables before AS/\allowbreak{}NCG/\allowbreak{}window language is allowed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Future Lean implementation should prefer explicit constructors, source maps, gate records, module-local lemmas and structural projections;\newline avoid consumer-side patches and fragile rewrite chains.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Not determined at planning-integration stage. Later phases must verify imports against Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0 before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No direct ExecComplex change. Numeric or finite mirrors remain comparison/\allowbreak{}operational layers only after exact source provenance exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not applicable until a future Lean derivation phase selects concrete finite/\allowbreak{}computable witnesses.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline roadmap chain sheets are obligations, not executable witnesses.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Potential heavy AQFT/\allowbreak{}LCQFT/\allowbreak{}DHR/\allowbreak{}DR/\allowbreak{}Nuclearity formalization pressure;\newline implementation phases must isolate comparison/\allowbreak{}noncomputable material.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & All analytic/\allowbreak{}QFT reference structures remain non-operational until CNNA-derived finite/\allowbreak{}exact source objects and allowed mirror layers are defined.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If imports are too heavy or noncomputable, create minimal target profiles/\allowbreak{}gates and keep established theory in reference layers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Roadmap-derived gaps are registered as phase/\allowbreak{}object obligations. A gap is not closed by appearing in the uploaded roadmap.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to source-map, notational, de-seeding, or pillar-handoff origin when a later gate exposes missing structure.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & When this phase is executed as code, use the standardized positive-path workflow, cite exact source objects, update dossiers/\allowbreak{}scratchpads, and package the complete repository/\allowbreak{}tool state.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited, including roadmap-specific additions GNG46-GNG50.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planned integration/\allowbreak{}audit phase. No Lean code has been implemented in this package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Planning evidence comes from the uploaded original roadmap TeX and the current YAML/\allowbreak{}tool state. The roadmap is treated as reference/\allowbreak{}migration material, not as a checked Lean source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Reference-audit/\allowbreak{}roadmap-integration only at this stage;\newline later Lean phases must use explicit derived-only source objects and proof-carrying structures.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build was run;\newline no Lean files were changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Check that every accepted roadmap item has either a concrete object/\allowbreak{}phase/\allowbreak{}gate or an explicit rejection/\allowbreak{}deferment reason.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with updated YAML, generated tables/\allowbreak{}exports and compiled PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success without a current Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Before implementation, translate every accepted roadmap element into object-owned dossiers, source maps, gates, and phase dependencies. Do not import external theory or legacy scaffold semantics as CNNA axioms.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Uploaded CNNA\_Roadmap\_v0605\_revised\_v38\_reviewfix\_umlaute.tex\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no legacy roadmap claim treated as a Lean theorem\item no boundary-first shortcut promoted to core\item no Seed/\allowbreak{}Scaffold/\allowbreak{}Window de-seeded without source map and gate closure\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply.\item roadmap-reference material is not CNNA-generative data\item no de-seeding without source-map and derived-only gate\item no full-derived QFT face without complement-net modular chain\item no matter semantics from time reversal alone\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item ComplementGNS vs existing GNSProfile\item SplitPropertyProfile vs NuclearitySeed\item TimeReversal vs Matter\item GlobalStateCone vs causal cone\end{itemize}\\

\end{longtable}
