\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & All accepted items remain downstream of explicit CNNA source/\allowbreak{}handoff objects. If a needed source map is missing, the phase stays red or reference-only until the natural-origin predecessor exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Split into a roadmap-integration block plus concrete future Lean/\allowbreak{}reference phases so broad roadmap prose does not become a single opaque dependency.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Route the roadmap obligation into source-map-backed CNNA objects;\newline execute only after predecessor closure.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean module implementation in this package. Future module targets are recorded as planned/\allowbreak{}reference targets only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Roadmap content is placed as legacy-reference/\allowbreak{}migration audit, not as a new foundation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Avoid duplicating existing B/\allowbreak{}C/\allowbreak{}D/\allowbreak{}E phase rows;\newline sharpen them or add narrowly scoped child phases only where roadmap obligations were missing.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & No generator change to CNNA mathematics. The planning generator only renders the new audit rows.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Future code phases must use neutral, role-based modules and avoid phase-semantic public API names.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & If future refactor/\allowbreak{}de-seeding occurs: wrapper-first, importgraph cycle test, old-path regression oracle, rollback snapshot, and non-destructive lifecycle record.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & To be filled only when real code refactoring is executed: declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Lean toolchain remains lean-4.28.0 unless a separate upgrade phase is opened.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2/\allowbreak{}EXEC-4 when relevant;\newline roadmap analytic objects do not alter operational ExecComplex by themselves.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Future consumers may read only through explicit A->B/\allowbreak{}C/\allowbreak{}D/\allowbreak{}E or B/\allowbreak{}C/\allowbreak{}D/\allowbreak{}E->A handoff gates. Roadmap rows do not create new consumption rights.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Roadmap integration is intentionally governance-heavy because it prevents silent import of legacy scaffold semantics into future Lean phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Keep particle/\allowbreak{}scattering/\allowbreak{}IR physics visible as late horizon windows after charge reconstruction and spectral control, especially for long-range/\allowbreak{}QED-like charges, without making them immediate CNNA-core blockers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Future Lean implementation should prefer explicit constructors, source maps, gate records, module-local lemmas and structural projections;\newline avoid consumer-side patches and fragile rewrite chains.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Not determined at planning-integration stage. Later phases must verify imports against Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0 before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No direct ExecComplex change. Numeric or finite mirrors remain comparison/\allowbreak{}operational layers only after exact source provenance exists.\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Bridge gap status & Roadmap-derived gaps are registered as phase/\allowbreak{}object obligations. A gap is not closed by appearing in the uploaded roadmap.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

Build result & No Lean build was run;\newline no Lean files were changed.\\

ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2/\allowbreak{}EXEC-4 when relevant;\newline roadmap analytic objects do not alter operational ExecComplex by themselves.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Future consumers may read only through explicit A->B/\allowbreak{}C/\allowbreak{}D/\allowbreak{}E or B/\allowbreak{}C/\allowbreak{}D/\allowbreak{}E->A handoff gates. Roadmap rows do not create new consumption rights.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Roadmap integration is intentionally governance-heavy because it prevents silent import of legacy scaffold semantics into future Lean phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Ensure the original roadmap definition/\allowbreak{}notation rules become total YAML/\allowbreak{}Explorer constraints: registers may not create new objects and every non-meta form must point to a canonical object.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Future Lean implementation should prefer explicit constructors, source maps, gate records, module-local lemmas and structural projections;\newline avoid consumer-side patches and fragile rewrite chains.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Not determined at planning-integration stage. Later phases must verify imports against Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0 before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No direct ExecComplex change. Numeric or finite mirrors remain comparison/\allowbreak{}operational layers only after exact source provenance exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not applicable until a future Lean derivation phase selects concrete finite/\allowbreak{}computable witnesses.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline roadmap chain sheets are obligations, not executable witnesses.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Potential heavy AQFT/\allowbreak{}LCQFT/\allowbreak{}DHR/\allowbreak{}DR/\allowbreak{}Nuclearity formalization pressure;\newline implementation phases must isolate comparison/\allowbreak{}noncomputable material.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & All analytic/\allowbreak{}QFT reference structures remain non-operational until CNNA-derived finite/\allowbreak{}exact source objects and allowed mirror layers are defined.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If imports are too heavy or noncomputable, create minimal target profiles/\allowbreak{}gates and keep established theory in reference layers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Roadmap-derived gaps are registered as phase/\allowbreak{}object obligations. A gap is not closed by appearing in the uploaded roadmap.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to source-map, notational, de-seeding, or pillar-handoff origin when a later gate exposes missing structure.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & When this phase is executed as code, use the standardized positive-path workflow, cite exact source objects, update dossiers/\allowbreak{}scratchpads, and package the complete repository/\allowbreak{}tool state.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited, including roadmap-specific additions GNG46-GNG50.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planned integration/\allowbreak{}audit phase. No Lean code has been implemented in this package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Planning evidence comes from the uploaded original roadmap TeX and the current YAML/\allowbreak{}tool state. The roadmap is treated as reference/\allowbreak{}migration material, not as a checked Lean source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Reference-audit/\allowbreak{}roadmap-integration only at this stage;\newline later Lean phases must use explicit derived-only source objects and proof-carrying structures.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build was run;\newline no Lean files were changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Check that every accepted roadmap item has either a concrete object/\allowbreak{}phase/\allowbreak{}gate or an explicit rejection/\allowbreak{}deferment reason.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with updated YAML, generated tables/\allowbreak{}exports and compiled PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success without a current Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Before implementation, translate every accepted roadmap element into object-owned dossiers, source maps, gates, and phase dependencies. Do not import external theory or legacy scaffold semantics as CNNA axioms.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Uploaded CNNA\_Roadmap\_v0605\_revised\_v38\_reviewfix\_umlaute.tex\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item source hierarchy\item maturity mapping\item one canonical object per row\item primary readable form\item exact Lean binding\item notation target module/\allowbreak{}scope\item alias-register separation\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no legacy roadmap claim treated as a Lean theorem\item no boundary-first shortcut promoted to core\item no Seed/\allowbreak{}Scaffold/\allowbreak{}Window de-seeded without source map and gate closure\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply.\item roadmap-reference material is not CNNA-generative data\item no de-seeding without source-map and derived-only gate\item no full-derived QFT face without complement-net modular chain\item no matter semantics from time reversal alone\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item ComplementGNS vs existing GNSProfile\item SplitPropertyProfile vs NuclearitySeed\item TimeReversal vs Matter\item GlobalStateCone vs causal cone\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item ComplementGNS vs existing GNSProfile\item SplitPropertyProfile vs NuclearitySeed\item TimeReversal vs Matter\item GlobalStateCone vs causal cone\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & All accepted items remain downstream of explicit CNNA source/\allowbreak{}handoff objects. If a needed source map is missing, the phase stays red or reference-only until the natural-origin predecessor exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Split into a roadmap-integration block plus concrete future Lean/\allowbreak{}reference phases so broad roadmap prose does not become a single opaque dependency.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Convert roadmap prose into typed, non-generative planning obligations;\newline if a source object is missing, backjump to its natural source layer.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No Lean module implementation in this package. Future module targets are recorded as planned/\allowbreak{}reference targets only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Roadmap content is placed as legacy-reference/\allowbreak{}migration audit, not as a new foundation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Avoid duplicating existing B/\allowbreak{}C/\allowbreak{}D/\allowbreak{}E phase rows;\newline sharpen them or add narrowly scoped child phases only where roadmap obligations were missing.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & No generator change to CNNA mathematics. The planning generator only renders the new audit rows.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Future code phases must use neutral, role-based modules and avoid phase-semantic public API names.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & If future refactor/\allowbreak{}de-seeding occurs: wrapper-first, importgraph cycle test, old-path regression oracle, rollback snapshot, and non-destructive lifecycle record.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & To be filled only when real code refactoring is executed: declarations\_migrated\_count, imports\_changed, import\_graph\_delta, consumer\_breakage\_audit, and legacy/\allowbreak{}coexistence status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Lean toolchain remains lean-4.28.0 unless a separate upgrade phase is opened.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Apply EXEC-2/\allowbreak{}EXEC-4 when relevant;\newline roadmap analytic objects do not alter operational ExecComplex by themselves.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Future consumers may read only through explicit A->B/\allowbreak{}C/\allowbreak{}D/\allowbreak{}E or B/\allowbreak{}C/\allowbreak{}D/\allowbreak{}E->A handoff gates. Roadmap rows do not create new consumption rights.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Roadmap integration is intentionally governance-heavy because it prevents silent import of legacy scaffold semantics into future Lean phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Keep all B modular and physical-completeness gates visible as source-map obligations;\newline prevent shortcuts from GNS/\allowbreak{}KMS directly to CPT/\allowbreak{}Kramers or from split property directly to DHR/\allowbreak{}DR.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Future Lean implementation should prefer explicit constructors, source maps, gate records, module-local lemmas and structural projections;\newline avoid consumer-side patches and fragile rewrite chains.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Not determined at planning-integration stage. Later phases must verify imports against Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0 before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No direct ExecComplex change. Numeric or finite mirrors remain comparison/\allowbreak{}operational layers only after exact source provenance exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not applicable until a future Lean derivation phase selects concrete finite/\allowbreak{}computable witnesses.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline roadmap chain sheets are obligations, not executable witnesses.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Potential heavy AQFT/\allowbreak{}LCQFT/\allowbreak{}DHR/\allowbreak{}DR/\allowbreak{}Nuclearity formalization pressure;\newline implementation phases must isolate comparison/\allowbreak{}noncomputable material.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & All analytic/\allowbreak{}QFT reference structures remain non-operational until CNNA-derived finite/\allowbreak{}exact source objects and allowed mirror layers are defined.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If imports are too heavy or noncomputable, create minimal target profiles/\allowbreak{}gates and keep established theory in reference layers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Roadmap-derived gaps are registered as phase/\allowbreak{}object obligations. A gap is not closed by appearing in the uploaded roadmap.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to source-map, notational, de-seeding, or pillar-handoff origin when a later gate exposes missing structure.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & When this phase is executed as code, use the standardized positive-path workflow, cite exact source objects, update dossiers/\allowbreak{}scratchpads, and package the complete repository/\allowbreak{}tool state.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited, including roadmap-specific additions GNG46-GNG50.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planned integration/\allowbreak{}audit phase. No Lean code has been implemented in this package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Planning evidence comes from the uploaded original roadmap TeX and the current YAML/\allowbreak{}tool state. The roadmap is treated as reference/\allowbreak{}migration material, not as a checked Lean source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Reference-audit/\allowbreak{}roadmap-integration only at this stage;\newline later Lean phases must use explicit derived-only source objects and proof-carrying structures.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build was run;\newline no Lean files were changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Check that every accepted roadmap item has either a concrete object/\allowbreak{}phase/\allowbreak{}gate or an explicit rejection/\allowbreak{}deferment reason.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with updated YAML, generated tables/\allowbreak{}exports and compiled PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success without a current Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Before implementation, translate every accepted roadmap element into object-owned dossiers, source maps, gates, and phase dependencies. Do not import external theory or legacy scaffold semantics as CNNA axioms.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Uploaded CNNA\_Roadmap\_v0605\_revised\_v38\_reviewfix\_umlaute.tex\end{itemize}\\

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & Not determined at planning-integration stage. Later phases must verify imports against Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0 before implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No direct ExecComplex change. Numeric or finite mirrors remain comparison/\allowbreak{}operational layers only after exact source provenance exists.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not applicable until a future Lean derivation phase selects concrete finite/\allowbreak{}computable witnesses.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & not-assessed-yet;\newline roadmap chain sheets are obligations, not executable witnesses.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Potential heavy AQFT/\allowbreak{}LCQFT/\allowbreak{}DHR/\allowbreak{}DR/\allowbreak{}Nuclearity formalization pressure;\newline implementation phases must isolate comparison/\allowbreak{}noncomputable material.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & All analytic/\allowbreak{}QFT reference structures remain non-operational until CNNA-derived finite/\allowbreak{}exact source objects and allowed mirror layers are defined.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & If imports are too heavy or noncomputable, create minimal target profiles/\allowbreak{}gates and keep established theory in reference layers.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Roadmap-derived gaps are registered as phase/\allowbreak{}object obligations. A gap is not closed by appearing in the uploaded roadmap.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Backjump to source-map, notational, de-seeding, or pillar-handoff origin when a later gate exposes missing structure.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & When this phase is executed as code, use the standardized positive-path workflow, cite exact source objects, update dossiers/\allowbreak{}scratchpads, and package the complete repository/\allowbreak{}tool state.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited, including roadmap-specific additions GNG46-GNG50.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planned integration/\allowbreak{}audit phase. No Lean code has been implemented in this package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Planning evidence comes from the uploaded original roadmap TeX and the current YAML/\allowbreak{}tool state. The roadmap is treated as reference/\allowbreak{}migration material, not as a checked Lean source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Reference-audit/\allowbreak{}roadmap-integration only at this stage;\newline later Lean phases must use explicit derived-only source objects and proof-carrying structures.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build was run;\newline no Lean files were changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Check that every accepted roadmap item has either a concrete object/\allowbreak{}phase/\allowbreak{}gate or an explicit rejection/\allowbreak{}deferment reason.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with updated YAML, generated tables/\allowbreak{}exports and compiled PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success without a current Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Before implementation, translate every accepted roadmap element into object-owned dossiers, source maps, gates, and phase dependencies. Do not import external theory or legacy scaffold semantics as CNNA axioms.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Uploaded CNNA\_Roadmap\_v0605\_revised\_v38\_reviewfix\_umlaute.tex\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item InterfaceCausality\item LocalCovariance\item RelativeCauchyEvolution\item DynamicalLocality\item HadamardStateSeed\item MicrolocalSpectrumGate\item LocalWickPolynomialsSeed\item DerivedStressTensorSeed\item DHR/\allowbreak{}DR/\allowbreak{}CPT/\allowbreak{}statistics bridge\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no legacy roadmap claim treated as a Lean theorem\item no boundary-first shortcut promoted to core\item no Seed/\allowbreak{}Scaffold/\allowbreak{}Window de-seeded without source map and gate closure\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply.\item roadmap-reference material is not CNNA-generative data\item no de-seeding without source-map and derived-only gate\item no full-derived QFT face without complement-net modular chain\item no matter semantics from time reversal alone\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item ComplementGNS vs existing GNSProfile\item SplitPropertyProfile vs NuclearitySeed\item TimeReversal vs Matter\item GlobalStateCone vs causal cone\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

\subsection*{Phase 23 -- REALOQS legacy code intake and AQFT migration audit block}
\label{impl:phase-23}
\par\smallskip\noindent\begin{minipage}{0.99\linewidth}\footnotesize\raggedright\textbf{Table legend.} \colorbox{green!18}{\strut G} = green/closed and derived-only; \colorbox{white}{\strut W} = white/non-direct-Lean tooling/refactor/infrastructure/documentation/comparison; \colorbox{orange!28}{\strut O} = orange/implementable after stated predecessor closure; \colorbox{yellow!25}{\strut Y} = yellow/active and implementable now; \colorbox{red!20}{\strut R} = red/locked Lean-derivation phase; release requires derived-only object/proof evidence. Context class is orthogonal to status.\end{minipage}\par\vspace{0.25em}
\begin{longtable}{L{0.16\linewidth} L{0.81\linewidth}}
\hline
\textbf{Field} & \textbf{Record}\\
\hline
Phase status & \cellcolor{white}W\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Context class & LegacyCodeReferencePhase\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation tier & F1\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase documentation depth requirement & Extended dossier required: legacy source path, migration disposition, dependency inversion risk, CNNA source objects required before reuse, target gates, and explicit distinction between legacy code evidence and CNNA-derived Lean closure.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change version & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Record change timestamp & \\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation status & planned\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation status & legacy-code-reference-audit\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase type & comparison\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & Legacy-code migration/\allowbreak{}reference phase: classify, map and gate;\newline do not assert CNNA mathematical closure.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & REALOQS legacy code intake and AQFT migration audit block\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Scan legacy modules/\allowbreak{}declarations;\newline classify migration disposition;\newline map useful structures to CNNA target gates;\newline mark incompatible dependencies and required natural-origin source phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & REALOQS legacy source -> RLC ledgers -> future CNNA PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT derived-only phases;\newline legacy objects do not become CNNA objects unless re-derived from CNNA source/\allowbreak{}handoff data.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & All REALOQS AQFT structures that import legacy PillarA/\allowbreak{}Core/\allowbreak{}BInterfaces, TreeOfCliques configuration, noncomputable matrix exponentials, or example harnesses require dependency inversion before they may influence CNNA PillarB implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Split into source inventory, foundation disposition, A->B compatibility, boundary-matrix rewrite, HK gate, state/\allowbreak{}GNS/\allowbreak{}KMS/\allowbreak{}modular, quasi-local/\allowbreak{}split/\allowbreak{}nuclearity, examples/\allowbreak{}meta quarantine and declaration-classification overlay.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Use the legacy code as a checklist of already-explored proof targets. Attempt fresh CNNA derivation first;\newline if a target lacks source data, backjump to the natural A->B handoff or PillarA source phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No CNNA Lean module implementation in this package;\newline legacy module names are archived scan evidence only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Legacy code is placed as a reference/\allowbreak{}migration layer, not as CNNA truth or direct source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse means target-gate reuse and proof-route learning;\newline direct copy/\allowbreak{}import is blocked unless future source map proves semantic compatibility.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & No mathematical generator change. The planning generator renders the new rows and report references only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Future modules must be neutral and role-based, not phase-semantic or legacy-name-preserving by default.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Any later code migration must preserve old evidence non-destructively, create wrappers only when naturally justified, test import graph, and record supersession/\allowbreak{}rename lifecycle.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & To be filled when code migration executes: declarations\_crosswalked, accepted\_targets, rejected\_targets, rewrites\_required, noncomputable\_isolations, import\_delta, regression\_harnesses\_extracted.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Lean toolchain remains lean-4.28.0 unless a separate upgrade phase is opened.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Legacy noncomputable AQFT objects do not alter operational ExecComplex. Later finite mirrors must satisfy existing ExecComplex boundary policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Future PillarB consumers may read only explicit CNNA A->B handoff data;\newline REALOQS legacy modules create no consumption rights.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Intentionally heavy because the legacy AQFT code is advanced enough to tempt direct reuse;\newline the plan blocks semantic drift by forcing source maps and re-derivation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Future proofs should introduce minimal neutral structures, then show they are produced by the CNNA handoff. Legacy predicates may serve as comparison gates, not as imported axioms.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Explicit constructors, projection lemmas, module-local proofs, source-map records, and structural equality. Avoid blind simp/\allowbreak{}simpa migration from legacy files.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & To be verified per future phase against Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0. Legacy imports are evidence only, not authorization.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex change in the scan. Boundary-matrix/\allowbreak{}exponential/\allowbreak{}KMS objects require later operational/\allowbreak{}mirror separation before executable witnesses are claimed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not applicable until future CNNA phases rebuild concrete finite witnesses from the current A->B handoff.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Legacy code contains many noncomputable AQFT/\allowbreak{}BoundaryMatrix sections;\newline executable CNNA witnesses require separate operational path construction.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Legacy AQFT includes CStar/\allowbreak{}KMS/\allowbreak{}GNS/\allowbreak{}quasi-local/\allowbreak{}HK vocabulary and matrix exponential/\allowbreak{}density-state material;\newline formal replacement must isolate heavy/\allowbreak{}noncomputable analytics from operational CNNA code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & 35 of 62 PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT files contain noncomputable;\newline BoundaryMatrix derived layer is entirely noncomputable in the scan.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Use minimal target profiles and later mirror layers;\newline avoid pulling all legacy imports into the CNNA critical path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Open: legacy code is not yet crosswalked declaration-by-declaration to CNNA current modules/\allowbreak{}objects. RLC8 and CEX11 must close this before Explorer/\allowbreak{}port claims.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & A->B handoff contract, neutral PillarB foundation modules, total Lean declaration classification, and non-destructive lifecycle/\allowbreak{}rename policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & When implemented as code, use CNNA positive-path workflow, exact source objects, no forbidden operational patterns, updated dossiers/\allowbreak{}scratchpads, and full zip packaging.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited, including REALOQS-specific additions GNG51-GNG54.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planned migration/\allowbreak{}audit phase. No CNNA Lean code has been implemented in this package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Static scan of REALOQS v0.0605 source zip: 270 Lean files, 1727 declarations, 88 PillarB files, 62 PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT files, 596 AQFT declarations, 35 AQFT files using noncomputable and 40 AQFT files using @[simp];\newline no sorry/\allowbreak{}admit/\allowbreak{}axiom hits in scanned source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Reference/\allowbreak{}migration audit only. Future Lean phases must reconstruct the relevant object from CNNA A->B handoff data using neutral modules and explicit proof-carrying structures.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build was run;\newline no CNNA Lean files were changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Check that every accepted legacy target has a CNNA source object, target module, migration disposition, dependency inversion note and lifecycle status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with updated YAML, generated tables/\allowbreak{}exports, archived legacy source/\allowbreak{}scan reports and compiled PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success without a current Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Treat REALOQS as a legacy reference/\allowbreak{}code-migration surface. Extract target gates and proof routes;\newline do not import names, modules, assumptions or noncomputable layers into CNNA without a fresh derived-only source map.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Uploaded REALOQS v0.0605 source zip\item Generated REALOQS AQFT scan reports\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item legacy source inventory\item AQFT migration map\item A->B compatibility audit\item boundary-matrix rewrite plan\item HK/\allowbreak{}GNS/\allowbreak{}KMS target gates\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no 1:1 legacy port\item no legacy A-interface/\allowbreak{}config harness treated as CNNA handoff\item no noncomputable/\allowbreak{}simp-rich layer promoted into operational path\item no legacy example treated as proof of CNNA closure\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply.\item GNG51-GNG54 apply to REALOQS migration.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Legacy reference modules only: PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT/\allowbreak{}*, PillarB/\allowbreak{}Gates/\allowbreak{}*, Meta/\allowbreak{}PillarB\_* inside REALOQS v0.0605 source zip\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item StarAlgebra\item LocalStarAlgebraNet\item StateOn\item GNSDatum\item KMSState\item BoundaryMatrix*\item TreeOfCliquesFromPillarA\item SplitProperty\item HaagKastler gates\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Lean toolchain remains lean-4.28.0 unless a separate upgrade phase is opened.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Legacy noncomputable AQFT objects do not alter operational ExecComplex. Later finite mirrors must satisfy existing ExecComplex boundary policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Future PillarB consumers may read only explicit CNNA A->B handoff data;\newline REALOQS legacy modules create no consumption rights.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Intentionally heavy because the legacy AQFT code is advanced enough to tempt direct reuse;\newline the plan blocks semantic drift by forcing source maps and re-derivation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Future proofs should introduce minimal neutral structures, then show they are produced by the CNNA handoff. Legacy predicates may serve as comparison gates, not as imported axioms.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Explicit constructors, projection lemmas, module-local proofs, source-map records, and structural equality. Avoid blind simp/\allowbreak{}simpa migration from legacy files.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & To be verified per future phase against Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0. Legacy imports are evidence only, not authorization.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex change in the scan. Boundary-matrix/\allowbreak{}exponential/\allowbreak{}KMS objects require later operational/\allowbreak{}mirror separation before executable witnesses are claimed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not applicable until future CNNA phases rebuild concrete finite witnesses from the current A->B handoff.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Legacy code contains many noncomputable AQFT/\allowbreak{}BoundaryMatrix sections;\newline executable CNNA witnesses require separate operational path construction.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Legacy AQFT includes CStar/\allowbreak{}KMS/\allowbreak{}GNS/\allowbreak{}quasi-local/\allowbreak{}HK vocabulary and matrix exponential/\allowbreak{}density-state material;\newline formal replacement must isolate heavy/\allowbreak{}noncomputable analytics from operational CNNA code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & 35 of 62 PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT files contain noncomputable;\newline BoundaryMatrix derived layer is entirely noncomputable in the scan.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Use minimal target profiles and later mirror layers;\newline avoid pulling all legacy imports into the CNNA critical path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Open: legacy code is not yet crosswalked declaration-by-declaration to CNNA current modules/\allowbreak{}objects. RLC8 and CEX11 must close this before Explorer/\allowbreak{}port claims.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & A->B handoff contract, neutral PillarB foundation modules, total Lean declaration classification, and non-destructive lifecycle/\allowbreak{}rename policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & When implemented as code, use CNNA positive-path workflow, exact source objects, no forbidden operational patterns, updated dossiers/\allowbreak{}scratchpads, and full zip packaging.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited, including REALOQS-specific additions GNG51-GNG54.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planned migration/\allowbreak{}audit phase. No CNNA Lean code has been implemented in this package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Static scan of REALOQS v0.0605 source zip: 270 Lean files, 1727 declarations, 88 PillarB files, 62 PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT files, 596 AQFT declarations, 35 AQFT files using noncomputable and 40 AQFT files using @[simp];\newline no sorry/\allowbreak{}admit/\allowbreak{}axiom hits in scanned source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Reference/\allowbreak{}migration audit only. Future Lean phases must reconstruct the relevant object from CNNA A->B handoff data using neutral modules and explicit proof-carrying structures.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build was run;\newline no CNNA Lean files were changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Check that every accepted legacy target has a CNNA source object, target module, migration disposition, dependency inversion note and lifecycle status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with updated YAML, generated tables/\allowbreak{}exports, archived legacy source/\allowbreak{}scan reports and compiled PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success without a current Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Treat REALOQS as a legacy reference/\allowbreak{}code-migration surface. Extract target gates and proof routes;\newline do not import names, modules, assumptions or noncomputable layers into CNNA without a fresh derived-only source map.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Uploaded REALOQS v0.0605 source zip\item Generated REALOQS AQFT scan reports\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item RLC1 foundation disposition\item StarAlgebra\item StateOn\item CStarStateOn\item LocalStarAlgebraNet\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no 1:1 legacy port\item no legacy A-interface/\allowbreak{}config harness treated as CNNA handoff\item no noncomputable/\allowbreak{}simp-rich layer promoted into operational path\item no legacy example treated as proof of CNNA closure\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply.\item GNG51-GNG54 apply to REALOQS migration.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Legacy reference modules only: PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT/\allowbreak{}*, PillarB/\allowbreak{}Gates/\allowbreak{}*, Meta/\allowbreak{}PillarB\_* inside REALOQS v0.0605 source zip\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item StarAlgebra\item LocalStarAlgebraNet\item StateOn\item GNSDatum\item KMSState\item BoundaryMatrix*\item TreeOfCliquesFromPillarA\item SplitProperty\item HaagKastler gates\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Post-implementation plan check & Check that every accepted legacy target has a CNNA source object, target module, migration disposition, dependency inversion note and lifecycle status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with updated YAML, generated tables/\allowbreak{}exports, archived legacy source/\allowbreak{}scan reports and compiled PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success without a current Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Treat REALOQS as a legacy reference/\allowbreak{}code-migration surface. Extract target gates and proof routes;\newline do not import names, modules, assumptions or noncomputable layers into CNNA without a fresh derived-only source map.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Uploaded REALOQS v0.0605 source zip\item Generated REALOQS AQFT scan reports\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]

\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no 1:1 legacy port\item no legacy A-interface/\allowbreak{}config harness treated as CNNA handoff\item no noncomputable/\allowbreak{}simp-rich layer promoted into operational path\item no legacy example treated as proof of CNNA closure\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply.\item GNG51-GNG54 apply to REALOQS migration.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Legacy reference modules only: PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT/\allowbreak{}*, PillarB/\allowbreak{}Gates/\allowbreak{}*, Meta/\allowbreak{}PillarB\_* inside REALOQS v0.0605 source zip\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item StarAlgebra\item LocalStarAlgebraNet\item StateOn\item GNSDatum\item KMSState\item BoundaryMatrix*\item TreeOfCliquesFromPillarA\item SplitProperty\item HaagKastler gates\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}

Phase type & comparison\\

Phase-type-specific contract & Legacy-code migration/\allowbreak{}reference phase: classify, map and gate;\newline do not assert CNNA mathematical closure.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Haag-Kastler gate extraction and CNNA re-derivation chain\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Scan legacy modules/\allowbreak{}declarations;\newline classify migration disposition;\newline map useful structures to CNNA target gates;\newline mark incompatible dependencies and required natural-origin source phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & REALOQS legacy source -> RLC ledgers -> future CNNA PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT derived-only phases;\newline legacy objects do not become CNNA objects unless re-derived from CNNA source/\allowbreak{}handoff data.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & All REALOQS AQFT structures that import legacy PillarA/\allowbreak{}Core/\allowbreak{}BInterfaces, TreeOfCliques configuration, noncomputable matrix exponentials, or example harnesses require dependency inversion before they may influence CNNA PillarB implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Split into source inventory, foundation disposition, A->B compatibility, boundary-matrix rewrite, HK gate, state/\allowbreak{}GNS/\allowbreak{}KMS/\allowbreak{}modular, quasi-local/\allowbreak{}split/\allowbreak{}nuclearity, examples/\allowbreak{}meta quarantine and declaration-classification overlay.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Use the legacy code as a checklist of already-explored proof targets. Attempt fresh CNNA derivation first;\newline if a target lacks source data, backjump to the natural A->B handoff or PillarA source phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No CNNA Lean module implementation in this package;\newline legacy module names are archived scan evidence only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Legacy code is placed as a reference/\allowbreak{}migration layer, not as CNNA truth or direct source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse means target-gate reuse and proof-route learning;\newline direct copy/\allowbreak{}import is blocked unless future source map proves semantic compatibility.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & No mathematical generator change. The planning generator renders the new rows and report references only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Future modules must be neutral and role-based, not phase-semantic or legacy-name-preserving by default.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Any later code migration must preserve old evidence non-destructively, create wrappers only when naturally justified, test import graph, and record supersession/\allowbreak{}rename lifecycle.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & To be filled when code migration executes: declarations\_crosswalked, accepted\_targets, rejected\_targets, rewrites\_required, noncomputable\_isolations, import\_delta, regression\_harnesses\_extracted.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Lean toolchain remains lean-4.28.0 unless a separate upgrade phase is opened.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Legacy noncomputable AQFT objects do not alter operational ExecComplex. Later finite mirrors must satisfy existing ExecComplex boundary policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Future PillarB consumers may read only explicit CNNA A->B handoff data;\newline REALOQS legacy modules create no consumption rights.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Intentionally heavy because the legacy AQFT code is advanced enough to tempt direct reuse;\newline the plan blocks semantic drift by forcing source maps and re-derivation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Future proofs should introduce minimal neutral structures, then show they are produced by the CNNA handoff. Legacy predicates may serve as comparison gates, not as imported axioms.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Explicit constructors, projection lemmas, module-local proofs, source-map records, and structural equality. Avoid blind simp/\allowbreak{}simpa migration from legacy files.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & To be verified per future phase against Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0. Legacy imports are evidence only, not authorization.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex change in the scan. Boundary-matrix/\allowbreak{}exponential/\allowbreak{}KMS objects require later operational/\allowbreak{}mirror separation before executable witnesses are claimed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not applicable until future CNNA phases rebuild concrete finite witnesses from the current A->B handoff.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Legacy code contains many noncomputable AQFT/\allowbreak{}BoundaryMatrix sections;\newline executable CNNA witnesses require separate operational path construction.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Legacy AQFT includes CStar/\allowbreak{}KMS/\allowbreak{}GNS/\allowbreak{}quasi-local/\allowbreak{}HK vocabulary and matrix exponential/\allowbreak{}density-state material;\newline formal replacement must isolate heavy/\allowbreak{}noncomputable analytics from operational CNNA code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & 35 of 62 PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT files contain noncomputable;\newline BoundaryMatrix derived layer is entirely noncomputable in the scan.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Use minimal target profiles and later mirror layers;\newline avoid pulling all legacy imports into the CNNA critical path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Open: legacy code is not yet crosswalked declaration-by-declaration to CNNA current modules/\allowbreak{}objects. RLC8 and CEX11 must close this before Explorer/\allowbreak{}port claims.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & A->B handoff contract, neutral PillarB foundation modules, total Lean declaration classification, and non-destructive lifecycle/\allowbreak{}rename policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & When implemented as code, use CNNA positive-path workflow, exact source objects, no forbidden operational patterns, updated dossiers/\allowbreak{}scratchpads, and full zip packaging.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited, including REALOQS-specific additions GNG51-GNG54.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planned migration/\allowbreak{}audit phase. No CNNA Lean code has been implemented in this package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Static scan of REALOQS v0.0605 source zip: 270 Lean files, 1727 declarations, 88 PillarB files, 62 PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT files, 596 AQFT declarations, 35 AQFT files using noncomputable and 40 AQFT files using @[simp];\newline no sorry/\allowbreak{}admit/\allowbreak{}axiom hits in scanned source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Reference/\allowbreak{}migration audit only. Future Lean phases must reconstruct the relevant object from CNNA A->B handoff data using neutral modules and explicit proof-carrying structures.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build was run;\newline no CNNA Lean files were changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Check that every accepted legacy target has a CNNA source object, target module, migration disposition, dependency inversion note and lifecycle status.\\

Phase type & comparison\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase-type-specific contract & Legacy-code migration/\allowbreak{}reference phase: classify, map and gate;\newline do not assert CNNA mathematical closure.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Title /\allowbreak{} state & Quasi-local, split, nuclearity and DHR/\allowbreak{}DR horizon alignment\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Preparation workflow & Scan legacy modules/\allowbreak{}declarations;\newline classify migration disposition;\newline map useful structures to CNNA target gates;\newline mark incompatible dependencies and required natural-origin source phases.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source-to-CNNA mapping & REALOQS legacy source -> RLC ledgers -> future CNNA PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT derived-only phases;\newline legacy objects do not become CNNA objects unless re-derived from CNNA source/\allowbreak{}handoff data.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Dependency-depth audit & All REALOQS AQFT structures that import legacy PillarA/\allowbreak{}Core/\allowbreak{}BInterfaces, TreeOfCliques configuration, noncomputable matrix exponentials, or example harnesses require dependency inversion before they may influence CNNA PillarB implementation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Phase split decision & Split into source inventory, foundation disposition, A->B compatibility, boundary-matrix rewrite, HK gate, state/\allowbreak{}GNS/\allowbreak{}KMS/\allowbreak{}modular, quasi-local/\allowbreak{}split/\allowbreak{}nuclearity, examples/\allowbreak{}meta quarantine and declaration-classification overlay.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Positive path plan & Use the legacy code as a checklist of already-explored proof targets. Attempt fresh CNNA derivation first;\newline if a target lacks source data, backjump to the natural A->B handoff or PillarA source phase.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module implementation manifest & No CNNA Lean module implementation in this package;\newline legacy module names are archived scan evidence only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Semantic placement decision & Legacy code is placed as a reference/\allowbreak{}migration layer, not as CNNA truth or direct source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reuse and duplication audit & Reuse means target-gate reuse and proof-route learning;\newline direct copy/\allowbreak{}import is blocked unless future source map proves semantic compatibility.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Canonical generator policy & No mathematical generator change. The planning generator renders the new rows and report references only.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Module compactness rule & Future modules must be neutral and role-based, not phase-semantic or legacy-name-preserving by default.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor regression protocol & Any later code migration must preserve old evidence non-destructively, create wrappers only when naturally justified, test import graph, and record supersession/\allowbreak{}rename lifecycle.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Refactor migration metrics & To be filled when code migration executes: declarations\_crosswalked, accepted\_targets, rejected\_targets, rewrites\_required, noncomputable\_isolations, import\_delta, regression\_harnesses\_extracted.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib version policy & Lean toolchain remains lean-4.28.0 unless a separate upgrade phase is opened.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex boundary policy & Legacy noncomputable AQFT objects do not alter operational ExecComplex. Later finite mirrors must satisfy existing ExecComplex boundary policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Consumer-contract direction & Future PillarB consumers may read only explicit CNNA A->B handoff data;\newline REALOQS legacy modules create no consumption rights.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Governance-overhead review & Intentionally heavy because the legacy AQFT code is advanced enough to tempt direct reuse;\newline the plan blocks semantic drift by forcing source maps and re-derivation.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof rehearsal before implementation & Future proofs should introduce minimal neutral structures, then show they are produced by the CNNA handoff. Legacy predicates may serve as comparison gates, not as imported axioms.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected tactics & Explicit constructors, projection lemmas, module-local proofs, source-map records, and structural equality. Avoid blind simp/\allowbreak{}simpa migration from legacy files.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected mathlib imports & To be verified per future phase against Lean/\allowbreak{}mathlib 4.28.0. Legacy imports are evidence only, not authorization.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
ExecComplex/\allowbreak{}computable plan & No ExecComplex change in the scan. Boundary-matrix/\allowbreak{}exponential/\allowbreak{}KMS objects require later operational/\allowbreak{}mirror separation before executable witnesses are claimed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Concrete computable instance traversal & Not applicable until future CNNA phases rebuild concrete finite witnesses from the current A->B handoff.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Computable path non-skeleton status & Legacy code contains many noncomputable AQFT/\allowbreak{}BoundaryMatrix sections;\newline executable CNNA witnesses require separate operational path construction.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Expected executable witness & not specified yet\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib complication log & Legacy AQFT includes CStar/\allowbreak{}KMS/\allowbreak{}GNS/\allowbreak{}quasi-local/\allowbreak{}HK vocabulary and matrix exponential/\allowbreak{}density-state material;\newline formal replacement must isolate heavy/\allowbreak{}noncomputable analytics from operational CNNA code.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Noncomputable boundary audit & 35 of 62 PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT files contain noncomputable;\newline BoundaryMatrix derived layer is entirely noncomputable in the scan.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Mathlib mitigation/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & Use minimal target profiles and later mirror layers;\newline avoid pulling all legacy imports into the CNNA critical path.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Bridge gap status & Open: legacy code is not yet crosswalked declaration-by-declaration to CNNA current modules/\allowbreak{}objects. RLC8 and CEX11 must close this before Explorer/\allowbreak{}port claims.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Natural backjump/\allowbreak{}refactor layer & A->B handoff contract, neutral PillarB foundation modules, total Lean declaration classification, and non-destructive lifecycle/\allowbreak{}rename policy.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation prompt contract & When implemented as code, use CNNA positive-path workflow, exact source objects, no forbidden operational patterns, updated dossiers/\allowbreak{}scratchpads, and full zip packaging.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Global no-go inheritance & yes;\newline all global\_no\_go\_guardrails inherited, including REALOQS-specific additions GNG51-GNG54.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
How implemented & Planned migration/\allowbreak{}audit phase. No CNNA Lean code has been implemented in this package.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Verification /\allowbreak{} evidence & Static scan of REALOQS v0.0605 source zip: 270 Lean files, 1727 declarations, 88 PillarB files, 62 PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT files, 596 AQFT declarations, 35 AQFT files using noncomputable and 40 AQFT files using @[simp];\newline no sorry/\allowbreak{}admit/\allowbreak{}axiom hits in scanned source.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Proof strategy & Reference/\allowbreak{}migration audit only. Future Lean phases must reconstruct the relevant object from CNNA A->B handoff data using neutral modules and explicit proof-carrying structures.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Build result & No Lean build was run;\newline no CNNA Lean files were changed.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Post-implementation plan check & Check that every accepted legacy target has a CNNA source object, target module, migration disposition, dependency inversion note and lifecycle status.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Artifact packaging rule & Return a complete zip with updated YAML, generated tables/\allowbreak{}exports, archived legacy source/\allowbreak{}scan reports and compiled PDF when applicable. Do not claim Lean build success without a current Lean build.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Implementation notes & Treat REALOQS as a legacy reference/\allowbreak{}code-migration surface. Extract target gates and proof routes;\newline do not import names, modules, assumptions or noncomputable layers into CNNA without a fresh derived-only source map.\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Source materials /\allowbreak{} references & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Uploaded REALOQS v0.0605 source zip\item Generated REALOQS AQFT scan reports\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Extracted established theory objects & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item RLC6 horizon map\item quasi-local completion\item split property\item nuclearity/\allowbreak{}DHR/\allowbreak{}DR boundary\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Forbidden patterns checked & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item no 1:1 legacy port\item no legacy A-interface/\allowbreak{}config harness treated as CNNA handoff\item no noncomputable/\allowbreak{}simp-rich layer promoted into operational path\item no legacy example treated as proof of CNNA closure\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
No-go guardrails & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item GLOBAL-INHERITED: top-level global\_no\_go\_guardrails apply.\item GNG51-GNG54 apply to REALOQS migration.\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Reusable existing modules & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item Legacy reference modules only: PillarB/\allowbreak{}AQFT/\allowbreak{}*, PillarB/\allowbreak{}Gates/\allowbreak{}*, Meta/\allowbreak{}PillarB\_* inside REALOQS v0.0605 source zip\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
Duplicate-risk symbols or operations & \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.05em,topsep=0.05em]\item StarAlgebra\item LocalStarAlgebraNet\item StateOn\item GNSDatum\item KMSState\item BoundaryMatrix*\item TreeOfCliquesFromPillarA\item SplitProperty\item HaagKastler gates\end{itemize}\\
\hline\addlinespace[0.20em]
\end{longtable}
